Full_Review: Nothing really  Staff were brilliant very friendly smiley but also very professional We felt very welcome when we checked in and also were given a glass of something refreshing and fizzy as we checked in a great start to our weekend Rooftop bar is fantastic and a real destination bar however it is a little expensive We were without our children but noted that there were families there and the downstairs bars were very family friendly we thought that you could go in there with the children play some games and have a few drinks better than the usual of being confined in the room with them in the evening

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Hotel guests should have priority access or guest list access to the rooftop bar The queue was huge as expected as its lovely up there but as we had dinner plans there wasn t time to pop up for a quick drink before heading out as the wait was over 30 minutes   They put us in a disabled room to begin with which isn t required which was not what we had paid for A quick phone call to reception and I was moved to the right room Good response however I should have been put in the right room to begin with We had the Club Deluxe the room was nice a little dark but otherwise fine Nice touch when booking club is the club lounge access which offers continental breakfast free drinks good spirits on offer as well and canap s

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Poor service receiving luggage to the room Waited ages only to find out luggage had gone to a different room then had to personally chase it   Excellent rooms Bed really comfortable Great location for exploring London

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Pillows terrible too soft rooftop bar too busy not much choice of room service food alcohol prices room service extortionate  Room and air con good shower excellent nice lunch at the bar barmaid excellent

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Room was very warm but once we got the air con working it was fine   Room was immaculate and the facilities were excellent nespresso machine was a very welcome touch

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: We were kindly upgraded to a Montcalm Club Double which allowed us access to the executive lounge with free drinks and canapes from seven to eleven pm and a free continental breakfast which was lovely This room also has a view of Finsbury Square to the front of the hotel which is pretty The rooms have great facilities lovely furniture including one of the comfiest beds we have stayed in Everything was in order and as you would expect The Aviary bar restaurant is a must Very cool with stunning views and buzzing vibe We will definitely book here again Thank you Montcalm for a fantastic stay

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Firstly I got allocated a basement room where its all dark and I had to complain for my room to be changed to the 6th floor The management staff at the roof top restaurant are very rude to guests and are inconsiderate

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: No view from the room at all which was very disappointing very disappointed to be honest I wanted to book something special for my wife s 40th birthday so chose this hotel based on reviews won t be doing that again And the staff service at breakfast was woeful not acceptable in any way shape or form they did not seem to care I have had better service and certainly better views I could have booked a Holiday inn or premiere inn for half the price and got better service and maybe a view   Room was very clean and tidy

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Beds and pillows were poor quality for such a new hotel Missing items from the mini bar on arrival including coffee TV volume is set so low you can t hear it Bar on the roof had alot of missing cushions so limited seating Only 1 patio heater working and no seating inside   Staff r helpful and polite Good location

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The bus stop in front of the hotel entrance was a bit off putting and that the walk to the underground on heels was a little uncomfortable   A glass of fizz offered at reception while waiting to check in

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Nothing  Loved the very friendly staff who looked after us so well the room was so clean and modern The breakfast was fab and just everything about the hotel was luxurious and will definitely be back

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Not being able to stay for longer  The hotel is absolutely amazing Couldn t fault it Exceeded expectations and have already booked to come back in two weeks time

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Booked into an adjoining room when l specifically requested a quiet room No toothbrush in room no room service menu available no iPhone docking station etc   Bed comfy manager very kindly gave me a discount on room service bill

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: No negative points Only we stayed there for the 10th birthday of our daughter which we mentioned upon arriving They told us she could expect a surprise but nothing happened But no big deal We had a terrific time   Very luxurious hotel nice atmosphere very beautiful interiors little art deco Just perfect Oh wait very good beds as well

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Room service food was barely warm Had to ring operator housekeeping concierge several times before I received an answer  Really comfortable bed and pillows Nice big shower don t need a bath Food really good on the 10th floor A very pleasant stay overall

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: I didn t like how the hotel get his payment To day I was informed by bank that the hotel is holding almost 2 nights charge this amount will be return after 2 weeks as the bank informed even though I paid in full while checking out Isn t better since they hold this as pre authorization to deduct this amount once the gust arrived and once the gust is leaving he will pay for the remaining night

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Great location great value staff did everything possible to ensure we had a great stay in the hotel was even surprised with a complimentary bottle of red wine and cake both of which were really tasty waiting for us in our room when we arrived back from a night at the theatre Amazing facilities and the view from the rooftop bar at night is beautiful Have stayed numerous times now and will definitely stay again 10 10

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Excellent communication with the hotel It was my partners birthday I let the hotel know this They arranged a birthday cake card a bottle of bubbly to be in the room for our arrival Very nice touch

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Nothing   Perfect location amazing view from the rooftop terrace Attentive conscientious staff and the most amazing concierge Mr Adrian We will return

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: None  The reception staff were fantastic made to feel very welcome and comfortable after s long drive from the south coast Excellent service from offering to take our luggage to the room down to having the entrance door opened every time for us with a greeting

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Unfortunately the sheets were quite hard and starchy not as expected for a 5 star Also the staff in the Aviary might need a bit more training we have a restaurant booking for lunch which was actually a surprise I had an email confirming my reservation and they could not find it even though the restaurant was empty they continued to look for the reservation and looked at my phone a no of times keeping us waiting about 5 minutes rather then just show us to another table It was slightly unprofessional especially as we were there in London as a surprise to our friends who were due to arrive any second Finally we got a table and explained it was surprise please show our friends to our table needles to say they did not manage to do that and we had to walk up to our friends Other things like pouring tap water on top of our sparkling water But luckily the manager noticed this and replaced the bottle and simply saying goodbye to diners as we left the restaurant we passed about 7 staff including the lady at the front of house and no one said anything It might be just teething as I believe its a new restaurant Food location etc were all great   The interior design of the hotel is great very stylish You know you are in a 5 star hotel

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: We returned back at 15 15 and our room had not been cleaned they came at around 15 45 however that was not convenient they suggest they come when we were out in the evening which they did however only did half a job We have stayed at lots of 4 and 5 star hotel here and in the USA this is a good 4 star The staff were of 5 star standard other than the cleaning organiser  Good roof top bar however at 10 for a pint of larger it was too expensive even for London

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: I was given a room for disabled people and the sink was very low which gave me a back pain every time I needed to use it also there was no curtain doors separating the shower from the rest of the bathroom which made a huge mess every time I took a shower Also there was one day that the room was not cleaned organized so I had to call them to come and do it after I came back from a long working day   Breakfast was really good Bed was comfortable Staff was very nice Excellent location from the training venue I complained about the things I did not like at the check out and they offered the food I have had during the stay for free

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Hotel setting not quite in line with its qualities Maybe Islington Council could be persuaded to improve the garden facilities on Finsbury Square Internal view from bedroom was also not very inviting   Excellent Guest Experience Team particularly Sinitta who went above and beyond when my husband was taken ill prior to our stay offering support and advice should the need to rearrange our booking been necessary Every member of the staff that we came into contact with were without a doubt skilled in their various roles and made us feel very welcome A very nice gesture on our arrival cake and drinks to celebrate our wedding anniversary Loved Aviary a great rooftop terrace Burdock was very relaxing for a drink and a lighter meal and the Spa facilities were fabulous A 5 minute walk from Moorgate and 10 minutes from Liverpool Street

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Rooftop restaurant and bar is a highlight but if you like calm in the evening on a Friday you won t get it as it is VERY popular with non residents If you want a bath rather than a shower check when you book Not problems for us just an observation for others   Fantastic top quality service and finish as you expect from Montcalm Rooftop restaurant and bar is a highlight but very popular with non residents

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Nothing we disliked this hotel exceeded our expectations in every way   Reception staff were extremely helpful and friendly Couldn t do enough for us The room was immaculate clean and very modern Great views from the roof top bar

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: THE AREA AROUND THE HOTEL CLOSES DOWN AT WEEKENDS SONNOT A LOT OF PLKACES OPEN ITS IN FINACIAL DISTRICT  FACILITYS GOOD GYM SAUNA ECT ROOFTOP BAR GREAT VIEWSIT IS EXPENSIVE PRICE WISE FOR SPIRIRS ECT

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Downstairs bar was lovely but a little pricey for dinner for what we ate   Luxury bedrooms and bathroom with LCD light switches Lovely staff Gorgeous rooftop bar with amazing views

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Staff were genuine friendly and welcoming The room was stylish with a fantastic view and a few extra little birthday touches were really appreciated I felt so comfortable and didn t want to leave We will definitely be back

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The bed was a bit squishy and felt like it was on an angle But that s just nit picking really the room was very nice and we slept well regardless   Welcomed with a glass of prosecco Room was standard but well appointed and had a great shower And a view of Finsbury Square We were there for a birthday and the staff put out a bottle of wine and a lovely card which was a very nice touch

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: This is definitely one of the best hotels I ve ever been The location is great and the hotel just looks fabulous Very very friendly and great staff The room was incredible spacious and modern The mood lights were my favourite This is honestly an amazing hotel and by far much better than most hotels in London

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Was disappointed that we paid for the club lounge and it wasn t open when we stayed Looking forward to seeing what it s like when we stay again in July   Lovely breakfast and room was cosy and comfortable Loved that it was so close to the street food night market dinerama Good selection of other restaurants and shops nearby too Bed was extremely comfortable and loved that it had sky movies too Was lovely to come back chill out and watch a film

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Food in restaurant could have been better and more reasonably priced   Super king size bed very comfortable Excellent bathroom Complimentary extras provided for special occasion really appreciated

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: There was nothing in the hotel that I did not like   The staff were lovely and the facilities were amazing The rooftop is beautiful and I loved the warm welcome I got as soon as I walked in Definitely recommend

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The property Itself was flawless   Rooms were large and comfort The hermes inside the bathrooms were a really nice touch and the touch pad commands for lights air con heating and under floor heating was fabulous

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Their continental breakfast needs an upgrade very little choice and mediocre quality for a 5 Design is very modern but quite sterile and too dark   Amazing bed spacious and bright room clean and comfortable Great rooftop bar with good cocktails

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: You should not put guests in a room which has a folddown bed and try and explain that it s an upgrade because it s on the 9th floor The beds and these rooms are not consistent with the quality of offering that a hotel of this standing should be upholding An almost sleepless night Terrible  Location

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: There were several technical glitches and although they were taken care of by the hotel staff super quickly it was somewhat annoying to have to come from the office late in the evening and find out something went wrong The lights and air conditioning were controlled by a digital panel which failed a couple of times Another night the safe would not open Another night the desk light had to be replaced And several times the keycard did not work Overall I was satisfied with my stay here but not sure I would return   The room was comfortable and the staff and service was really great The shower was amazing It was big and spacious the water pressure was awesome and the large shower head was great The location was good too Walking distance from many atractions

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Bathroom wasn t cleaned to standard Towels where replaced but floors where left as is and not wiped clean Had no hot water for shower my first evening there   Very comfortable bed

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Everything was perfect   I was greeted by a lovely gentleman at the door who kindly showed me to the front desk I was checked in by Gabby Gabby was extremely polite and informative She was friendly and was keen to personalise our stay In fact all of the staff we encountered were wonderful My partner and I had drink in the roof top bar before we left for our evening out I highly recommend a visit to the roof Our room was immaculate the TV was huge and the shower is awesome We can t wait to come back Thank you for a wonderful stay

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Unfortunetly we found a few blonde hair in the bed but other than that everything was perfect  The hotel is absolutely beaitiful There are staff to help you with your luggage on arrival Staff are so polite helpful the rooms are beautiful aswell great room size big bed the bathroom is lovely clean also I liked the control panel that indicated wether we wanted the room cleaning or not to be disturbed and then that will show outside the door The location is really good too a few minutes walk from some shops and food places

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Bar service on the terrace could have been better Breakfast was maybe a little overpriced   Spacious rooms good view from the roof Good value for money in a good location Free bottle of prosecco on arrival which made the stay that little bit more special

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The mattress was quite soft Enjoyed the Nespresso machine but small cups and only four pods provided each day prior to contacting reception   Very spacious room huge bed great hotel facilities both Burdock and The Aviary bars are beautiful in room kitchenette was handy

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: How cold the room was on arrival once adjusting the settings though it quickly warmed up   The bed was very comfortable love the shower space and size of the shower head Absolutely wonderful

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Air conditioning was a bit smelly hence the need for the most advanced electronic air freshener I ve ever seen Did resolve itself after a couple of hours  Good size room

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: A fixed price of 25 for breakfast seemed a little excessive considering we were still full from our meal the previous evening in the Aviary restaurant   Your staff were really friendly and helpful and the Aviary restaurant was exceptional

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: No view from window  Bed was amazing Underfloor heating 55 inch tv with all sky channels Sky bar at top floor was a great place to relax prices not too bad for London

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Tables at the rooftop bar were all reserved from 6 30 Men in suits took over and we had to leave Disappointing   Modern bathroom and bedroom Fab shower

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The lounge where everything was included in the price we paid ie drinks continental breakfast etc The luggage service was excellent the staff was very helpful and very polite

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Slightly tight on room when using the coffee maker but that s being very picky as room was lovely  Really liked the feel and style very modern with lovely roof terrace Would highly recommend it

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: My bed was not good gave me a backache I think the staff would have helped me get another but we were only there for two nights so just decided to manage The airco outside made a lot of noise we were very near it being on the third floor I always sleep with earbuds and I needed them   Super friendly staff very nice terrace on the roof Great dinner at restaurant nearby kind of funny to be in the midst of all those banks and find a cheerful Indian restaurant with excellent food Easy to hop on tubes as the hotel is near Liverpool street station and even nearer to Moorgate Had breakfast nearby choice between different brands Rooms nice and quiet when it comes to noice from inside the hotel that was excellent

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: With the price I paid for the breakfast was an additional 25 I had also requested a room with a view but I guess that wasn t the case for this hotel The staff were very strange and awkward which made my experience quite uncomfortable The light function was fine but there s just too much going on and it s not as straight forward We had trouble using it at some point during our stay Always malfunctioning The smart view function on the TV didn t even work which was a complete waste of time The room requested wasn t like the one shown on the picture Smaller than I expected but this is fine Charged extortion prices for the mini bar but that s expected Was only given one robe even though they were aware that there s two people in the room Overall my experience was ok The bed was comfortable and the TV is huge But needs room for improvement   The hotel is modern and comfortable The spa looked nice though we didn t use it

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The bed was the best bed I ve ever slept in My partner said it was the quickest he s ever fallen asleep and I swear that was bed related not my company

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Room view was of an air con unit other than that perfect   Staff were very accommodating rooms are of amazing build quality im a builder and tend to shag unintentionally and I ll be honest my room I found 0 snags also it s got a very modern feel to it and I love that the pool and hot tub are brilliant all in all we loved it here

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Cleanliness of the room Someone had deposited something from their nose on the headboard disgusting Coffee drips on the cream leather chair Hair on our sheet   Everything you would need in your room Bed was comfy room was dark and quiet Bethroom was lovely

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The lobby bar area as you enter the hotel is a little rowdy during the evening but unnoticeable once you re in the lift on your way up to your room or when you re in your room Just wish it was the reception desk as you walk in as opposed to a bar   Friendliest staff and very accommodating Super clean Tech friendly and very luxurious Rooftop restaurant is fabulous Decor is so chic Perfect location especially with Lpool station only 5 10min walk away

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: In room dining menu and breakfast choices can be improved   Convenient location 5 min walk from either Moorgate or Old Street Station Less than 15 min walk to Spitalfield Market Excellent rooftop bar with amazing view Exceptionally friendly staff and service Excellent bathroom and toiletries The bed and pillow selection from the pillow menu are superb

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Most good customer service comes from the fact that you are a customer then there is the staff in Montcalm who are genuinely welcoming and friendly and makes your stay that much better

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: As with all London hotels the drinks prices were a little steep but no more than any other hotel of the same vein   This is a very classy hotel the decoration was modern and sometimes quirky All staff were extremely friendly It has an excellent terrace bar and restaurant We were upgraded to a suite with no extra charge in which the bed was one of the most comfortable I had ever slept It is very central good for travelling from the north of England as extremely close to Euston by tube We had a great stay and will be back

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: There wasn t anything I fidnt like only one tiny thing there was no conditioner for your hair no biggy and not a problem   Staff are very very friendly and helpful guest relations people made my sons birthday very special would deffinately stay there again

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Bathroom floor was so badly scratched Even though I emailed regarding the two of us staying the room seemed to be equipped for one person with one towel robe one coffee cup 1 spoon etc When returning on Sat night we requested a fork and it did not arrive   Check in The nespresso machine Welcome tray Good bed It was also quiet

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The staff in the bar were a bit slow and one was not particularly polite In such a nice venue you expect more   It s a lovely hotel and really new The bathroom floor was heated and the shower was great Very clean Would recommend

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: breakfast was not included and expensive  staff was very friendly Savia Rodrigues was very helpful and able to upgrade our rooms for us as well the free mobile phone is VERY handy

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: This is our second time at the Montcalm Our first stay was in January 25th 26th for our birthdays and we was delighted by the hospitality of the staff from the door man to the guest experience agent krystine who went the extra mile in terms of our overall stay On arrival we was greeted promptly with door service complimentary glasses of presseco as we checked in and help with our bags to our room Overall we enjoyed our time in the MCRL hotel and the only let down was very minor being the underfloor heating in our bathroom but we was assured that all will be amended by the next time we come back Our second stay was 2 nights spend over this easter April 16th 18th and again the staff was completely professional and helpful The stay was again great but we had some concerns on the day of checking out My partner had been bitten by what could be a bed or dust parasite on her calf and lower left ankle We took pictures of the inflammation of the bites and will be contacting the hotel to prevent any further such happenings A slight downer to our break We was also slightly confused as to why the admittance to the sauna facility now closed half an hour early then on our previous stay but we was happy to see the changing room was both running in accordance to this hotels standard As for the staff present during our stay we would definitely like to thank Ivet the guest experience agent who provided assistance from even before we arrived in terms of any special requests we may of needed Daniel who was also very helpful He handled our bags with care as he took them from reception to room and even then went the extra mile to provide additional help by going to the aviary to bring my fianc and I the dining menu explaining how great the food and ambience was Also we would like to thank Johnny and Clairease who work as waiter and waitress in the avairy for such pleasant hospitality and would definitely be coming back very soon

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: There was nothing I didn t like to be perfectly honest   Staff were just fantastic It was both of our birthdays and they were very good to us giving us little treats upon arrival The room was exquisite and I would definitely stay here again

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The price of drinks in the roof bar are rather pricey but downstairs were probably cheaper than most in London   From the moment we walked in to the Montcalm Royal london House Hotel the staff couldnt have been more helpful and pleasant The hotel was breathtaking and catered for your every need The views from the bar upstairs are just the best in London I would highly recommend this hotel

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: My room key did not work when i first went to my room but was sorted out so quickly it was not an issue I could not get the shower water to go hot and was a little over lukewarm   The room was very spacious and well furnished and has sky tv nespresso machine and other little comforts The spa is a lovely facility with a small swimming pool hot tub sauna etc Staff were very welcoming and helpful

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: some window views not great as is a converted office block but view from the roof terrace more than makes up for this  I would just like to let you know what an amazing weekend both me and my partner had for her birthday weekend getaway made all the more special by your stunning hotel tucked away in the corner of finsbury square Your hotel and staff made for a wonderful stay for two nights and your hotel is presented beautifully feels very elegantly modern and as guests we were made to feel very welcome and looked after in all aspects by all staff encountered on our stay From the moment the doormen opened the doors it felt special and after being upgraded on check in to a junior suite this was a fantastic and thoroughly appreciated surprise topped off even further by the presentation of celebration cake brought to the room after we had had time to settle in and appreciate the room The room with all its modern fixtures and fittings made us feel relaxed with literally everything at your fingertips all presented in a very clean smart modern manner This theme of sharp smart and modern runs through the hotel from the bar on the ground floor with its copper and wood fittings through to the smart and efficient but very friendly reception area All corridors and rooms seemed well sound proofed with thick carpets and ambiently lit to further add to the relaxed and calm feel of the place Whilst up on the roof the experience of an amazing view from the aviary bar and restaurant enclosed with glass serving exemplary food and drink or sitting out in the open air looking across the london skyline in comfort with the added extras of blankets or heaters if required was a truly special place to while away a few hours in conversation and complete a truly remarkable hotel experience Fantastic location in business sector so mainly office buildings some impressive buildings or shops not intimidating or busy at weekends when offices closed Only four minute walk to liverpool street station underground links or a short taxi ride into leicester square oxford st areas

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The breakfast area was a bit small In peak times not everyone got a spot immediately and had to wait   The staff was very friendly Our room had a good size and everything was new and clean We especially enjoyed the spa area in the hotel

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The breakfast which was included with the room rate was very limited you can t get eggs or veg just coffee juice bread and cheese There was another breakfast in the hotel restaurant but you have to pay The location of the hotel is far from the center   I booked the jounier suite the room and the bathroom were big and comfortable The stuff were helpful the hotel in general is good You can find grocery and restaurant nearby the hotel

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: I think the breakfast prices are a bit steep The only real complaint I could have was that I had to move rooms twice due to malfunctioning locks in the room door This was an inconvenience but the hotel dealt with it well and gave me a complimentary drink and full English breakfast for both mornings So thankfully I didn t have to pay the price of the breakfast   The room was spacious and comfortable Loved the small wellness centre The restaurant and rooftop balcony was great in the morning and the evening The staff were excellent friendly but very professional

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Bathroom only had a shower no bath   Great roof terrace with Aviary bar restaurant Amazing location in the City within walking distance of many fascinating areas We can t wait to return for another mini break

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Couldn t fault it   Staff wonderful couldn t do enough for you Free wine on booking in and Prosecco My birthday and they left us cake in the room and fruit Lovely roof top bar Room spotless Very modern

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Very polite and pleasant customer care service I felt so at ease The bed however was a little annoying as it was two single beds pushed together I did order a room with a double bed I didn t complain though as the staff were extremely nice would definitely go back there again Great location plenty of bars and restaurants near by Roof top garden in the hotel Was lovely

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Underfloor heating was not working woke up in the middle of the night to turn it on was looking forward waking up to a nice warm bathroom floor in the morning   Great location Amazing views from the 8th floor suite we had Staff was very helpful and super nice Very clean and complementary drinks on arrival

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Unfortunately all the power to the room was lost in the morning this included all lights bar an emergency light near the door and all power sockets and the phones in the room I went downstairs and informed the main desk and power was finally restored a short while later  We booked whilst there was an offer on the room as it was not one we would have normally booked glad we did as we had a lovely time needed a longer stay as we didn t have time to have a drink in the aviary bar we popped up to have a quick look and were very impressed with its location and general decor

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: I loved everything here its a really beautiful hotel with the most friendliest staff i enjoyed my stay even more because they made the room look special for me and my other half

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: I think there should have been robes in our bathroom bit awkward not having them because of going to the spa But all in all good   Absolutely loved our stay and we will 100 stay again

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Nothing  The room was great the biggest bed I d ever slept in and ever so comfy We visited for my birthday over the mothering Sunday weekend sk they ensured that I felt spoilt Prosecco on arrival cake in my room and cupcakes in the foyer Everything was perfect Thanks it was a very special stay Jane

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: There was building work going on in the spa and they should have warned us It was in the afternoon but nonetheless it was noisy  Staff superb Beds fabulously comfy Great location away from madness of west end

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Luxury room Hermes toiletries Club fare including free drinks and finger food during the happy hour stunning decor and view from the roof restaurant

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: First very friendly and professional staff Providing two glasses of champagne upon arrival smile at us and open the door for us every time we are in the lobby Second very modern room and facilities Recently refurnished yet no smell Third love the neighbourhood must try the modern pantry restaurant Finally the value

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: the staff at reception and in every area were exceptionally attentive helpful and polite On arrival we were made to feel very welcome by Dado and Sinita as well as all the others Lovely ambience

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Rooms vary quite a bit first time I stayed I had a wonderful room but this time the room was quite small and dark even though it was the same level Superior Double Front desk was not good at giving me options for another room and was quite terse   Comfortable bed nice shower allowed for an earlier check in Near Waterloo station

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Expensive breakfast The double room comes with conjoined beds and a top mattress which is not great for couples   Amazing staff It s very rare to find so friendly helpful and professional team Very nice and comfortable room Spotless The floor heating in the bathroom is amazing

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: In the mini bar it says it s meant to have a bottle of bubbly which it didn t and after requesting it twice to the reception staff i still didn t get it Was disappointed with that Other than that the stay was great just a shame about to bubbly as it was my sisters 21st   The property is amazing Beautifully done up building It was just as I could have expected and more I haven t stayed in a more comfortable bed in my life Also the views on the rooftop WOW is all I can say

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Fantastic location and a superb hotel having only been open for 6 months it seems as if it s been around for years Excellent staff and I will definitely be heading back soon

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Prices of drinks at the roof top terrace and the price of breakfast  Very warm welcome very clean Hotel room was huge and bright modern touch screen light switches Travelled for my husbands 30th hotel staff left a card and a cake in the room

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The noise in the morning of near by workers but I suppose this is out of your hands Or possible sound proof the walls   Shower was great also the bed as very big and comfortable

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The noise The noise The noise I was kept awake until 1 30am by noisy drunk people outside Then an alarm went off in our room at 6 30am Worst nights sleep EVER   The room was modern and clean

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Breakfast in bed was cold I do find alot of really good hotel still can t manage to get this right   We have stayed a few times now and they are constantly improving It is a very new hotel so it obviously takes a little time to iron out teething problems They seemed to of managed to do that now The staff are great nothing is to much trouble Its a hidden gem The roof bar is fantastic wonderful views

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The 12 5 service charge automatically added in the hotel bar and restaurant however service was outstanding so would have tipped it anyway   Very big rooms as standard Hermes toiletries sky tv the rooftop bar amazing cocktails excellent shower fruit and nespresso coffee machine in the room complementary cupcakes in reception lovely surroundings great bar and food very attentive staff Excellent service

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: They had a few issues with the plumbing First thing on a Saturday morning i got woken up at 6 am by banging from a bad plumbing system and what sounded like bad airlocks I may as well have woken up next door to a building site it was so loud which went on for a few hours When the rooms next door to me were showering etc all i could hear again were whistles and screeching from the pipes This problem really let down the experience for me and certainly ruined a comfortable sleep that i very much needed that morning   Loved the staff and the hotel facilities

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The hotel was beautiful and the staff were incredible We were staying for my partners birthday and the guest experience team made the weekend one to remember for years to come They had arranged birthday decorations and large helium balloons with the number 25 to be set up in or room for arrival to surprise my partner and also 2 slices of delicious birthday cake Throughout our stay they were so generous providing us with 2 bottles of wine and cake It was so amazing

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Nothing  Staff were so friendly and made you feel very special Service was absolutely amazing they couldnt do enough for you Will be visiting again Roof top bar was just stunning

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: N a  Received a good deal on the hotel room the hotel emailed and asked if there s anything they can do to make your stay more personal to you I had contacted them and replied a weekend away with my partner Arriving in hotel 2 minute walk from the tube station its stunning staff very friendly and couldn t do enough for you After checking in the room they had put on a very romantic theme after my request Complimentary bottle of wine cake and other little touches The hotel could not have done more Very pleased look forward to a return visit

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: You need to book restaurant reservations in advance Friday evenings are extremely busy Pretty grim response from the person in the leisure area who didn t really want me to go and peek through the window of the gym area even though I was checking it out to use it   Staff were lovely and attentive

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Despite location near Liverpool Station the place is a bit less visible so becomes difficult to find the place unless you come by taxi Probably breakfast would be possible to be included in the price offered   Design staff technology clean overall 5 star accommodation

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Spa area was not great Very small and steam room not working Changing room lacking benchs and privacy Also signage in hotel is poor really not easy to find the spa Had to ask several staff and still got lost and there was no information in room about the spa either Spa staff were less helpful that other staff who were all lovely I stayed on top floor and it was a little noisy with the bar above which didn t bother me but would be a consideration if staying with children or a light sleeper   Bed was extremely comfortable Lovely bathroom with waterfall shower Great tv media options Good mini bar Excellent room service I had something also available at Burdock restaurant and my plate was much larger than in the restaurant which made the tray charge worth it I just wanted the comfort of my own room as staying alone I did enjoy a few cocktails in the bar beforehand and they were great and I felt comfortable there on my own

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The service was excellent from the moment of arrival until check out The staff was genuinely pleasant warm and efficient I felt like I received a royal London welcome

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Room service was sub par My coffee cups were clearly just rinsed with water and not clean replaced with fresh cups Not all trash was taken out daily Water bottles coffee etc not replaced each morning which was disappointing as this was supposed to be provided with the room My door didn t require a key to enter at first meaning anyone could waltz right in as the battery died on the door unit This is very dangerous but was remedied right away and they sent someone to stand outside my door to make sure no one entered whilst I was out The internal lock didn t work so you couldn t lock the door from the inside but they did send someone right away to fix that He had to chisel the door frame down and play with the hinges Phones in the room didn t work this didn t get fixed but there was a handy mobile in the room For most problems staff were very helpful and prompt to remedy any issues house cleaning and phones excluded i didn t want to have to call reception again with yet another problem Biggest issue there was an additional charge on my room of over 500 as it hasn t gone through yet I can t comment on any resolve   I was upgraded to a room with a view of the square after being woken up 2 4 mornings I stayed there The room was spectacular Didn t want to leave The restaurant on the roof was awesome great food fantastic cocktails and delicious desert all with a nice old world glitzy view inside and a nice city view outside Yummy diffuser inside room letting of a nice scent was an added feature to the gadgets you get to play with depending on the type of room you stay in Prompt responses to issues I had with the room Mostly super friendly and helpful staff Complimentary spa access had I known I would have bought appropriate clothing to take advantage of this Great products inside bathrooms Elemis and Hermes

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The hand held control for the high tech facilities did not seem to work or maybe was too technical for us Perhaps some instructions with the item   The staff were extremely welcoming and friendly We were delightfully surprised with an upgrade and complimentary wine fruit and chocolates The coffee machine was a lovely touch and the spa so good we got up early to use it again before check out Also check out was a leisurely 12 noon giving a lovely unhurried start to our day Thank you

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Staff are amazing cannot do enough to make your trip really special Roof top bar is amazing views are incredible and heaters and blankets available Complimentary upgrade and red velvet cake as we were celebrating our anniversary Cannot rate more highly

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: A very long wait for our room to be ready we had to leave as we had places to be and they took well over 2 hours to get our room ready and we were told to wait persistently once our room was indeed ready after the long wait we d wanted to just get in our room and chill out for a couple minutes get all of our stuff out and get on our way however once we got to the room our room key did not work and we had to go downstairs which was a mild inconvenience   More or less everything else seemingly ok

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The bathroom smelt like rotten egg and the underfloor heating did not work   The room was a really good size and the bed was very comfy bit of a shame that it was two twins pushed together though Lovely smell in the room i felt like I was at a spa staff are lovely and the hotel is in a good location

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The Aviary rooftop bar was a big disappointment when we were there it was busy but tables had not been cleared and overall service was very disappointing We had one drink and left quickly   The bed was fantastically comfortable with top quality linen Super shower and very clean throughout Automated controls for lighting and air con was very good Food in the downstairs bar was reasonably priced and good quality Overall staff were very helpful and service was appropriate for the standard of the hotel

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The staff were really friendly and helpful Didn t expect such good service for the price I am paying Felt very welcomed and comfortable as compared to most hotel Almost seemed like a family run business The attention to details was superb

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Loved everything   Super lovely room as we got a free room upgrade with an amazing view Bed was super comfy and pillows were great The room was large and the bathroom was wonderful Loved the view from the rooftop terrace and the spa Staff were super friendly and helpful Would recommend and love to return

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Could not stay longer   Modern rooms with underfloor heating to the best for cold days Very good area close to three key train stations Reception personnel was truly friendly and very very helpful and made the best to offer a great service Location is peaceful however central to everything LOTS of eating and dinning options Bed was super confi Great atmosphere Toiletries of good quality Hotel is just as the pictures posted in Booking no nasty surprises Breakfast was SUPERB

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The cost of items from the mini bar were extortionately priced Bag of crisps 3 00 Pot of chocolate mini eggs 9 00   The staff couldn t have done anything else to make our stay more enjoyable The bed was super comfortable the rooftop terrace was so relaxing and the ambient music being played was appropriate for the surroundings

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: It was no spa there it was to new they still need like massage and have more organize in there It was to noisy for me at the evenings they awlays have some DJ at the night time in the restrount The fire alarm went on middle of the night befor my flight just false alarm   Staff was nice

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Nothing  The facilities and staff were amazing The room was luxurious equipped with everything you could possible need and the bed was extremely comfortable

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Everything was excellent  Room was excellent staff very helpful just wish they had something to stop my boyfriends snoring although a pillow was very tempting

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The room was quite small felt very much like a business hotel We also found it odd that the robes were on a high shelf in a zipped bag in the cupboard so we didn t find them until the morning It did state this in the welcome book but we didn t read this as we only arrived at the hotel late Lovely toiletries but no conditioner Expected luxury for the cost but it wasn t really up to that standard and no breakfast included in the hefty price   Really comfy bed and fab bathroom shower Loved the mood lighting Lovely bar and restaurant on the roof

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The bed was amazing and the room with the mood lights staff were very helpful and friendly Very good location and easy to get too Breakfast was very nice The pool and jacuzzi was relaxing and enjoyed good weekend away Will stay here again

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Room is very modern comfortable and clean Concierge escorted me to my room with my luggage and then presented a small box of chocolates Room also comes with some kind of handy mobile phone travel companion

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: I really have got nothing to complain about I thought if there was one little problem I wernt to sure if the heating was working properly  The staff were so helpful

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The bed seemed to be a bit saggy in the middle so not as comfortable as it could have been   Great barman on the ground floor bar Lovely staff generally and the location was perfect The rooftop bar and restaurant was also pretty cool it was a shame it was raining

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Some snagging issues toilet leaking etc Am sure that these will be resolved as rooms are generally very good   Staff were great thanks although some confusion with new staff

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Modern stylish hotel with choice of restaurants bars well stocked executive lounge smart bedrooms with very comfy beds lovely shower attractive leisure pool

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: It would have been nice if breakfast was included in the price   Staff were absolutely amazing nothing was too much It was our anniversary and they had left red velvet cake and a card in our room The bed was comfy the spa was brand new I cannot fault the place

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The hotel was wonderful staff where polite and extremely helpful Beautiful roof top terrace with amazing views of the London skyline Club room is amazing was a rain shower Would highly recommend up grading to a club room all drinks are free in the club lounge

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Very loud and busy on the Thursday night when the bar was full of people after work Far too drunken people Also 5 days on and I have not recieved the money they are holding on my card incase of a cancellation back   Lovely hotel Great location Perfect to visit east side or central london Spacious rooms The rooms are snazzy everything is remote control

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The staff are definitely one of the best I ve ever experienced most valuable asset of this hotel from the gentleman at the door Alex I believe to the reception and bar staff all genuine and polite smiling and helpful

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Club Breakfast could be better Not much there and not enough tables   Friendly staff Hotel is beautiful inside Bedroom clean and comfy Also I asked if they could do something special for my boyfriend as it was his birthday and they did Really happy Would defiantly come again

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Had a steak from the restaurant on the terrace bar was pricey and mostly flavourless   Nice big bed underfloor heating in bathroom cake and wine on arrival as it was my partners birthday and very helpful friendly staff

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: screen pad in room not work every time  jacuzzi pool top floor bar terrace friendly staff comfy beds bedrooms location for trains and shoreditch

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Forgot to bring me additional coffee pods but no major drama as was just takung them home for the wife as they are expensive   Made sure i wasnt placed near elevators as i planned on a late night with a late checkout room was very quiet and i was able to rest after a very late night and check out refreshed at 2pm

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Ex Lounge would be better on high floor At present on the ground floor in front of Reception with no views quite dark not very inviting  Room was very comfortable

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: From our stay Nothing   We travelled for my partners 30th birthday and the hotel were so welcoming Left us a bottle of prosecco fruit platter birthday cake and macarons in the room Great touch and very much appreciated The room was great facilities brilliant and the shower we are looking at buying for our own house The restaurant on the roof was superb and the food was fantastic we recommend the Chateaubriand as it was exquisite Cocktails went down a treat also

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: When we got there there was staff opening the door for us very fancy inside Got our keys at 14 00 o clock Staff was very friendly and helpful they brought our luggage to our room The room was clean and super nice and cosy had a king size bed and a TV that actually works D bathroom was big and fancy in the room there was a phone that we could take with us wherever we went I really liked our stay in there and will go back next time

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Not enough pillows and there was no information in the room on paper only electronic   Absolutely awesome staff were there any time you tried to find a fault Absolutely brilliant stay if I needed to find a fault maybe more pillows but thoroughly enjoyed our stay Thank you to Monika who made our evening a complete success especially as we had spotted her during the afternoon doing the Peter Crouch dance and was still buzzing and delightful 6 hours later as was the rest of the staff

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: I could not fault the hotel in anyway possible Amazing hotel most comfortable rooms The staff So friendly polite and helpful I will 100 be returning again

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: If I was being picky I d say the room could have been warmer as there was only underfloor heating available for the bathroom which didn t heat the bedroom   The staff could not be more accommodating The decor was amazing as soon as we walked in very smart

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: nothing All great  My second visit to this hotel and everything about it was great Staff excellent and eager to help Room and facilities excellent Would always use this hotel on visits to London now

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: the opening times of the bars rooftops and spa would have been handy in the hotel information left in the room   Excellent Service and very smart looking hotel and handy location excellent spa and bars

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The tech in the room did not always seem to work the lights wouldn t come on all the time and things which were said to be involved were not We were told it would be made special for valentines and that would be complimentary but there was nothing For the price I feel this was a shame   The room is clean and comfortable It is a comfortable bed The shower is nice though not very powerful

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Location close to the tube station The room was spacious and the bed was amazing I particularly liked the tablet that allowed us to control the heating and lights The hotel offers a smartphone with internet access for use during the stay The staff was kind and helpful I will definitely stay here again

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Parking opposite was very expensive but not the fault of the hotel  Everything it was our wedding weekend and the hotel could not have done more for us Outstanding

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: I arranged for the hotel to put in Balloons Confetti and a cake into our room as it was my partner s birthday but they forgot to do this   Room was a lovely size and very comfortable Great ensuite too Went to the Modern Pantry restaurant very close to hotel for breakfast absolutely delicious

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: very good hotel nice people and service good breakfast helpful in everything and for everything nice location in the finance part of london close to few metro station

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Breakfast in bed took over 2 hours to arrive and it took multiple calls to room service to get it Breakfast was overpriced and underwhelming   Very clean Receptionist were helpful Restaurant staff need more training

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Only one bath robe in our room Pubic hairs on the bed White stain on the pillow Room service took over 25 minutes so had to phone and re ask where it was Charging 5 for the tray is rediculus as if we didn t pay enough as it is Chair was wet on roof top bar boyfriend felt it then told staff it was wet they made sure they felt it before drying it As if we would lie about this Had the burger for dinner from the roof top bar they said it would be well done it was more like cremated   Very friendly staff Lovely roof top bar

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: I can t fault this hotel at all but it will be nice when their Elemis consultants and services are running as they are not in place the moment but only a minor detail   The hotel was very modern with high tec facilities but it was the staff that made my visit incredible Nothing was too much for them They had put gifts in my room for my special event which involved a great amount of thought and research on their part The spa was gorgeous lovely pool and Jacuzzi I can t recommend this hotel highly enough in fact I have booked to go again I wouldn t use any other hotel now when I visit London

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Left some earrings in the room which I never got back as staff couldn t find them  Amazing welcome helpful and friendly staff great food in the rooftop restaurant with brilliant views room was massive lovely shower robe umbrella slippers swimming pool steam room sauna this hotel is second to non an experience like no other fully stocked mini bar

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: I was charged some sort of deposit after I arrived and paid the full balance for our stay This deposit resulted in twice the amount of money our booking cost in total being taken from my bank account and taking three working days to be replaced This was a large inconvenience to me being a student who travels a lot I was left without this money heading to the Netherlands less than 48 hours later I am aware some hotels do take this precautionary measure however I was never made aware that this money would be taken upon arrival and when I asked about it as I was checking out I felt as though the issue was belittled and brushed off without it being fully explained to me This may not be an issue to others but for me it is something which would hold me back from returning despite everything else being superb   The Handy smartphone you re given to use for the duration of your stay which allows you to have 3G on the go as well as being able to use it as a phone while staying in London to make any necessary calls without roaming charges was definitely a great addition which really helped us to get around As well as this the spa facilities are excellent

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: We were on a short break in London so only stayed here for two nights but will hopefully come back for longer next time We couldn t fault the accommodation as it was spotlessly clean and comfortable The staff also were very friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: All good   Bathroom party size and you feel you are floating in the bed cool hotel 3 tubes close Liverpool st takes you from soho to stansted great connection

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: If you booked through their website you are able to choose the pillow type and room scent but they didn t reply to my request sent via Booking Aside from that the pillows were not the most comfortable I also expected more from the interior design Not that there s anything wrong with it but it s not as stylish or elegant as I had expected   The location was good especially for anyone flying in via Stansted airport or anyone travelling via Liverpool Street The bed was very comfy I especially loved that they provided a cellphone with unlimited data local calls and etc As to the hotel it is very new so that might be why but I found the staff though friendly and helpful to be quite inexperienced and slightly awkward at times

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Aviary bar service a little slow but could be explained as it was a busy Friday evening  Fab location excellent staff and loved the hotel just a pity we didn t have time to try the new spa facilities

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: We were on the 9th floor and our first night we were woken at 1 45 am by banging on the roof sounded like tables and chairs being moved around Roof was a little too warm even with air conditioning on but having said both of this we would definitely stay again   Roof top bar was lovely

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Strange that mobile canteen on main road obscures hotel frontage Not in keeping with character of that which Finsbury Square should aspire to   Exceptional level Of staff welcome

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Housekeeping knocked twice before check out time and woke me up twice  Everything the Service the rooftop bar I was upgraded to a junior suite the price everything

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Slow table service in the bar area   Excellent hotel close to Shoreditch Staff were extremely helpful in the hotel and restaurant table service in the rooftop bar was very slow Good bathroom good shower and very comfy beds Air conditioning worked very well We would definitely stay here again

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: We had a security issue with our room door that required a maintenance call out That was not finally fixed until 01 30am so we were not impressed that we lost some sleep over that   Luxury Feel to the Furnishings and the Friendly Attentive Front of House Staff

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The are some spots which need more attention while cleaning the room as for five star hotel there are places to improve   Location is great staff very friendly

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Internet does not require a key Less safe than most and very slow The wall unit iPad to control temp lights and etc had a lot of issues Rebooted frequently   Breakfast was very good Bed was very comfy

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Staff inconsistence with courtesy From extremely professional courteous staff to others who walk past you in a corridor and simply do not even look your way Rooms are not sound proof NOTE that the reception area becomes a bar in the evening with rowdy drunk office workers whom you will need to weave your wee through should you wish to leave the hotel   Good location comfortable bed and great bathrooms Rooms have USB plugs which is great

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: We wanted a double bed and got two pushed together which was quite poor and noticed too late to ask for a room change  The room was great ambience and decor was very nice

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Nothing   I cannot recommend this hotel highly enough The staff could not be more helpful and the rooftop bar provided stunning views of the city Upon entering my room I was greeted with an array of cakes fresh fruit prosecco and a card wishing me a happy birthday The location was great and the rooms were beautifully decorated The perfect choice to celebrate my 21st birthday a big thank you to the staff of Montcalm Royal London House for helping to make it so special

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: That my room bin was empty from previous guest Also took too long for my breakfast to come not much hot veggies options  The head receptionist was very accommodating and did her best to help us have a great stay

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The hotel is undergoing some sort of construction which I understand but meant that we always had to walk around to the front of the building The elevators for some reason operate independently which means that you have to press both buttons in order to call both elevators in case one is going somewhere or is stalled which is very inefficient The door locks did not work when we checked in and so we had to have someone come to the room to repair them My room service order was appallingly cold Eating a burger that cold so cold that I spent half my time eating prodding it to detect any warmth is very disconcerting and made me ask management if anyone is even on staff to cook late at night To their credit they removed the room service charge and offered us complimentary breakfast for the rest of our stay a more than fair offer Finally while I appreciated the hotel s attempt at using technology in new and innovative ways I must say that the missed the mark a bit First the interface on the tablet that controls the room is appalling I would never put something that ugly anywhere much less a luxury hotel Second technology should make things simpler and not more difficult Simple things like changing the temperature of the room became a confusing mess as the interface is poorly laid out and the panel is slow and poorly responsive   I liked that the staff worked hard to make sure that our stay was good and to rectify the hiccups with our room and room service order The breakfast which was comped as restitution for the room service mishap was pretty good but the lack of selection meant that I got weary of the full english after a couple days I also liked that the hotel is trying to use technology in new and interesting ways even if the end result didn t quite hit the mark I connected my tablet to the TV and was able to listen to music nicely The bathroom was beautiful and the shower was great Lastly the location of this hotel as plusses and minuses On the plus side it is located a short walk to a couple of Underground stations and from the Shoreditch area On the other hand in the immediate vicinity of the hotel there is not much in the name of fun Still we enjoyed walking to Shoreditch on one evening and to the Tower of London during one of our tourist adventures

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The location is 10 minutes walk from the nearest metro Still takes about 15 20 minutes to get to the centre of London if you like shopping   the rooms were clean and modern Breakfast was great with fresh croissants bread eggs and everything you can wish for

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: They Forgot it was partners birthday after saying they would surprise her I enquired and the hotel manager waived our room bar bill only 30 but nice touch Will return one day

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The room was really cold during the day the tablet for controlling the room temperature kept crashing and didn t seem to acknowledge when we switched the heating on The underfloor heating in the bathroom didn t work either and the shower was lukewarm rather than hot We found a pill on the bathroom floor but the room was clean and tidy otherwise The wardrobes were a bit fiddly as they didn t have handles   Friendly staff great location and a very comfortable bed Would definitely stay again if a couple of issues were fixed

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Nothing  The staff were so welcoming and helpful The location was great The room was spotless and beautifully decorated The bed was very comfortable Also the hotel was lovely and peaceful

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: All good  Amazing location and great view from the roof top restaurant I had continental breakfast it is very nice more than enough Wi fi is great rooms are all new and shiny personnel is very considerate Room service is very quick Had to change the room at first due to the sound of vents Will definately stay there next time

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The roof to bar was really busy and we could not get to the bar to buy a drink Good they were busy but a shame we did not get to enjoy it fully   The Hotel is only 4 months old and is very tech up to date You control the room from an iPad on the wall Massive TV with sky Bluetooth speakers and a excellent shower

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: There was something wrong with my room card I sometimes could not get into the room and had to ask the staff for help   It s not far from the underground and the staff is nice

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Every single member of staff were soo nice and helpful Just an amazing hotel and very clean Stunning rooftop bar We love it We hope to return again soon Special thanks to Claudia for her courtesy

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Nothing I enjoyed my time  The customer service is great staff are friendly and always helpful The view on the 10th floor is great while you eat breakfast coffee is excellent Its easy to get around from this hotel and your close to undeground

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Thought breakfast pricey so opted to go elsewhere   Immaculate trendy modern newly refurbished hotel State of the art facilities Very attentive staff Lovely to have spa area

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: More pillow selection Soft medium and hard  Facility three months old New facility and great room Comfortable bed clean good shower and ample room space Best hotel on trip

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Shuffleboard could have been free for guests of the hotel took 10 an hour   Really nice new hotel with a nice location getting around in London Cool bar with shuffleboard in ground floor and beautiful restaurant top floor with magnificent view

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: I would have preferred more in depth information on the bars and restaurants in the hotel guide e g which floor they were located menu etc otherwise a perfect stay  Very attentive staff A mistake was put right immediately on being brought to their attention and complimentary wine was offered and accepted

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Absolutely nothing   we absolutely LOVED this hotel Staff were SO lovely and attentive the beds and rooms were SO comfortable and we thought the roof top bar was just incredible A fabulous London experience I will be telling everyone about this hotel and will certainly be back one day

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The location on Finsbury Square is ever so slightly just a little bit out of the way for me of course it depends on the reason for your trip if you re looking for somewhere to stay in the City then this would be perfect   Great room modern touch lighting brand new bathroom all newly refurbished a real pleasure to stay here We took advantage of the rooftop bar which was still warmly heated on a chilly December evening by outdoor heaters with blankets provided in all seating areas had delicious cocktails nibbles overlooking a foggy beautifully atmospheric City skyline We didn t eat in the restaurant also up on the roof as we were meeting friends elsewhere but it looked great staff seemed super friendly There s also a great Spa on the lower ground floor which we didn t have time to sample but again really great facilities I d love to stay here again perhaps for a little longer next time Great hotel we really enjoyed our stay

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: room temperature was hard to get right room control was a little flakey and froze up no skimmed milk at breakfast and staff forgot to bring coffee and orange juice a couple of times no pen when handed a bill TV system slightly complex and not fully working   location great food was good staff very friendly easy walking distance of liverpool st and tube nice roof top restaurant excellent view room was clean and very new comfy bed free wifi was excellent

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Bit of a shame that you can t drink on the terrace after 10pm because the view is stunning  Upgraded to Club double much appreciated Very pleasant Staff I m staying there again in a week or so for the weekend and was asking for some advice to make it a special weekend for my partners birthday all the staff had great recommendations for me and i can t wait to go back

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Breakfast offering is not five star Limited service in caf on ground floor   Room very clean modern and light Staff at reception and bellboy were excellent Beautiful hotel in a great location View from our Montcalm Club double was great looked towards the City skyscrapers I would recommend for a good location near the City of London excellent rooms and outstanding staff

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Nothing to tell you where to park and there is a car park opposite but is very expensive thats all   Staff very helpful lovely building very modern and in a great location

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Hotel in total absolutely perfect for visiting London it had everything very quiet room so could sleep great loved the bed so comfortable bathroom etc smart room technology so easy to use Staff what can I say so helpful genuine and interested in what they were doing very safe location and so easy to tour London from access to all forms of transport

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: NA  The service was excellent and roof terrace is spectacular Guest relations follow up was also much appreciated Can t find fault and will be staying again for a special occasion in May

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The room was quite cold and took around a hour to heat up And the underfloor heating didn t work The shower was nice but would of preferred having a bath   All the staff where polite and friendly We Loved the spa and ended up spending hours there lol the roof top bar was beautiful and the bed was very comfatable

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
