Full_Review: 1 At check in I was told that breakfast is not included and only actual breakfasts consumed will be charged However after I left I was charged GBP125 for 5 breakfasts that I never had 2 The Duty Manager Savia De Jesus Rodrigues never responded to my emails with complaint about the GBP 125 charge 3 weeks thereafter the matter is still not settled 3 On an early check in I was promised an SMS to inform me when the room is ready The SMS never arrived 4 The soundproofing of the rooms is deficient A couple in a neighbouring room were enjoying themselves on Friday night and that was clearly heard I felt embarrassed to listen Involuntarily to all these sounds couples deserve some privacy in a 5 hotel   The place is conveniently situated at walking distance to most major offices in the City Sophisticated lightening The service offered is ok similar to other London hotels

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The mattress topper had a horrible smell The cupboard where the tea and kettle was kept was broken room service had to come in to open the door Asked for more milk for the room on the second day got more teabags There was dust on the sideboard which can be seen in this picture The hotel needs more work   The television was amazing and so was the bathroom The light switch was wonderful enjoyed the floor heating and the mood changing lights

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The bar closed at 11 o clock and felt we had to go to our room not much else to do local And neighbors complained so root terrace closed at 10 reallly didn t unstandard because there were only 1 2 dozen guests think they will struggle in summer time  The roof terrace was amazing rooms stunning and shower amazing we loved it

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Nothing   Great hotel staff very attentive bars on ground floor and roof both very good rooms were great beds really comfy and massive would definitely stay again

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Nothing   Everything was perfect Quiet rooms super clean clean building in general staff were helpful the bed was huge and super comfy Very hard to find any complaints

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The pillows were too soft it would be great if they offered firmer pillows the mattress was also too soft but just having an option on the pillows is a good enough fix  Great tv

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Booked three rooms One room had fruit flies all over the room but we were quickly upgraded to a Junior Suite for free The wall tablet in the rooms although a good concept needs to be updated You can tell a cheap tablet has been used to control the room because it lags and crashes often Invest into a good tablet according to the hotel s standards The same goes for the Handy Phone No interconnecting rooms throughout the hotel But all rooms within very close proximity Housekeeping staff can be lazy sometimes Sometimes they would not vacuum the room or clean the shower properly or even leave enough soap shower gel body wash   Great rooms spacious clean very modern New technology embedded into each room with tablets controlling the AC lightning floor heating call signs etc Handy phone included which has unlimited data and free calls within the UK and ten other countries The phone has a dedicated section where you can purchase tickets for activities around London at a discounted price Great amenities in the rooms that you expect to find in a 5 star hotel Location is great nearby park train station 2 min to Starbucks other coffee shops marks and spencer etc Safe area and quiet area Staff is impeccable Always caring and looking to make your stay as comfortable as possible A personal mention for Yulia Guest Experience Manager who took care of our issues kindly

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The control panel in the room for heating and lighting was over complex I didn t feel I knew if the settings I had selected were registering   The staff were welcoming the room was quiet clean and well furnished

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The area doesn t have much in the way of bars but we knew this going in Also fire alarms went off twice at about ten o clock on our first night no fire but also no call to tell us not to worry My wife also wanted me to mention that when we got room service her fish was raw in the middle   Absolutely amazing place impressed with virtually every aspect of the hotel Wonderful staff a lovely room a mightily impressive rooftop bar Didn t make it to the spa unfortunately budget wouldn t stretch that far Really loved it the staff couldn t have been more helpful ordering taxis nice cool drink on arrival I had asked for a little something special for my wife s birthday and was very impressed with with flower petals gorgeous cake and prosecco Brilliant value too Location is good you re about 10 stops from Westminster via tube one from Liverpool Street Gorgeous food in the aviary restaurant as well Truly the best hotel I ve ever been to and for once extremely deserving of its five star rating

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Only the fact that we got locked outside our room 3 times since it was a new system but our issues where dealt with fast and we was compensated Incedible service  The staff was excellent and very helpfull The room was amazing and was very comfortable

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: As the hotel is newly opened some facilities eg the spa are not available yet   The room was clean modern and a reasonable size The staff were very helpful

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: They are a very new hotel so are still figuring out a few teething problems There are getting there though   The staff and the new roof top bar restaurant

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: As I said on the like side the staff responded very well to the issues as we brought them to their attention The room was a good size but not comfortable it felt that the room was designed more for show than for comfort e g the single sitting chair we were a couple was uncomfortable the lighting was dark trying too hard to create a atmosphere and the bed was too high as well as being higher on one side than the other I assume 2 twins made up together The staff did sort out the lopsided bed Maintenance had to fix the aircon which was not working Problems with the electronic pad used to control room sometimes it did not work Other issues too with the room which I wont mention for brevity s sake Woken up at 06 00 AM on Saturday and Sunday morning due to very noisy collection of empties from the Christmas Office parties held in temporary marquees on Finsbury Square Not the hotel s fault but wouldn t recommend staying there over Xmas Office Party time   We had a number of issues with the room but the staff were incredibly helpful and quick to resolve them Cannot fault the staff at all The staff were the best part of the experience and were exceptional They made up for the issues by comping breakfast which was very kind of them

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Door keys did not work on several occasions waiting for rooms on mid afternoon arrival   Nice bedrooms and bathrooms helpful staff complimentary coffee in reception area

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The electricity control system broke down 2 times The first time all the lights are off and the second time happened in the morning at 4 the lights can not be closed So angry bad sleep

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Staff was unexperienced and in some cases didn t speak English well Guidance on Montcalm Club could be clearer and better branded   Helpfullness of staff Hotel is brand new

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: We have had some minor issues with the room temperature but the staff solved the problems The breakfast in the club lounge was nice but it was really busy   Lovely spa fabulous staff high tech rooms and a beautiful rooftop bar Also a nice birthday surprise cake Walking distance from liverpool street They also responded very professional to criticism

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The Club service for breakfast in particular was terrible When advised however the front desk swiftly made amends The staff cannot be faulted but teething troubles must be resolved   The staff were excellent Helpful friendly and attentive

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: room heating system does not work not so cald but not so enough warm  aa bit far away from busy areas like Picadelly Covent garden at this time of the season

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: No one answered for the room service in the evening very frustrating bed was too high I m pettite chipped tile in the bathroom sound on TV too low wouldn t go above 40 yet you could hear people passing through the corridor non stop spa facilities not open yet the staff could not even tell when will that open in the future bathroom under floor heating didn t work  Reception staff was impeccable compliments to Raluca I think was the name bed was comfy nespresso coffee in the room great view from the terrace top floor and dinner exquisite compliments to the chef and good size TV in the room

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Very poor breakfast Had to wait for a free table then a further 5 mins to be offered tea coffee No toast had run out of coussnts at 9 30 No fruit no yogurts The worst continental breakfast we have ever had Shame as hotel is a four star with a 2 star breakfast   Warm welcome Tech in rooms

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Nothing  The Montcalm Royal London House hotel is beautiful and we feel very fortunate to have stayed at this new hotel Happy and extremely helpful staff Our room was lovely huge TV and a really comfortable bed Delicious and tasty food in the Burdock Great breakfast in the Aviary rooftop restaurant with amazing views Gym and Spa is an added bonus A great hotel and we recommend a visit

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: A bit far from tourist attractions as it s in City district I would stay again for business but maybe not as a private traveller   A good option for business people I was also upgraded to a more expensive room with breakfast kudos to the receptionist Some good restaurants are also nearby

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Location is a not too central but not a big deal The sky tv volume sometimes didn t work but didn t watch much tv   This hotel is amazing Clean friendly staff Gaby and Alex all staff members are helpful You want to stay in the room all day that s how comfortable it is

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: No water in the room Not much tech either considering the hotel is based in a tech area of town   Staff were very helpful and attentive as they were within 1 month of opening so key will be can they keep it up Fruit was kindly added to the room but we would have preferred a drink or cake as we did not want fruit Maybe in future you could ask the customer what they would like as this would have been great Great bar downstairs

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: There wasn t anything I didn t like A couple of teething issue with the hotel being new including no remote for the TV in the room which was rectified within seconds and a spontaneously boiling kettle in the middle of the night The only reason the facilities aren t full marks is because I wasn t fortunate enough to to try them all I will rectify this upon my return   The welcome from the staff was great Surprisingly remembered my name and face from a visit to a previous hotel from the group I was early and they accommodated me with a glass of bubbly and quickly got me checked in an hour before I was due to a room that felt like an upgrade The room was spacious and the bed was outrageously comfortable Could have spent a week in it Wonderful waterfall shower was enough to tempt me out of bed and wake me up and the views from the rooftop bar for a night cap were excellent the sort you would have to pay good money for near by The location is also extremely convenient for visiting many great sights shopping areas and restaurants bars We were also lucky to get a great deal two nights for the price of one in a hotel of similar standard in a similar location

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Breakfast hall dining area was very small it didn t accommodate the volume of people Apart from that I couldn t fault it   Staff Service Location

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: It would be better to have the complimentary water bottles restocked everyday   Gabi the receptionist was very kind Walking distance from any City office Modern high tech lighting in the room

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Hotel location wrong room description room facilities never worked poor excuses to justify failures and false advertisement   Room size good bathroom TV size and porters

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Unfortunately my stay was ruined a bit by the fact that I left a bottle of expensive aftershave in the room at 9 when I checked out rang at 11 and they stated they could not find it I told them exactly where I left it so can only assume someone got an early xmas present   Hotel room was very impressive all facilities were top class and staff were extremely friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Wait for the room wasnt communicated well and we had no robes in our room but we asked and everything was dealt with in a timely manner  Confusion at check in and a wait for the room didnt take away from a gorgeous room and the best bed I have ever stayed in Sons 21st birthday was a delight thanks to everyone that looked after us

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Food ridiculously expensive entertainment system is circa 20th century room keys unreliable staff unable to do the basics like print an invoice   Location is great

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Got allocated a disabled room and not informed When reserving room asked for an earlier checkin which they were unaware of On arrival asked again and I was told they would ring me never received a phone call and returned at 1pm to find room was available immediately Room was freezing and it took all evening for the heating system to get the room to an acceptable temperature Had a surprise visit from a member of staff around 8am in the morning check out is at 12 Have amazing tech in the room with no instructions on how to use so spent time working it out No prices for the mini bar and low stock on coffe making facilities and number of towels All in all a rubbish experience which is a real shame as the hotel has all the potential to be great   Bar area excellent with attentive staff

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: We were woken up multiple times by hotel staff builders as the property is not yet finished Which is terrible when I had to be at a meeting early morning the reception staff apologised and I was told they investigated it but there were no issues Badly handled   The hotel was very clean and very comfortable beds Nice decor

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Wifi did not always connect No toilet brush unless you request it Staff s English varies from almost zero to great And heating is operated from room to room which means you arrive to 5 Celsius when you get back to your room whenever When we complained they inserted an extra card and turned on the heating and that was great but this is probably a problem for the entire hotel and should be solved on that level in the future   Nice room very quiet Staff tried to be very kind despite lack of language skills

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The room was small although average for London and was not really special Just a good room However for a 5 hotel you expect something special   The hotel is new and therefore very clean The staff is friendly You get a smartphone with a map and free 4g internet which is really nice for foreigners without a UK phone plan

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: high comfort great and friendly staff luxury you get a cell phone with data to get around the City pretty cool we loved our stay there and would go back immediately

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Avery bar on 10th floor very nice and we had a very good meal there The bar downstairs was very nice with friendly staff All in all we had a good stay Would go back

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The bar closed very early at 12 00  The staff were very friendly and helpful the hotel itself was excellent The room was very clean and well presented

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Requested twin beds but basic twin room too small with no space between beds Asked to change rooms and staff helpful but it spoilt first day as I got quite stressed The decor is very dark and masculine Black wood everywhere feels very 90s Only one comfy chair in room even in the more spacious upgrade You need a degree in electronics to work out how to switch the lights air con heating etc on and off Space age but impractical Towel hooks were placed too high for 6 footers and in second room although there was a towel rail it was positioned over the loo roll holder The TV wasn t working properly and they did not supply any body wash in the second room It had only been open a week or so and obviously there will be snagging but I had to clean surfaces in first room Spa needs additions like benches lockers and hooks Spa well appointed The staff were aware of all the niggles and I have been offered an upgrade if I stay again The staff did work very hard to rectify things   Location helpful staff and quietness The Second room was an upgrade and very spacious It had a bath The Aviary Restaurant on the top floor was first rate and good value compared with location

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The hotel was very fresh and modern with exceptionally friendly staff who were willing to help with anything Rooftop bar was spacious friendly and relaxing

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Absolutely faultless Spotlessly clean Stunning hotel Beautiful room to an exceptionally high standard and high tech facilities in the room complete with touch screen controls and lighting including mood lighting Pool and spa facilities were clean fantastic and complimentary too As for the staff quality of the food and rooftop bar amazingly faultless

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The staff were absolutely amazing in accommodating our needs and were very attentive to any requirements we had The room was exceptionally clean and staff were constantly asking as we entered and left the hotel throughout the day if we needed anything Location is spot on I would definitely advise anyone travelling to London to stay here Also try the Bacon Buttie in the small food area downstairs located near reception it tastes sensational

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: It s a very modern just renovated hotel so all the amenities are brand new The staff was extremely kind and helpful We also loved the rooftop restaurant

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Breakfast too expensive to add on   Excellent stay with attentive staff some of the best customer care we ve had in a long time Lovely spa facilities included with the stay great new hotel

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Absolutely loved everything from the staff to the room the high spec facilities Claudia at reception was outstanding and will definitely be going back to the hotel

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Nothing  That hotel was very welcoming all staff were very polite and the service they gave was out of this world Very comfortable and relaxing stay and the rooms are amazing and very modern By far the best hotel I ve stayed at and will most certainly be going back again

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: No info on how to contact reception or breakfast or how to use phone in the room or wi fi No where to dry towels  The room and bed were good and comfortable

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: When we arrived I found an empty soda can in our safe which someone must have left previously There were problems with our lights a maintenance person had to come in three times However these problems were dealt with very will by the staff who once again were very nice   The staff were very polite and extremely helpful the manager especially because of the problems we faced sh offered us a free upgrade on our next stay with complimentary breakfast and 25 off our stay The rooms are very high tech

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Curtains were very heavy to pull  Glass of prosecco while waiting for our room to be checked Staff very quick to respond to any queries and happy to take photos

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: I requested early check in but the rooms werent even ready at the normal check in hour very disappointing also from your end i dont think you should display this option

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The staff were brilliant very helpful Rooms were very clean and the hotel bars were fantastic Prime location close to Liverpool street and Moorgate very easy to get around

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: There were minor errors in these very new locations however they were corrected very fast   Brand new facilities very nice rooms excellent pool fitness outstanding roof terrace with bar and a magnificent view of London We booked a family suite with two adjacent rooms including lounge access and english breakfast A lot of nice service included The staff was very helpful and serviceminded

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The heating is a little noisy our room had no real view as it overlooked a narrow courtyard between buildings and there were a few teething issues with the electrics   Very comfy beds with good quality bedding and linen Bathroom is to a good standard with a great shower Room was spacious with all of the necessary facilities and some nice extras like Sky Sports complimentary fruit water and hot drinks The Aviary restaurant and bar is great

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: That i had to go home   Loved every aspect of this Hotel Trip The staff were very accommodating The Hotel itself was fantastic and well finished The atmosphere and overall stay was 10 10

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The bearkfast at the lounge was good The only thing was that we came one morning at 9 am and a lot of things were empty We asked to refilled but they just took the empty plate and never came back we did find what to eat but it shouldt be like that at a 5 hotel The aircondition in the room is hard to manage Had to call them a lot about it   The staff are very frindly I had a mistake on the confirmation from booking since i invited with breakfast and it wasnt writen The hotel imidiatly gave it anyway even before booking called them Also I forgot 2 dimond rings at the toilet by mistake called them from the city and they send someone to check called me back to say they found them and they waited for me in the room They helped in any way they could They also made us takeaway breakfast and coffee to go since we left at 5 15 am The hotel is clean and new and very comfterble Room size was grate The tube is 5 mint walk You can get anywhere easy and quickly grate valu for the money

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The fire alarm went off at about 3 am however this was due to another person smoking in their room and no fault of the hotels   You couldn t fault the room was superbly clean and the bed was extremely comfortable The staff were always on hand to help

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Rooms not ready for check in fire alarm going off too much room tech not working and so overly complicated noisy aircon units dark room with no view apart from into someone s office next door and overpriced bar  Good shower room and great beds

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: One small detail was the shower was nit hot enough for my girlfriends liking It was warm but wouldn t get to where you could call it hot   The entire hotel is spotless staff are super friendly and the rooms are very generous with space Beds are fantastic size and extremely comfortable and the lighting options in the rooms are great Nightlights Mood lighting ect

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: nothing really impressed with this hotel  The bed was very comfy room very well set out the facilities within the room were excellent A very happy traveller

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Upon arrival the staff at reception made causal conversation and asked for the purpose of the visit After learning it was for my boyfriend s birthday we were given a complimentary upgrade to a junior suite and then sent a bottle of prosecco and a tray of chocolate truffles to the room It was a great start to a memorable birthday weekend

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: nothing negative to say  Staff are brilliant rooms are amazing An upgrade was provided as room wasn t ready The bed is so comfy with a TV that covers half the room Cant say one thing negative about this hotel Pool area wasnt built but you can use a sister hotel facility free of charge with a free taxi courtesy of the hotel

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: More Nespresso pods Seriously though it was an excellent room   Lovely big comfy bed Facilities in room excellent Free Wi Fi Sky TV A C Nespresso machine mood lighting

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The roof top bar and spa was not open finished as stated on the website witch had I known probably would not have booked still teething problems air con underfloor heating didn t work in room   New hotel the finish to a good standard lots of gadgets fantastic location and service was good

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Nothing It was great   Genuinely one of the best hotels I have stayed at for a long time Staff were so friendly and would go out of their way to ensure that you as the guest had everything you needed for your stay It was such a lovely atmosphere would highly recommend to anyone can t wait to come back

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The heating didn t seem to work properly in the room however was quite warm anyway so didn t need to report Also no toilet brush   The decor cleanliness can tell it s a new hotel room space and all the little finishing touches

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Facilites are very modern but needs improvement in all the smart electronics   I ve stayed here for quite a number of nights staff are friendly rooms are clean Thank you Thomas from the concierge and ladies in the front desk for helping out throughout my stay

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Advertised with having spa and pool however on arrival were advised this was still being completed Access was offered to a sister hotel which they offered to provide transport to but bit gutted it wasn t available in the hotel as stated   Staff were accommodating given the room we were initially given was noisy from building works being done On arrival was given a glass of bubbly and help with bags to the room Very hospitable

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Sadly the pool and terrace bar weren t open yet but we were given access to the pool and spa of one of their sister hotels the free transfer there and back was a bonus too   We had a mini staycation for our 10 year anniversary and we were delighted to be given a free room upgrade as well as some yummy goodies and a lovely card The room was positively palatial and the bed was enormous The latter much appreciated after a long week at work just down the road The staff were extremely helpful and couldn t have been more apologetic about the areas not yet open Thank you for a lovely stay

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Disappointed the Roof Bar Spa not open informed both due to launch the following week Bad smell of drainage in entrance foyer but probably just due to the ongoing building work Very modern fab colours but lacking warmth a bit sterile and clinical in atmosphere Perhaps more fresh flowers around and offers in the Bardocks Bar to get it an inviting vibe so more popular and busy   Super friendly staff in a contemporary Hotel Very comfortable bed soft duvet pillows Great location for Shoreditch venues

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Nothing Everything was amazing  The whole hotel experience was amazing the service the rooms to the food everything was 10 10 The bed is so comfortable and the shower is exquisite

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Didn t like the fact I had to go home after my stay   The hotel were so thoughtful spelling happy birthday in rose petals for my girlfriend Greeted with bubbly when we checked in Daniel D helped alot when we returned a little bit drunk and couldn t get into our room The shower was amazing also The way the TV works with bluetooth and smart tv were handy also but the location being so close to the nightlife of Shoreditch and the business centre of the city makes it a great pick for both leisure and business

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The rooms were beautiful and the bed was extremely comfortable Only stayed for one night for work but would happily return Location was great for what we needed Cost of the room was a bargain

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: air conditions was not good at all lounge was very simple nothing fancy   the room was good especially the mood lights restaurant was okey

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: No complaints   Mood lighting Shower cleanliness Attentive pleasant staff Chocolates and fresh fruit on arrival Complimentary bottle of wine as room wasn t quite ready on arrival

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Needed a little bit of an introduction to where the Executive Lounge was and how it worked when we booked in rather then having to work it out for ourselves   A new hotel so not all the facilities are open yet but it has great promise Comfy beds lovely bathroom great for a weekend in London Very considerate cake and prosecco waiting for us as we were celebrating a 50th birthday Would definitely go back

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: They brought round complimentary fruit and newspapers during different times of the day There was also a small problem with a light but it was immediately resolved by helpful happy staff

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Had a little trouble with the room card not working but staff soon fixed the problem   Staff were very welcoming and accommodating They decorated the room for my friends birthday was beautiful Extremely clean tidy and an excellent atmosphere

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: I loved the bed but my partner found that he was rolling off the edge of the bed I d like a dimmed light option in the bathroom   The massive TV is awesome with sky and smart features The bathroom is smart with a deluxe shower Hi tech lighting is cool particularly the mood and night lighting The scent boxes are also a nice touch as are the elemis toiletries And delightful corridors

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Disappointed the rooftop bar was not yet open as hotel brand new Booking com should have advised this as the reason I booked Staff did offer to shuttle us to sister hotel for dinner with a view however   Beautiful hotel very welcoming staff excellent location

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The staff were helpful and polite without being overbearing The room was spacious clean and very comfortable The location is excellent and blissfully quiet Would highly recommend

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Didn t find the pillows very comfortable and noise from in room ioniser was off putting   1 night stay and apart from a drink in the bar only used the room Very nice room comfortable bed massive TV with Sky Nespresso machine big tick and really good shower

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Some hi tech did not work i e Warm bath pavement Elevator made of four blocks of marble Staff without badge name  Just opened clean hi tech comfortable size room and bathroom Air freshner Usb plugs

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Booking com stated that the hotel was nearer Oxford Street which we wished to be close to however it was very far out costing a decent amount in a taxi and a far distance on the train this was a let down however this was not the hotels fault it was the description from booking com website The only other thing was the dim lighting for applying make up   EVERYTHING Service was outstanding staff couldn t have done more to help you Sylvia I think that was her name at recieption was particularly helpful very welcoming aided us throughout our stay even when bumping into us asking how our stay was going she gave us great tips and made sure we knew everything about the facilities Hotel itself is stunning and we were greeted with a lovely birthday cake and drinks for the celebration of my husbands birthday Fantastic experience

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Nothing However I didn t like that I didn t do enough research we felt quite underdressed when we arrived  The staff were friendly and helpful always greeting you and asking how your day has been so far Doors are opened for you as you enter and leave the hotel You are treated like a VIP The bed was so so comfy and your room is constantly filled with lavender fragrance Furthermore the room service food was perfect

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: A few issues with the heating in the room It s a new hotel so still has a few teething problems They sorted it out though very quickly   Loved prosecco on arrival when checking in Staff couldn t be more helpful A few issues with the heating but they were able to sort this out promptly Would stay here again great location

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Everything was great nothing was Disliked  My partner Had an amazing experience here the stuff are friendly and just incredible especially Claudia I will be visiting again very soon especially when you ve added in the spa Exciting beautiful rooms great size great facilities just amazing

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The staff were excellent especially the house manager Daisy The location was ideal close to Liverpool Street Station and an ideal base for sightseeing as it is only a short walk to the Thames and London Bridge Tower of London and other fabulous sights

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: This is a new hotel and is the worst place we have stayed Hotel is actually quite good but our experience wasn t The advertised roof top bar is not open Neither was the gym We could use the gym in a nearby hotel but we were given wrong directions We needed the IT guy to come to our room to unlock the parent lock on the TV to watch a 12plus movie at 5 in the afternoon Breakfast order wasn t placed so we waited 35 minutes for eggs Touch pad for lights wasn t working properly Whoever delivered the paper in the morning thought it was a good idea to ring the doorbell to wake us Will probably be a very good place once staff know what they are doing and the misleading advertising with the roof bar and gym is fixed

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: There were no sockets to plug hairdryer in near enough to a mirror to style hair while drying Also touch button light switches were fun but I know partially sighted relatives of mine would find them hard to operate maybe just a thing to consider in future refurbishments But all very space agy and I m sure most people would find them cool   The decor was attractive and felt luxurious and the staff pleasant and eager to help

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Lovely stay at the hotel it was our anniversary and we stayed in a family room with another couple The hotel left a card champagne and rose petals on the bed It was very sweet and gave us a wonderful experience Our bed was super comfy and our friends that stayed in the other room on the pull out couch said it was pretty comfortable Would definitely stay again

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: No real criticisms other that the teething probs of a new hotel Concierge waas lovely but had no idea where he waas or how to get anywhere Am sure it will come   Staff ecouldn t do enough to help Whole place is lovely and would have given the facilities a higher count but they were not all yet open Great bar and cafe area good sized rooms

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The electronic light control panel in the bedroom is far too bright Expensive breakfast but plenty of cafes in the immediate area   Very nice furnishings and decor Bright and new Great location

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Literally only downside is it stated about a rooftop terrace and spa facilities but as it had only been open a week they werent ready so if thats what you want to go there for i would double check they are open  Me and my daughter went for 2 nights and straight on arrival after looking a bit flustered we were both treated with pudding and ice cream and they couldnt have done any more to make everyone feel welcome They treated my daughter whos 7 like their own Think its a place that will keep getting better and better over time as it had only been open a week when we went

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The hotel is new so the spa facilities weren t open and neither the restaurant or roof top bar which was one of the attractions that led us to stay there We unfortunately had a power cut on our floor irresponsible people in another room which reset the air conditioning unit so that didn t work for the rest of our stay However when we told staff they immediately took us to the manager who gave us our bar bill for free   Really comfortable beds The bar area is good and staff were very pleasant and couldn t do enough for us

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Reception staff could definitely been more friendly and welcoming  Great soft beds wonderful shower great decor in rooms Nice touch with balloons and cup cakes for special celebration

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The pool was not in use We like a swim before breakfast and before dinner Didn t fancy being wet in a cab back to hotel The heated floor didn t work A better view would have been nice Sky control and phones and fruit put in room after arrival   The room was great nice clean and comfy xx Paper each day appreciated

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: My booking from booking com hadn t come through so sorting my room took a while and involved a room change and I was expecting the spa fitness area to be available but they re still being built However both of those appear to be booking com issues   The staff were always extremely friendly and helpful and the hotel itself was lovely

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: The dust in the rooms kept sneezing and I never have allergies burnt rubber smell the scent machine in each room that kept breaking lack of sleep due to the electric wall panel the constant construction causing horrible noise when I moved rooms the upgraded room had worse views and the wall panel was right by my bed making the brightness unbearable the wall panel not working thus the engineer had to keep coming up to unlock the code so I could manage the temperature of the room oh and the gym and rooftop weren t available The whole thing was a bit disappointing If it wasn t for the kind staff I probably would ve had a fit and asked for a refund I know this hotel will be great though once complete in November Bar area is very nice   The staff is incredibly helpful and very kind They went out of their way to answer questions and do their best given the circumstances The hotel is less than a month old However it is false advertisement to offer pictures of facilities that do not yet exist I paid for grand views etc I also wanted sleep

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Staff have been over trained tried too hard to make a conversation when time could have been better spent explaining the room features etc Buffet breakfast for 25 is not good value at all  Nice room bed and shower

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: We went away for my partners birthday and we were very disappointed to discover that the spa facilities and the roof top bar were not in use even though it was advertised on the website which is why we chose this hotel There was also a fire alarm that went off at 3am disturbing our sleep aswell as a power cut while we were in the room Considering the hotel was brand new the room was very dusty on the dressing table and TV Overall we were very disappointed with this hotel with the money that we spent to go here

Hotel_Name: Montcalm Royal London House City of London
Full_Review: Pool not open Gym not open Terrace bar not open Bed uncomfortable duvet too hot Room controls erratic e g lighting  New hotel all clean and shiny

Full_Review: Unfortunately there is no quiet classy restaurant   Great bed super TV and WiFi

Full_Review: needs a tv in bathroom loud screeching noise at 7am in morning water pipe issues in the hotel horrendous leak in bathroom shower design water pours all over the bathroom floor no pool or spa expensive food and drinks no discount offered for breakfast at check in hairdryer was faulty wet towels were taken an turndown time but not replaced  Modern decor comfy bed personal touches staff were very polite lovely to have turndown service

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James
Full_Review: There were no instructions whatsoever on how to use TV Phone etc I could not work out whether curtains were electric or manual When the people in the room next door used their shower an airlock created a horrible siren like noise that awoke myself and my wife at 1 am thinking it was a fire alarm   The room was fine Nothing jumps out as outstanding

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James
Full_Review: No tub in the bath room also morning sunlight came through the bathroom window and made us wake up too soon   breakfast was good tea coffee facilities and amenities were good crispy sheets and super down pillows on the bed no tub in the bathroom instead a wheelchair facility Sunlight was shining from the bath room which caused early wake up bell boy service was prompt and friendly St James tube station conveniently across the road storage of luggage was very well organised we had a short but wonderful stay at Conrad We enjoyed good value for money Will recommend Conrad Hotel to anybody

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James
Full_Review: Housekeeping wasn t very consistent Although the bed was made we always came back feeling that the room wasn t tidied up maybe it s a directive from management not to put things away Although we aren t messy we did sometimes forget to put our shoes away etc as we d be in a rush to get to our destinations and it was a little disappointing to come back and everything was the way it was except for the bed and thankfully the bathroom We once forgot to turn off the Do Not Disturb sign and I called the hotel to explain I was assured housekeeping would be sent up We got back housekeeping must have left because no one explained to them to ignore the DND We called again turned off the DND light and asked for the room to be made Room was made but they d taken all the towels and had not replaced them   Doorman was extremely helpful and helped us get cheaper parking about 5min walk away from the property We received complimentary wine on arrival Our fav part was probably the lounge we gained access to because of our suite It allowed us to use the meeting room facilities when my partner and I had some business calls to attend to but it also served a fabulous afternoon tea that I thoroughly enjoyed Their scones were to die for Breakfast was fine not too many kosher options unfortunately but I m sure this wouldn t be a problem for most guests

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James
Full_Review: No spa also I asked for a vase and they did not have one The staff did not smile and came across quite moody   This hotel has the most comfiest bed ever If you want comfort and a good nights sleep this is a great option Also loved that the tube station is just across the road and that there are lots of shops and cafes nearby

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James
Full_Review: Two minor things our view was of the rooftop of an interior courtyard Basically just an inner light well for the hotel But I had asked specifically for a quiet room and that location certainly delivered Besides the room was so beautiful inside we just pulled the sheer curtains closed and then the blackout curtains at night Secondly the lobby is heavily fragranced which my husband with allergies did not appreciate I did not care for the smell myself but that may just be my preference Otherwise it was a wonderful stay   It was a jewel box of a room Not overly large but clean and luxurious and cozy with every amenity we could possibly need The bed and bedding were amazing and the decor was warm and modern I asked for a quiet room and we never heard any other sound while in our room We slept like babies Felt very pampered And the location cannot be bettered Just steps from the St James Park tube station After a long day touring and walking there was nothing better than knowing our hotel was right there beside the tube station And we loved being so close to Westminster and St James Park The neighborhood is close to everything yet without all the hoards of tourists and noise you can get in London We loved it and would definitely stay again

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James
Full_Review: The staff were excellent We stayed 2 days after arriving from the US before going off to Normandy and Paris It refreshed us to start our vacation at the Conrad St James

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James
Full_Review: Cleaners for the rooms were good but did not restock the tea and coffee at the same time so it meant that two or three people were knocking on the door at different times   Good sized room room service available all day and night

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James
Full_Review: Absence of a health spa was very disappointing had to source outside for workout  Housekeeping was meticulous Concierge service was fantastic Hotel staff courteous at all times

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James
Full_Review: Room carpet had stains on it Street noise entered the room 5 floors up charged us wrong when we got home they had added a extra 60 on my card I had to phone up to sort it out   Location

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James
Full_Review: Due to business reasons I informed the hotel that I was about to check out around 2 or 3pm and they said only able to check out at 2pm However due to traffic in London I rushed to the hotel at 2 45pm to check out the staff at the reception and the cleaning staff gave me a very nasty look and implied I came too late to check out which was very unpleasant I understood the late June was a busy period for the hotel because I travelled a lot and stayed many times in the hotel and staff have always been very friendly and accommodating but the experience I had this time was not good   Food and hotel facilities were excellent

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James
Full_Review: We had a meal out and decided to have dessert back at the hotel I had a sticky toffee pudding and hubby had a bread and butter pudding Mine arrived and then we had to ask where my husbands was It eventually turned up Neither were particularly great The price of each was 8 and then they stuck nearly 3 on as a Service charge which wasn t optionally Felt ripped off   Bed and bedding lovely Best nights sleep in ages

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James
Full_Review: Issues encountered with regards to do not disturb button inadvertently being pressed This was not explained on check in or when bags were brought to the room This resulted in a one and half hour wait to get into the room on the second day of our stay as the room was not serviced After servicing condiments had not been replenished and wet towel left in room Guest services did not tespond to three separate phone calls   Location

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James
Full_Review: Not being able to get your own ice The Restaurant was pricey was good but not excellent Had better in London for less   The location was excellent walk to Westminster Abbey The London eye bus tour The room was very comfortable the shower was excellent The only bad thing was if you want a small ice bucket or a beer you can t bring it up from the bar you need to call room service Thought that was a bit crazy The concierge service was great A bit posh but really nice The sheets towels pillows were great quality A lovely stay

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James
Full_Review: Air conditioning poorly maintained we had to call the front desk to have the unit serviced so it would work properly  High standard of service and good room service with reasonable prices

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James
Full_Review: There was honestly nothing I didn t like   This hotel is excellent Food amazing Cleanliness brilliant Toiletries in bathrooms molton brown All facilities catered for in room if you forgot toothbrush sewing kit shoe shine shampoos etc Free bottled water in fridge and coffee tea facilities But the best of all is the staff I actually emailed the manager of the hotel to compliment each and every member of staff Normally I could say one always stands out however at this hotel from the doorman reception bar staff restaurant they were all exceptional and made your stay feel special Even on leaving a goodie bag came out with the suitcase with water nuts chocolate cheese biscuits nut biscuits and was lovely and enjoyed on the train home I cannot compliment this hotel enough Thank you

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James
Full_Review: Nothing really  Right across the street from St James tube station Close to several big attractions like the Houses of Parliament Big Ben Westminster Abby Churchill s War Room etc Super clean and appears to have been recently updated Very freindly staff

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James
Full_Review: The staff were extremely friendly and attentive Our room was cleaned and replenished regularly to a high standard We loved our stay and will definitely be coming back

Full_Review: I don t think I can find anything to complain about It s expensive but worth it   I have stayed at this hotel before and was not disappointed on my return My son absolutely loves the luxury of the bath the bed the tv all of it Wonderfully quiet on the floor and a lovely night s sleep Totally recommended

Full_Review: Our hotel experience was faultless Although there was a issue with the power it was satisfactory resolved literally within minutes   Staff made us very welcome and made us feel we were very important customers Hotel room location were spot on for our needs The service for the car parking the breakfast room hotel staff were top rate and cared

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James
Full_Review: Breakfast was chaos I had to ask for tea and toast on several occasions It never came Tables weren t cleared It wasn t even that busy   They upgraded us to a suite for the price of breakfast

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James
Full_Review: i faced a bad experience they withdraw from my cc the full amount plus the Vat which is already calculated in the rate of ur site so am chasing the hotel to refund it since dec 29 and till now ntg and as a plus they withdraw today about 550 GBP donno why too much unprofessional way

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James
Full_Review: 1 Self service tea and coffee and toast in the breakfast room 2 Breakfast menu on each breakfast table 3 More attentive and friendly staff in breakfast room some were good some were less so 4 List of recommended restaurants in London local area 5 WI FI instructions in the room 6 Label the electronic curtain closing button to Curtain 7 Instructions for using coffee machine and where ON button is 8 Instructions on how to use shower  1 Room was lovely and of a high standard 2 Reception and Concierge excellent 3 Quick to respond when I was sick in my room and very kind too 4 Concierge rang around to book us a restaurant on New Year s day very helpful 5 Tasty cookies available at reception 6 Welcoming environment overall 7 Fantastic location so close to the Tube and attractions such as Buckingham Palace Westminster Abbey Houses of Parliament etc 8 Local area lovely

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James
Full_Review: It is well located if you re interested in visiting the top London tourist spots which are all about 10 mins walk away Not ideal for my visit however there is an underground station right across the hotel which was very convenient and easy to use My stay was a bit pricey but that is what you d expect from hotels in London at this time of year with almost all rooms sold out   Everything For London standard hotels this had the best standard rooms I have ever stayed in Clean spacious comfortable high tech and the best customer service all around I will definitely be making this my hotel of choice for all future visits

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James
Full_Review: The security of the hotel suddenly walked into my room without even ringing the phone because of a noise complaint I had some bags in the room for gifts I have bought and these bags had receipts that I needed for claiming taxes the house keeping house keeping services end at 10 PM room price approximately 400 just took them and I had to open an investigation and at the end I didn t get them back I had to checkout on my fith day because of all the mess that happened This is my 3rd time at this hote but the last The hotel was much more efficient with it s previous intercontinental management

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James
Full_Review: After touring amidst all the crowds and commotion of a large city it was great to be able to retreat to a super quiet hotel that was a stone s throw from some of the major attractions Service was great beds were incredibly comfortable with super plush bedding staff was really courteous even to children

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James
Full_Review: Unfortunately room did not have toileteries ie toothbrush and paste Requested newspaper which was left outside the room instead of having it slipped inside the room So had no idea it was there Phoned to check if room was smoking room and felt staff was very offhand and rude Room was okay although one of the upholstered chair was considerably stained Did not want to sit on it   Location and helpfulnes of night staff

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James
Full_Review: The size of the room that we paid for seemed very small for the money   The staff were very friendly and helpful The Hotel was very clean and comfortable The Hotel was well situated for sightseeing

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James
Full_Review: We had forgotten our tooth brushes most hotels we have stayed in have them in the bathroom just in case But never mind we went to chemist and brought two more   The hotel and staff are excellent great location the room was great and the staff really were brilliant we will be back

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James
Full_Review: Its very expensive for what it is but that is London air conditioning was hard to adjust and entire hotel was too cold perhaps the heat wave was too much   Friendly and very helpful staff nice rooms excellent restaurant great location

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James
Full_Review: Mature couple like us needed a double bed instead of twin bed although I wouldn t blame the hotel as it was absolutely my mistake at the time of booking  Excellent location

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James
Full_Review: Nothing   Outstanding service room serviced on demand numerous times a day Room highly luxurious both sophisticated but welcoming as was the rest of the hotel Food in the Blue Boar Restaurant was phenomenal maybe a bit pricey but it is central London Baggage storage on checkout very efficient Room service prompt and high quality Staff friendly and welcoming Had a brilliant stay

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James
Full_Review: Nothing  Great location Excellent staff happy to help in every way It was my birthday so we got an upgrade and complimentary wine delivered to our door Lovely surprise Would definitely stay again

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James
Full_Review: Small rooms and very small GYM not many options in breakfast buffet   Opposite to the underground station many coffee shops around very clean rooms and comfortable beds

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James
Full_Review: It was not that special for the price   Good location right next to the St James station The rooms were modern with good showers The public areas were very fancy and nice Free nespresso and water were a bonus

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James
Full_Review: Extremely expensive but the pricing was probably justified based on the quality of the rooms and services Some of the features of the guest rooms require an instruction manual Toilet too high   Well appointed guest rooms with every feature you might need great shower Coffee machine

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James
Full_Review: It s hard to get a cup of complimentary coffee in the morning or as an American to get ice in the evening The hotel should have coffee and tea readily available in the lobby Fortunately there is a Pret and an espresso bar next door I had to beg from the concierge room for ice and was gifted with about 6 little cubes each night The bathroom doors are heavy sliding things and the showers leak into the bathroom Minor annoyances it s still a very nice hotel   The Conrad is in a great location and is very clean and classy looking The rooms are quiet and well maintained It s fairly expensive but not obscenely so like the most famous London hotels generally are

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James
Full_Review: The hotel over charged me for my room rate by 100 When I questioned the hotel they claimed it wasn t there fault dispite my bank statement showing the hotel name They offered no explanation as to why forcing me to go back and forward on the phone to booking com and the hotel The Hilton Conrad are a huge corporation and they could have refunded me my money but they were uninterested not what I would expect from this type of hotel Thankfully booking com were helpful and refunded me the difference

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James
Full_Review: Nothing bad  Everything was amazing The staff is so nice Location was perfect We could walk to almost everything and the metro is right across the street for the things we didnt want to walk to

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James
Full_Review: Front desk staff foreign and not easy to understand Difficult to hear what was being said in reception sound echoed   The location just opposite St James tube station and very central for the west end Rooms very comfortable although the bathrooms were huge which took a lot of space from the bedroom

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James
Full_Review: Poor lighting in breakfast area and breakfast very expensive Description of beers in the bar as craft is taking the Micky and very misleading

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James
Full_Review: Needed more staff in the bar at night to cope with the amount of guests   Everything was perfect The room was immaculate spacious and modern Air con was spot on compared to other 5 star hotels which are often temperamental Shower was amazing excellent water pressure Plenty of towels changed twice daily if needed Great TV and media hub Nespresso coffee maker and plenty of complimentary water still and sparkling Breakfast was delicious and plentiful especially homemade toasted granola Bar great place for a quick meal or snack Will definitely return our favorite hotel in London

Hotel_Name: Conrad London St James
Full_Review: there was nothing not to like  6 Star I can t speak highly enough of them and I have stayed at some amazing hotels around the world Nothing is too much trouble This team is on your side so awesome From Reception A young lady to be so proud of so welcoming accommodating delightful I have been to many serious hotels ok let s name drop the savoy the ritz the Palace the ritz Carlton Singapore and Dubai The Conrad St James is Outstanding The best Hotel I have stayed at in London Well done I m so grateful you exist The Conrad Highly recommended the grange st Paul s you have so much to learn best contact these guys for guidance and advice The concierge chaps You guys are so awesome I don t know if people tell you but you do such a great job It is so pleasing to See You don t judge me when I don t have a tip for you Regardless you ll get me a taxi you treat me so well I m glad I was able to show my appreciation as I left London I met fellow guests in the bar they were just as complementary on the high standard the Conrad offered If hotels want to be great they should contact the Conrad st James for the book of how to do it Did I mention that I have flown all over the world and stayed at many a hotel
