Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: Really far away from centre but I suppose that s why it is cheaper than others and travelling about the city is all part of the experience too We stayed on a ground floor room and returned one evening to find two strangers were in the room who promptly jumped out when we walked in Nothing was stolen I think we caught them just in time so it was more a strange experience than a frightening one Paris is not the same as it was just 2 years ago because of the terror threat   Hotel was clean and modern Staff were friendly and helpful Really cheap Only place we had been to on this trip which had its own fridge which was a bonus

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: Nothing   Easy to get to by car plus parking on site Family friendly Lovely suites and metro just 10 minute walk away that s get you to the centre of Paris with no hassle

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: The area wasn t great but we knew that when we booked perfect location for access to metro and roads   Near metro shopping centre and access to main road round Paris

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: The hotel was located in a rough area The first day we walked outside to get food as the hotel had no restaurant and we had stuff thrown at us we were recorded and had people shout things at us all within a few steps away from the hotel There is a metro station about 5 minutes away from the hotel but we were unable to use it as it was too dangerous to walk We ended up using Uber s to and from the hotel and even the drivers were reluncant to drive here and had a few drivers cancel on us because of this The drivers that did pick us up all told us not to stay out late and get back and stay in the hotel room Really wouldn t recommend the hotel to anyone especially tourists of family s and groups of young girls The location of the hotel did ruin our trip as we couldn t stay out late because of how bad the area was meaning we were back by our hotel at 7 every night There is meant to be a super market near by but every time we tried to find it someone would make us feel uncomfortable so we had to go back to the hotel The hotel it s self was nice the staff were okay and rooms were really nice however drivers told us this hotel is used for prostitution so really wouldn t recommend to families   The room was great especially for the price we payed

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: Shower cabin looks like a boat module We were expecting a bit more quality here Disappointed by the quality of the breakfast overpriced no refill There is no kitchen in this hotel which is out of the city come back with full stomach Staff was not really inviting   Last minute trip to Paris by car this hotel in near the peripherique belt around Paris and easily accessible by car with a secure car park Rooms are big and very comfortable and we were surprised by the quality of the noise reduction Good beds Novotel standards The location is not touristic at all but near one of the best subway line and easily reachable with a VTC by night

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: Pretty much everything in an awful area not safe to walk home from metro at night Beds are so uncomfortable Air conditioning was worthless also  Staff were nice in fairness

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: All good Receptionists hotel staff attentive and helpful to all your needs great or small May need to get order takeaways food or choose to go to any of array of european world cuisine nearby   Spacious family business person friendly with well ventilated bright en suite rooms with large comfortable bed sofa bed large study desk wall shelfs angle poised lamp x2 inbuilt wardrobes large bathroom shower separate small toilet Huge TV channels Shop eat till you drop multiethnic european african asian arabian area friendly safe area at least while there with massive shopping complex and fantastic huge 3day global market in large car park in front of hotel Receptionists fabulous and helpful as were the chambermaids who cleaned rooms virtually daily Excellent transport nearby Places to eat relax in large lounge breakfast area by reception and adjoining bedecked back garden

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: Location too far from anywhere Across from market on weekend dirty difficut access with cars blocking roads   Rooms were spacious comfortable

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: Aircondition in one of our two rooms was not working and reparation was delayed three days without result Then we shifted to another room with the same problem Bad service Incidence of weekly street market which lies just beside the hotel was unfortunately unlucky for us because of a lot of noise and traffic problems

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: The location was feeling unsafe due to the markets put up in front the hotel staff were rude and unfriendly we had room cleaning done while we were away and put the DND sign on the door we were made to wait 4hours for the room when we reached the place   Nothing

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: The staffs communication and the booking process I booked three nights for 4 pax which I suppose it should be 4 person in one room because it s a 4 pax suite indicated on the booking com website through booking com On arrival the lady who assisted us gave us two suite room which can fit in 8pax and didn t explain further When I queried about the numbers of room that i booked she just told us that was what showed in their system and said that i only requested adjoining room We accepted what the lady said since we already there and just paid for the amount that she asked me to pay and unfortunately I didnt check through the bill statements and happily moved in to our rooms Everything went smooth on the 1st and 2nd days however we realized one of our rooms card been deactivated on the day that before checking out I went to the front counter and query but the process was very unprofessional The guy who assisted me told me that i didnt pay for the room and that s why the card had been deactivated It surprised me How can i just paid for one room instead since i settled the bill on arrival in the hotel Why the lady who assisted me didn t charge the bill properly in the first place The guy asked me to bring the bill statement down and showed it to him then I realized that only one room had been charged for the last night At the end i need to settle the bill again Something came into my mind maybe that s actually what I booked from booking com 1 suite room and i just don t understand how s their process In such a big hotel company I believe it should have a very well organized operating system and well trained staffs to assist their customers to enjoy their stays with them Even though this is just a minor mistake or miscommunication but it is good enough to cause unpleasant experience to the customers Thank you   The room is very clean cosy and the bed is comfy

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: Air conditioning did not work all three days The management did nothing about it just claiming it was working fine We reported all three days in the morning and night In response we got fans Not a 4 star if we have to use fans in the middle of summer  Comfortable bed Clean room Toilet and Bath seperated

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: Outside of the hotel it was dirty streets were dirty walls full of graffiti propanda and the smells from the sewers were bad The people were very diverse in terms of the very poor and the working class and middle eastern dominant   Inside the hotel spacious modern reception area with garden Air conditioning hot and cold water espresso machine tea cookies bottled water for the guests in the rooms amazing free breakfast for young kids

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: We booked specifically 2 adjoining rooms were we thought that those were two rooms which had a door in between to adjoin them only to find out that it was just simply two rooms next to each other without a door to connect them Coffee in the room was for free but they only had paper cups and no spoons Parking was 15 per day not per night too expensive for that part of Paris   The rooms were very comfortable new and clean

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: Unfriendly staff overall Specially one of their night evening supervisor named Namakan He is non cooperative and rude Other than that even location of hotel is not good highly unsafe

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: The staff was very unprofessional at first too many systematic mistakes They gave us a wrong room number were we entered to a room full of guests They denied the fact that we requested an early check in even after we showed them the email They denied the collaboration between them and booking com The room they gave us was very smelly Furthermore we requested a taxi from the hotel they delayed the process The overall staff was very unprofessional unlike other novotel staff in other countries

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: Not having a restaurant on site although breakfast refrigerated food available in large foyer and tabled garden   Large size and well designed room with nice bathroom shower separate mini toilet large comfortable bed sofa bed built in kitchenette with daily supply of coffee tea chocolate and biscuits and microwave mini fridge as well as large study table lamp shelves ample storage spaces large TV Receptionists and staffs pleasant and helpful Major shopping complex and train stations nearby with 3day weekly large multicultural market in large car park especially very good

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: No plates for breakfast put food on serviette on tray Bit noisey and untidy on weekend but ideal if you like markets   Good parking nice room and staff

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: Breakfast could be a bit better   Clean rooms Good location Relative close to a Metro station with direct link to center and easy to change for Disneyland even with kids Nice parking and not too expensive

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: The receptionist of the check in was not friendly as we expected The comunication with him was difficult and he doesn t made effort to really help us They neex to improve it   Cool appartment Just like the photos Well located It is close to a train station and mealing area The guy who did the check out was veey friendly

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: Horrible neighborhood they didn t have keys to the rooms so they had to let you in when you came and went Breakfast was 15 per person   It was a relatively new facility they had a few nice additions in the works

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: The rooms were not temperature controlled We were moved twice and none of the 3 rooms we were moved to had a working thermostat Based on the reaction from the maintenance individual this was normal and my understanding was a complaint they rarely had to do much about as their culture doesn t make much use of AC As I understand it this particular Novotel is used mostly by local business individuals and not foreign vacationers There are some plumbing issues In the third room we were moved to we often heard the water gurgling back up the drains of our sinks and bathtubs after we flushed a toilet or ran shower bath One day in particular the smell of urine was pretty strong in both the toilet room and shower room I would agree with many others that the pictures are a misrepresentation of what you are actually getting Additionally I agree this is really a 3 star hotel not a 4   There was a market across the street for several days which provided some fun shopping experience I will say that the market does leave behind a LOT of trash at the end of each day but it gets cleaned It didn t bother us in the least The staff was friendly most of the time The beds were very comfortable There have been several ppl stating they felt this area was unsafe We never felt unsafe at any time

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: I stayed at the Novotel Suites Montreuil one week with my disabled boyfriend I honestly don t know how this hotel could be a 4 stars hotel Rooms are not well manteined not clean bath and shower were stained and not clean The area is very shady and sketchy not good for walking or wandering around especially for girls There is no restaurant in the hotel and is very difficult to find a good one around There is also no service whatever you need towels soap etc you need to go down to reception ask for it and get it yourself Cleaning ladies would just come into the room without even knocking they did so repeatedly one morning they came in 5 times despite we told them not to The personnel at the reception changes a lot and apart from one nice blond lady the rest of them were not helpful not kind not nice I definitely wouldn t suggest this hotel to anyone Bad bad experience

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: The location is not the best I knew it from before so I researched the metro services Metro service took me to A to Z   Clean safe worth the money and it s easy to travel to Direct bus from the CGD airport Metro station 10minutes walk away Good staff

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: The 1st Point of conctact the receptionist blond young lady was unwelcoming Unprofessional and her customer service was far below average not reflecting the Hotel true 4 Stars Standard at all the Rest of staff either at reception or housekeeping were polite genuine and helpful  The bath Comfy beds and the room was spacious modern and clean Safe carpark

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: Place is near a parking lot cum market which is a bit shabby and smelly some times   Speacious room for my family of 3 Comfortable bed Clean bathroom Accessible my metro with a of about 7 minutes

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: The breakfast could have been better and my friends did not find their single mattresses and pillows as comfy as the double bed was Other than that we had a great stay as there was loads of places we could go to eat and the metro was easy to find   The rooms were spacious the fact that it had a market area in front of the hotel was a good thing as we were able to buy some of our gifts from there and other things It had a little front garden and a small beach area which was quite chilling and relaxing

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: Rooms could have been maintained better and would ve have been nicer Many things were slightly broken in our room our toilet wouldn t flush this was fixed our bathtub would not hold water the shower head was broken and would fall off its mount etc Further there is little individual climate control in the rooms Since the heat was still on high we were forced to leave our windows open to cool it down which makes the rooms very noisy from nearby autoroute and morning markets   The staff was helpful and allowed us to check in early The bed was comfortable and the rooms a good size enough to comfortably fit a small family and had a small refrigerator Metro was close as was a grocery store

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: They added on a fee of around 20 euros when I initially paid for my room for something called city tax which is something I have never heard of and should definitely have been advertised in the price Replacement items were extortionately expensive if you wanted an extra tea bag that they replaced daily anyway it cost 3 euros for a single tea bag which is absolutely ridiculous Felt like a very dangerous area too lots of homeless around and not close to any sights   Room was very clean came with a kettle and a microwave which was useful Also provide a coffee machine and 3 coffee packets too

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: Nespresso machine in the room is a bonus I ve stayed here 3 times now and it had beengreat I had some troubles and although the blonde girl at reception was very very rude the manager Mme Fourone was excellent and helpful I would stay there again for sure

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: Location was in front of a very disgusting flea market Trash was everywhere Individuals were trying very hard to solicit business at the flea market   5Min walk to Metro Location was next to grocery store and small mall Parking was only 15Euros

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: Everything the staff was arrogant way too expensive hotel the location is remote the facilities are really bad the room felt like a oven very hot and the air conditioner did not work the hotel staff was arrogant and did not help resolve the issue The breakfast spread was really bad for 15 euros one can get much better bfast anywhere else I would never recommend this hotel to anyone and I would file a case against the hotel and demand a refund   Nothing

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: Pollution due to being right next to the motorway Dirty run down area Bed was not very comfortable Air conditioning did not work in our room   Staff were friendly

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: The location sucks If you like to walk out of your hotel and explore Paris this isn t for you We requested a wheelchair accessible room and the hotel accommodated us accordingly however the bathroom in our room would flood every time someone showered Without 800 1000 towels per day the floor would be too slippery and unsafe to walk on particularly if you re mobility impaired   The room was clean and comfortable and the amenities were fantastic The breakfast was not too bad either Metro was a short walk from hotel which was handy

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: No smart tv Couldn t understand what was being said on TV Area Outside property not clean rubbish outside off putting  Liked hotel bed room nice and comfortable Had everything you could need

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: There is a market outside of the hotel which durin the day is quite nice but very dirty after   Beds were extremely comfy bathroom was exceptionally clean Staff were extremely friendly and helpful There is a motorway right across the road but from the rooms it can t be heard

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: The location neighborhood was in a more commercial kind of ghetto area There was a market across the street which made it very difficult to travel in and out of the parking garage Upon arrival we had some difficulty communicating and getting into the garage with the staff which was frustrating The hotel was overpriced We paid for a superior suite but the room was quite small There were also hole designs in the doors to the bathrooms which was quite weird and didn t allow for ANY privacy

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: We booked a non smoking room but we were placed in the pro smoking floor they changed our room after we asked In addition smoke and weed smoke was passing through doors so consistently that we could not sleep We still do not understand why we could smell weed scent also in the non smoking room The bathrooms were also stinky as if they were not used much The moquette was dirty   Rooms were large The personnel was helpful and kind All the towels and sheets were very clean

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: The position of the hotel is in a strange area of Paris A lot of weird persons are in the area but the hotel itself its protected by the hotel staff It s very recommended that you book your room with parking included It s not adviced to park outside   The beds were incredible good The food was ok

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: Clean comfy secure parking great value for money great location metro line 9 just around the corner if you get of at trocadero you come out to see amazing views of Eiffel Tower

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: We had a really bad experience we paid 284 to stay two nights with 5 people and two dogs which was 2 rooms that was not a problem We had a good time so we decided to stay an extra night which i paid 137 for the same two rooms for the night The next day after we get back to the hotel we were asked to paid for an extra 137 because the staff made a mistake and only booked us for a one room I explain to staff that I paid for the same two rooms the day before which i had my receipt and we asked to talk to a manager to straight it out and the staff refuse basically we were told to pay for their mistake or get out this really turn our family vacation negatively We had to get our stuff an leave the hotel because I refuse to pay for their mistake the staff was really rude and didn t care to help us   It was clean

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: Wifi was only in the lobby which was a little annoying though not really an issue   The facilities are excellent and the staff were very nice It was very clean and reasonably easy to travel around They also have a shuttle which was pretty convenient

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: The rooms were amazing It is near by to the metro station The flea market opposite to the hotel is amazing to walk The staff was very friendly and i will recommend it to others for the stay

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: When we were there it was very hot and air condition was not working staff did not help at all and was just saying sorry could not sleep whole night and when requested for fan was given next day manager promised a c will be repaired but it did not happen and was like I am sorry so I would not recommend this place in summer if you are looking for pleasant sleep The room on my side was very noisy   Room was ok clean had microwave and coffee machine which very rare

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: TRAP This hotel deserves a 2 or maximum 3 stars The location is super bad The reception is smelly The breakfast is poor If you think this is a 4 star hotel think again

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: The location is very bad it s in front of a big nasty flea market Attached photos from my window in the 9th floor On my arrival there was a big fight related to this flea marked which scared the people in the street and it was big that it even blocked the street for cars to pass It vanished in minutes but the experience was horrible On one night a fire alarm was triggered at 2am It woke the whole hotel up in a horrifying way and the situation wasn t handled that good I had a terrible sleep that night and a bad day at work in the next morning   The room was clean and very quite I was in the 9th floor Carrefour is so close to the hotel Metro Line 9 Station Porte de Montreuil is 8 minutes walk from the hotel NOTE The hotel is located east of Paris so plan your trip well as it maybe far from your needs For example it will take you around 50 minutes to reach Eiffel Tower by Metro

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: The location is slightly off the city centre u need to change 2 trains station area looks dodgy especially in the night ii gets scary if u r with family Also the bathroom n toilet doors r funny they don t have lock from inside and has a big hole which acts like a handle right in the middle which is embarrassing when u have kids staying with u  Liked the rooms they r quite different compared to most hotels It s a cute little hotel Carrefour n a mall is next door

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: The sofabed wasn t exactly comfortable pictures on site aren t a true representation room is smaller than what was expected   Near the metro station Back garden nice place to chill Staff are friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: very good stay at the hotel very comfortable neat and clean rooms and very spacious staff is very friendly and cooperative i left my laptop charger in the room itself on checkout have sent an email to the hotel for the same hope to receive it back would certainly recommend this hotel has good metro connections to major parts of the cities direct line to eiffel tower and champs elyssees

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: Location was a bit scary A market in the carpark opposite the hotel which left a horrible mess when they left Not sure I would wonder around after dark on my own in this location When the room States single and sofa bed it s not actually another bed it s a Matress stuffed under the sofa bed   It was really easy to get to the subway station which could take you anywhere Some lovely little restaurants about The room was spacious and clean A supermarket like a two minute walk Good wifi Was a lovely room all in all

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: No information of hotel facilities in the room Hotel common areas and lifts need a little refurbishment  Friendly staff nice room very clean good breakfast good location

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: The area is a little rough at first on the weekends a giant Flea Market arrives in the parking lot across from the hotel This brings a lot of peddlers with items that look suspiciously like stolen goods This threw off my liking of the area as it brought a lot of people to the area who looked up to no good The location is a bit far from all of the sights but the metro is just around the corner and with a navigo pass it is easy to get around Also the workout room only had 4 cardio machines and a pushup ladder Nothing serious can go on in here unless you just want to run   The room was massive and had everything I wanted The staff are so very nice and accommodating In French or English they can assist you well The breakfast was delicious The room cleaning staff were predictable and very thorough They always did a good job at keeping my room clean and fresh The shower is big the bathtub was sufficient and the bathroom was just overall nice The TV has alot of channels too something a previous hotel lacked

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: We came back after a long day to find the room to our door propped wide open The area is really bad Room service ignores the do not disturb signs   The staff was friendly and the room was big and quiet The beds are comfy Close to Metro 9 The breakfast was worth paying 15 to have an easy start to the day

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: Worst Hotel Ever If you know what s good for you and value your hard earned money you will heed this warning This hotel was dirty location was horrible right next to a freeway and a dirty flee market I think this might be where the Paris ghetto is It s far from the city center airport and train stations Had to make at least 3 transfers to get to the major attractions The employees were very rude The door to the fitness room there was one thread mill inside the fitness room wasn t working There was no way to control the temperature in the room We had to open up the only working window which wasn t a great idea since our room was facing the busiest freeway in Paris So we pretty much didn t sleep The bed was so uncomfortable nasty stains on the carpet and the entire room was disgusting It was so horrible that we didn t even stayed the second night even though we paid for 3 nights I didn t even care that I lost my money the room was prepaid in the process I feared for my safety I should have taken pictures of the inside of the property but I couldn t get out there fast enough   I didn t like anything on this property

Hotel_Name: Novotel Suites Paris Montreuil Vincennes
Full_Review: The area was right next to a giant flea market There were vans everywhere from dawn and we had to pick our way through the stalls to get to the underground station On the Saturday night there was a massive traffic jam because it s right on the roundabout for the ring road There was quite a lots of noise early in the morning too   The room was great with lots of space and very comfortable beds There was a big Carrefour supermarket next door so we could buy anything we needed

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: I asked for accessible rooms as guests were elderly My husband was unable to use the shower in our room as it was over a bath My mother could not work the shower in her room no instructions   The location was excellent the staff were efficient and curtious

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: A little disappointed with the overall standard of breakfast Hot food looking tired dry A lack of tomatoes and attention in keeping the service area looking fresh and attractive I appreciate that as a professional Trainer and Assessor in the hospitality trade maybe a factor I would suggest that the executive chef pays some attention to ensure the standard is maintained and of a consistent standard for this element of food service provided The quality and exceptional standard of food served in the snack area the previous afternoon was superb Presentation and texture and flavour of each dish was brilliant and the tall young male server paid particular attention in meeting needs of customers in a polite and courteous manner which was exceptional   Attention to detail of the staff at reception and in the terrace bar was exactly as expected and appreciated

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The buffet dinner was expensive for what was provided and then a surprise Service Charge was added For a self service buffet it s a bit of an insult   Very comfortable and so well prepared for the Prudential London Surrey cyclists secure bike store in the ballroom very knowledgeable bike mechanic on duty maps to get to the Olympic Park 20 minutes ride away cyclist breakfast from 4 00 am cyclists buffet dinner or Italian restaurants few minutes walk away fast checkout The bed was very comfortable the hotel was located in a very convenient position for this cycling event it was quite expensive but worth it for the convenience and service The bike mechanic Steve was excellent nothing too much trouble and he gave great easy directions to the Olympic Park

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: We couldn t fault anything   Our stay at the Marriot was very comfortable 1st class All staff very helpful and attentive always smiling to Most enjoyable and would certainly love to stay there stay again Highly recommend it

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: we really didn t enjoy the breakfast which was a shame As it was kindly added to our booking to enjoy The croissants were stale the eggs were cooked in a horrible buttery fat which is all you could taste so ruined the rest of the breakfast on the plate I went to use the serviette it was filthy huge coffee stains over it someone surely noticed this as it was folded round the cutlery should never have been put on the table Not enough tables long wait staff didn t return with clean napkin Would go elsewhere for breakfast now   Nice rooms good location in Canary Wharf we had a river view room which was really nice the staff were really nice adhered to my requests Have stayed at the Marriott before

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The Wi fi was poor for us to use especially in our room The person on the desk could not sort it out for us We had to go to the local pub to use the Wi fi  The location of of the hotel

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: upon arrival it wasn t made clear that you would automatically be charged for touching something in the mini bar i had to read about it then ask staff to make sure that it wasn t credited to my room   Bed was comfy room was spacious and staff were friendly

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Bought a late night gin and tonic at the bar which was a lovely bar but wasn t expecting the shot of gin to cost 13 That s a bit much for my liking will be checking the cost of the drink before purchase on our next visit   Bed was very comfortable staff were very helpful friendly and welcoming the place was spotlessly clean

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: 12 5 Service charge on a self service evening meal put on for the riders was a little steep Especially when we had to ask for drinks   We were there for London Prudential Ride 100 First class service which included an onsite bike mechanic Also had a welcome pack Staff could not have been more accommodating Would use this hotel for the event every time

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Check in was around 15 14 somewhat unacceptable given terms and conditions Abrupt and insensitive if not downright rude security staff Complained to Reception about extremely off hand attitude of staff shocking behaviour to guest on return to hotel Saturday evening   Beds very comfortable as was room

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: After a stressful long journey to reach the hotel experiencing top quality service on arival was amazing I was taking part in Ride London the concierge lifted my bike out of the car and checked my partner in whilst I parked the car They placed my bike in the ball room on a stand with a mechanic and all the tools to prepare for the race All the staff were helpful giving leaflets of race info there was a special event evening meal and breakfast Marriot could not have been better Thank you for taking the time and putting in the effort to look after the riders Really well done

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: I always love staying at the Marriott WIQ especially if we get a good deal and can afford a club room The staff are perfect and I have never had anything to complain about

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The shower didn t have much strength and the bath filled up whilst washing   The bed was comfortable and the black out curtains made it easy to sleep The view from our room was very good

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The staff on front desk were so helpful and kind my daughter was unwell so we stayed another night there was no problem finding us another room Before we left they sent a tray of biscuits to our room so thoughtful Can t thank everyone enough would love to stay again

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Queue for the bar only one staff member   Attended the Guns n Roses gig at The London Stadium great location great transport links arrived back at the hotel quite late hence the use of room service which was excellent waiter very pleasant would definitely stay again

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The standard of the Deluxe room we booked was quite poor in comparison to other hotels of this rating  The hotels location was superb and had extremely good access to the DLR The bar food menu was very good The steak Sandwich was superb

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: no onsite parking and low level of off site valet parking made it hard for us   Chocolate cake was left in the room for my wife as it was her birthday nice touch

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Liked the area Very clean with plenty of activity Right on the DLR for quick access Beautiful surroundings Also like the more generous room size   Excellent attentive and knowledgable staff They went out of their way to recommend alternative transport to central London River Bus which turned out to be an excellent choice Also removed the internet charged caused by incorrect registration of internet services our fault Have already recommended to friends

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Hotel booked for weekend in London to see The Killers at Hyde Park Chose hotel in this area as easy access from London City Airport via DLR couple minutes walk from Poplar or West India Quay and only five minutes walk to Canary Wharf underground for Jubilee line in to City Room was large with king sized bed and excellent buffet breakfast included in room rate

Full_Review: We booked 2 rooms with friends our friend had the room closest the the DLR no view and noisy We had a disabled room which we did not request the bathroom was not clean and very tired smelt of drains and right opposite the lift Honestly I think we got the worst 2 rooms in the hotel and it was a special weekend away We could have stayed somewhere else and paid less and got better rooms   Breakfast

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The pillows were so soft and comfortable the staff were always happy to help and went the extra mile to make sure that the surprised I had for my partner were perfect and just how I d asked for them

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The only thing that I did not like were the pillows they could have been firmer for my taste But it is a very small negative  We have stayed at this hotel many times The reason we come here it is because it a great hotel The room have just been refurbished since our last visit and they look great There is everything you need at this hotel The staff are really friendly and professional and cannot do enough for you Great atmosphere The breakfast was great

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: nothing superb   room fantastic all the little extras executive room floor 8 space in room good reception staff accommodating friendly and helpful canary wharf loads of pubs cafes etc and a view of a huge yacht shopping centre close by to hotel cineworld round the hotel s corner breakfast was superb 5 all the way everything you could want and more ie chef made pancakes and omelettes with choices of fillings and toppings eat as much as you wanted booking a room go with breakfast included option perfect

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Very quiet room and very comfortable bed Air con worked very well so room perfect temp Ordered room service after midnight and very efficient delivery of wings and chips Staff friendly and plentiful Have stayed before here and loved it Got reasonable rate so used again Lovely area with many bars and restaurants along the canal

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Our bags were not waiting us in the room as promised There were not enough towels for everyone There was a mix up in the information wether we had breakfast or not All of these were sorted but it was a husttle I didnt need The decore was old

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The fact that an Executive Room was booked over six months ago yet when my partner arrived they were told that the room was unavailable because it was being decorated Why did they not notify anyone To add insult they knocked just 50 off the 245 room rate When I checked other sites for the room they had it was cheaper then 195 charged Disgraceful way to act particularly as I had phoned the hotel on the Friday morning to see if I could pay as this stay was part of a present and was told it was not possible but having given them my details not a single word to say that the room booked was not going to be available   The location

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The bar service was awful The hotel was full Robbie Williams concert amongst others things so when everyone returned at the same time there were only 2 staff on who were not the fastest 20 mins to get served   breakfast had good selection

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Pillows were too soft No cushions Insufficient tea and coffee and only one biscuit in a double room 4th floor room was very noisy from trains going past and glazing did not mute noise 24 hour room service menu had little choice and no sandwiches available Bar was crowded with poor service Breakfast is too expensive at almost 25pounds   Location on the Quay is good but our room was too close to the DLR Cold drink on arrival and reception staff were friendly and helpful Room was good size

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The pillows weren t the best for me but that s personal choice   Staff were fantastic lovely breakfast with lots of choice big room extra toiletries provided easy to get to from kings cross and good location for Olympic park

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The added discretionary charge for everything from room service to just ordering a drink at the bar Surely tipping should be decided by the customer kind of awkward telling staff to take the charge off Especially when just buying a drink every round an extra 12 5 It wouldn t be such an issue if the drink prices in London weren t already ridiculously high   The rooms were beautiful and the staff friendly and attentive The location was perfect for our trip

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The only complaint I would make was the wifi did not connect in our room and the phone signal was very poor It wasn t a huge problem as we were out most of the time but if I was staying for business I would have asked to change room   Staff were excellent very friendly and attentive Location great for our concert and the overall hotel was very nice

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Seriously 24 95 for a breakfast I don t mind paying a premium but not 3 times what you would pay elsewhere 20 50 for two drinks at the bar blatant rip off

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
