Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: No dedicated car park although a small discount is offered on the nearby public car park   Excellent staff Excellent location Excellent breakfast Concierge Security concious

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Room keys were programmed wrong and didn t work Toilet broke with running water all night Nothing offered after complaint   Restaurants close to the hotel Canary Wharf tube station 5 minute walk away

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Bar prices were expensive long queue at the bar not enough seating and not enough bar staff   Room was comfortable and clean In room facilities has mini bar toiletries iron hairdryer and ice bucket Great tasty choice at breakfast

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: It was cold in the night for me and friend said the same Did not asked me am I with car and did not write my car reg nr Could be cheaper car park Breakfet was included in booking room but still gave me receipt to sign   Excellent staff Thank you It was very nice place If will be necessary I will stay again there

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: there wasn t anything that I didn t like all positive  Loved the location as I ve never stayed in Docklands before the staff were very friendly and the room was extremely comfortable Breakfast was superb it was outstanding value for money

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Nothing at all  Staff were very good asked for an extension to check out and offered with no issue at all Very friendly asking about a sporting event we were attending and shortly after check in delivered a goody bag full of running athletic related gifts and drinks

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: My only slight dislike was that the pillows although nice and deep are way too soft for my preference which as a side sleeper meant that I needed 3 pillows to achieve the correct height to support my head and neck The downside to this was that due to how deep yet soft and puffy the pillows are I ended up with my head deeply recessed in the pile of pillows which at times felt a little claustrophobic On the plus side though at least they felt generally comfortable and didn t make my neck ache In the great scheme of things though it was a fairly minor thing and in fairness to the hotel it s possible that if I d asked they may have been able to supply firmer pillows I don t know if that s the case though as when we arrived back at the hotel it was late and I was tired so just wanted to sleep Therefore I didn t actually ask   We were there for the Saturday Iron Maiden concert and so I really liked how close the hotel is to the O2 Arena Just a short walk and a single stop on the tube and we were there That meant that the return journey was quick and effortless when we were tired and aching The beds were very comfortable and the room had air conditioning which on such a warm day was very welcome I was there with my 16 year old Son and I felt completely safe walking through the area late at night on our way back to the hotel The area in general has a nice relaxing and safe feel to it and I would definitely feel happy to stay there again Another bonus was that the hotel felt safe and secure The lifts to the guest floors are accessed by using the key card to your room and so can t be accessed by anyone who isn t a guest Plus at night there is someone at the door checking key cards to ensure only guests can access the lobby

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The restaurant isn t big enough for the size of the hotel on the Saturday morning we had to wait in a queue to be seated  Our complimentary room upgrade

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The only downside I suppose would have been the parking for the hotel It is not clear upon arrival where you need to park and was a little expensive I would suggest making that clear to customers upon booking   We were given a complimentary upgrade upon arrival which was a lovely surprise and the room was a very good size The bed especially was one of the most comfortable beds I ve slept on at a hotel for a while

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: It took a loooooooooooong time to get our keys as rooms weren t ready  The view from the window as we were on the 7th floor otherwise you will see just office building windows

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: We booked a 2 nights stay at this hotel for the weekend of our wedding Although the wedding ceremony and reception was not held in the hotel the staff still upgraded us when they learned we were there for our wedding Also on the wedding day when we came back to the hotel for the night we were happily surprised to find roses petals all over our bed with some petals arranged to draw a heart They also left us a plate of strawberries covered in chocolate It was all really nice attentions for us and we truly appreciated the gesture and our stay at the hotel Thanks again

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The only small thing was how finicky the lift operation was   Great location London centre easily accessible via DLW or tube We had a waterside room stunning views Several great restaurants nearby and a shopping centre short walk away Very helpful staff and beautiful rooms

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Very good for Business Trips when needing to go to Canary Wharf but a little too far away from the downtown Restaurants and Pubs   Nice clean place big windows comfortable beds

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Lounge for a drink when returning back to the hotel The location Even though not central it s easy to get to on Jubilee line and the restaurants around the hotel are a good selection

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Noisy with trains passing the window until late and start again early Breakfast which I had been looking forward to was ok bit nothing special We were short coffee in our room teaspoons at breakfast etc There could have been more attention to detail considering what we paid 3 out of 5   I liked the position of the property and it was very clean with helpful staff

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Poor view of Freeway No robes or slippers Windows had black tape to secure in place Not what you expect from a 4 5 star hotel Kettle wasnt working

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Check in was most difficult one I ever had in last 30 years with at least 6 months per year travelling globaly As one of the international hotel chain they didnt accept any cash payment except Pound Manager didnt show up Very unfriendly unflexible and arrogant receptionist as he was looking just to stress guest All this in London This shows clearly Management weekness at this Hotel If our international meeting wasn t held here I would not stay a minute

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Nothing it was a beautiful hotel with friendly helpful staff and the price was excellent   I have a difficult diet vegan the chef was wonderful and cooked me a beautiful breakfast each morning

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Nothing   We stayed here overnight for the London Marathon my daughter participated in it to raise money for her Charity Project Sulangan for the deprived children in a village in the Philippines The hotel was brilliant The staff could not do enough for us and the runners of the marathon from the atmosphere to the food everything were geared for the marathon runners We checked out after breakfast on the morning of the marathon they offered us if we would like to come back to freshen up The location along the river next door to the train just perfect If we go to London for a weekend this would be perfect away from the hectic hustle and bustle of the city yet just a few minutes on the train perfect

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Staff knew we were there for London Marathon Found out too late they had special pasta buffet in restaurant that night specially for Marathon runners Also found out after leaving that Marathon runners were given a free gift goodie bag but we didn t get anything Also disappointed to see room prices that weekend hiked due to London Marathon All hotels doing this some tripling prices but this was the cheapest which is why we booked here   Had a free upgrade to a lovely room on arrival We stayed as I was running the London Marathon the next day Special early breakfast for all runners was excellent Doorman ordering taxis was excellent

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: My room faced the DLR railway and a busy main road but apart from the uninteresting view it didn t prevent me from sleeping So I guess that s not really a con   It was the best breakfast I ve had in London in years Excellent choice and quality of food and beverages with delicious pancakes Sitting at a table by the window facing the wharf only improved an already great meal

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Had a disabled room and didn t like the bathroom The info we were given by reception was not fully accurate in describing the facilities in the bathroom   Location comfy bed and the view

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The room was quite dated and had what can only be described as a wind turbine going all day until about 9pm I was advised that it was the fresh air supply and could not be turned off It was extremely loud I did not find the standard of the room to be in keeping with 5 star   Location

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Place is slightly far away from the city centre  Staff was really attentive and friendly we came in from a long train ride from Scotland by the time we reached hotel all of us looked exhausted the staff offered us health club access so that we can take a hot shower really good observation and proactive customer engagement

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: As soon as you get to the hotel they take a deposit off you why i dont know The bedrooms were too warm only air con as windows were locked shut so affected my asthma The breakfast was really unorganized and we felt like we werent wanted asking for things whilst the table next to us got exellent service   The bedroom was really nice with a huge bed large flat screen tv and a good sized bath

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The front entrance is underwhelming with the pained crash barriers partially covered with potted box hedges  Breakfast spread was fabulous Chef was able to offer an excellent vegan cooked breakfast

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The pillows Far too soft Impossible to get a good night s sleep which is a shame as the beds are fabulous Please offer a choice of pillows as standard   The beds NOT including the pillows

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The room was great except it looked like it wasn t used for a while and was very dusty the windows inside were very dirty and no breakfast was included   Fantastic views of Canery Warf

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The rooms are in need of a re vamp they are a little out dated and are showing some signs of use   The location is great just a 5 minutenwalk to the Canary Wharf metro station Also the breakfast is a pure joy with lots of choices sweet and savory

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Although check in was officially from 3pm we could not access our rooms upon arrival We opted to park the car and take a stroll around Upon our return one of our rooms had been allocated to someone else they had been connecting rooms useful for our family and the new room was unacceptable as someone had been smoking profusely in it The initial response was not helpful but customer services did manage to find us a better room to move to Although handled well in the end I was not happy really that the desk staff had flippantly changed our room arrangement and given us a room that no doubt everyone would complain about The cleaning staff need to ensure smoking in the room fines are put into force It rather upset the start of our weekend but was handled well by the staff in the end   The modern part of the hotel facing the quay was excellent The corridors in the older part had also been renovated The bar the restaurant breakfast room were perfect The lobby very stylish and the staff on the whole very professional

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: We had a problem with our bathroom however our complaint was dealt with excellently by the duty manager and it would not stop me visiting the hotel again   Excellent breakfast and very comfortable room All staff we had contact with were very pleasant

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The shower gel  Great location and the bar for food and a drink is fabulous too During my first stay here the breakfast was amazing and it was great this time too

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Location quality of hotel  We asked for an early check in but this wasn t granted ok that s fine but our room still wasn t available at 3pm So we had to insist on another room which was found

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The fact that the breakfast is not included in the room rate is not great it is also very expensive for what s on offer 18 for a continental breakfast is excessive and the pastries station was a let down pastries specifically the chocolate twist was rock hard and stale with a croissant not much better and the cookies under the heater were verging on burnt Add to that the fruit wasn t as fresh as I would expect for that cost with my mother in laws banana rotten and black upon peeling Finally the milk in our room was off but to be fair we didn t tell the hotel until check out   The beds were very comfy and the hotel in an excellent location The bar is lovely serving nice good at a reasonable cost

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: We were there for the London Marathon The staff had hand written notes on gift bags for all of the runners checking in that included items like running gels Epsom salt coconut water water and other snacks Check in time was pretty busy being that there are only so many computers to check people in However those that were not checking people in were going through the line offering mocktails and chocolates while chatting with the guests I also loved how they offered a breakfast early in the morning specific for those running in the marathon and they know how we runners eat breakfast when some people are going to bed from the night before They also had a table of water and bananas in the lobby the morning of the race Just a fantastic place to make us all feel so welcome

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Nothing here i didn t enjoy  staff very welcoming and accommodating rooms excellent and clean breakfast fantastic and the extra bonus goody bag as I was running the marathon was a lovely touch the hotel went out of their way to make sure the marathon runners had everything they needed

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Room was dusty and the hairdryer plug was broken it obviously had not been checked from last occupants But Housekeeping were quick to replace it   Convenience for the DLR and the O2

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Would have been good to have different choices for pillow firmness they were too soft for me as I suffer with neck problems  Complimentary brownies and soft drink on arrival

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Nothing Only thing missing was a swimming pool but doubt we would have got chance to use it   Comfy bed excellent breakfast choice and the complimentary champagne and strawberries added that special touch

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: No option to move to a higher floor unless to a room next to dlr which was told would be noisy No walk in shower  Good wifi staff helpful in setting it up Great location Comfortable bed

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Dated rooms although I think some are being modernised ventilation was noisy in bedroom very poor quality selection at bar and slow service   Location to DLR and underground sense of security and safety on premises bed size and comfort

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: staff kept on asking whether breakfast was included it was and it seemed strange they didn t have it on all their records  great breakfast great bed

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Very attentive staff had to wait a few minutes to check in as it was busy but while waiting we were offered juice and lovely chocolates very comfortable bed we had a great dinner in the restaurant too I was wearing a sling and the waiter discreetly asked if I wanted my steak cut into cubes very kind I was touched by this

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The view wasnt great but that cant be helped An the bar prices are very expensive  Good location an the staff very helpful an welcoming Very clean hotel

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: I think for a five star it could do with a more modern bathroom A few more added extras in the room and at the least sky Also the gym can be a little larger and the sauna didn t work despite telling them twice at the reception The hotel is lovely and staff is good However for the price that s charged I think it can be better or at least be breakfast inclusive at that rate   The place was clean and staff were friendly Also the room had everything that was needed

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Half hour wait for room to be prepared despite booking 12 days in advance beds not that comfortable quite dated decor no hot chocolate or herbal teas in room only one packet of biscuits quality of toiletries all in all not what we expected for 5 Could hear rumble of DLR no view our room overlooked a central roof   Breakfast and staff at breakfast Sound proof from other guests

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Poor quality furnishings in disrepair basic rooms and facilities extortionate bar prices even for a hotel and cold buffet breakfast not often refreshed   Excellent views helpful staff and brilliant location for local bars

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: I didn t like the location and tried to change it to Meriott in downtown area but didn t happen  I liked the staff they were very kind and helpful

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Car parking across the road a bit expensive even by London Standards at 21 a night   Excellent location for the new buzzing East End that is the Canary Wharf area Close to restaurants shopping tube and DLR A very smart hotel with pleasant and courteous staff Quiet location and rooms

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Explaining that the parking would cost 24 a day would have helped although you do get a 3 discount As you pull in by car the hotel is actually obscured by a bush so some additional signage would have helped   Beds were very comfy the reception had the feel of a nightclub but as soon as your reached your room it was dead silent The breakfast was exceptional

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: There was a slight mix up in the complimentary breakfast offered   My friend and I were treated well and rooms were very clean The staff were helpful

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The shower in our room did not work and we did not have time to wait for someone to come and fix it before we had to leave Therefore we were unable to take a shower Also one of our other rooms had a faulty tv but this was rectified quickly There was a good choice of breakfast and the majority of it was excellent However I didn t like the omelettes as a powder mix was used instead of real eggs   The staff were very friendly and always keen to help A good choice for breakfast

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: I personally wouldn t rate the hotel as 5 star 4 star is more appropriate The location is good but there is a restricted service at West India Quay and so Canary Wharf is the more viable stop The room decor is a bit dated looking despite it being a relatively new hotel and I would expect little extras like a bathrobe and slippers at a 5 star hotel and usually a pool The area around the front of the hotel and the station side is in desperate need of sprucing up The back overlooking the dock is lovely though   The staff were friendly and helpful Relatively easy access to central London and very good for Greenwich and South East London

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Hot breakfast was mediocre Lukewarm and undercooked Room was clean but nothing special would expect more of a 5 hotel Overall the hotel is better for business trips rather than leisure   Very comfortable bed

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Restaurant service was awful waited 1hr for our steaks and people who came in up to 45 mins after us were served first to be fair they did drop the service charge   Nice room warm good bathroom dog slow lifts though

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Refused to give me the twin room i booked Made me wait an hour to get twin room then said your not getting twin room Terrible service and never got the room i paid for  Extremely poor service

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: This was one of the worst 5 star experiences I ever had and I stayed in enough hotels to be able to give an objective review I stayed at the Marriott for 5 nights and not one single night could I sleep well the bed was beyond uncomfortable and by far the worst I ever experienced I complained at the reception so they added a topper on my mattress which did not help at all I could feel the springs of the mattress poking my back and the bed looked bent from how worn out the mattress was I had backache every morning in that hotel Apart from the bed the room in general looked very very modest old and worn out I stayed on the 1st floor I could hear people outside especially late at night by the elevator The shower facilities were appalling shower head unscrewing making a loud noise just appalling for the price No special amenities no cotton swabs or slippers or robe Again this all would have been acceptable to me if I was paying a 3 star price in a 3 star hotel but it was a complete waste of my money for MWQ Absolutely no value for money other than the great staff and convenient location   The service at the hotel was really 5 star unfortunately the great staff was the only thing that was 5 star about this hotel

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Everything at this hotel was done expertly and completely professionally in a quiet discreet and understated way Very well run immaculately clean luxuriously comfortable Perfect hotel for a relaxing break

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: It didn t feel like a 5 star hotel Probably a good 4 star room was clean but nothing special I expected the shower to be free standing not over the bath Also when I booked I was informed they the breakfast would be a special rate when I asked about This I was told that it was not   The bed

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The only minor gripe was the air con in the room which even on the coldest setting didn t quite get the temperature down to the level we d have preferred   Quiet location but only a couple of minutes walk from the DLR Rooms well insulated so no noise disturbance either from other rooms or from outside Friendly relaxed atmosphere in the hotel and some great views across Docklands West India Quay Spacious room with plenty of wardrobe space good facilities Staff exceptional

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Room wasn t ready even though we delayed our arrival until 3pm Checked in but they said we would have to wait so we told the staff we would wait in the bar no one came to find us So later had to go back to reception to ask all over again with another member of staff for a room to be allocated to us Marriott must be cutting back on value for money extras limited tea bags and milk available in room had to call for more and waited a long time 2 Bottles of water supplied in room was the smallest 330ml bottle I have seen in any hotel I have stayed in for a long time and 2 80 charge for an additional small one out of the mini bar is daylight robbery for simple bottled water Probably the price to be in London It is after all just plain old bottled water right Also only one of each miniature shower gel shampoo etc for 2 people to share was not enough as the miniatures were very tiny Tried to connect to Wi Fi using the code provided by reception but unless a Marriott member it wanted to charge an extra 11 for a day I was only staying briefly overnight and thought we had Wi Fi included Also we decided to eat in the Manhattan Grill early at 6pm asked reception staff to reserve and find us a table for 2 by the window with a view out When we arrived the restaurant was almost totally empty bar a few tables being used and they offered to sit us as far away from the window as possible stuck in the tightest possible corner where our shoulders practically touched the wall next to us and a male female couple who were already seated at a table for 2 next to us with hardly any room between I am sure they wouldn t have wanted to be privy to our conversations and I not theirs   The staff were very helpful and polite and willing to please Good location for quick access to DLR Food in restaurant of good quality and portion size if a little pricey Hotel nice interior and room was clean and tidy

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Nothing  I informed the hotel that it was my 15 year wedding anniversary and when I arrived I had a room upgrade with a rose petal bed and lots of there surprises The services was fantastic and I can t wait to return for another mini break

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The room card reader in the lifts was erratic and you could hear feel the nearby DLR in the background but neither were a serious issue   All round modern clean fresh building with welcoming friendly staff

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: We didn t have the breakfast as it was severely over priced   Location is ideal for a night out in East London Travel to Central London by the commuter boat from Canary Wharf Quay

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: You were unable to sit in the lounge without being made to feel you had to buy drinks from the bar Then when i ordered two cocktails it cost 26 and the charge for staff to make it was not optional  The beds were very comfortable

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Hair in the bathroom shower leaking pen marks on the pillow dust in most places Not value for money  Very friendly stuff beautiful view from the window and good location

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: When we got there the receptionist said that breakfast was not included although it was   Breakfast was really nice and they made the pancakes and omelettes on request which allowed you to get fresh and hot food

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Dated bedroom bathroom smelt musty no towels used soap Very noisy bar with aggressive intimidating clientele View from the room of DLR track great if you like train spotting Would not go back under any circumstances  Bed was comfortable doorman was friendly very efficient

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The room was very cold and we couldn t get warm all night The hotel need to think about how to leave the heating in the room so it s comfortable for guests when they arrive  Having 2 double beds in the family room was excellent rather than one being a sofa bed

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: In our room we could hear the rumble of the DLR The bar was a bit small and crowded in the evening   Excellent location for Canary Wharf and surrounding area

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The bathroom was not good with the mastic round the bath having gaps and the bath enamel was chipped For the price I would have expected a proper shower The description on the web made it sound like the room had a lounge not a communal lounge  The location was good the hotel was clean

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: No ipod dock v shocked at this as the hotel seemed so prestige Only 1 tiny complimentary shower gel should be as many as there are guests Signage to lifts could be better as i got lost Not much in way of late night food options in the area if u did not want room service   Bed was comfy room was spacious enough for 3 ladies loads of tea and coffee Concierge was very helpful Great location for the 02 Arena which is why we chose this hotel

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: View from the room After asking for a room with a nice view we did not receive one  Nice size bed comfortable duvet Breakfast was fantastic So much choice and excellent quality

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: I altered my booking at the restaurant and I had to repeat myself over and over because the guy didn t understand me The reception staff weren t helpful what so ever Taking 200 off a debit card as security Why not just take the card details The room wasn t very clean and we did not like the fact that there is no duvet cover on it s just two sheets sandwiching the duvet The tv was not very easy to use either   Location and breakfast staff

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Staff were very friendly and efficient Hotel is in the perfect location for canary wharf restaurants Has a nice bar which remains open late for any night caps

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: BEDROOM FURNITURE WAS A BIT WORN OUT HOLE IN THE CHAIR AND THE TV NEEDED UPDATING  EXCELLENT HOTEL IN BRILLIANT LOCATION FOR DOCKLANDS BARS AND RESTAURANTS

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Would have preferred a room with a view but the third floor doesn t really come with one so stay on a high floor if you want a view   Good sized room Attentive staff very polite and helpful

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The only thing I could mention was soft pillows but it didn t spoil the stay   All the staff were efficient and friendly Nothing was too much trouble Delicious pancakes and syrup at breakfast Hotel location was excellent for our needs

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Room was on par with much cheaper hotels Marriott website was cheaper doesn t feel or offer a 5 experience booked in advance but the day before I travelled price came down meaning I could of had breakfast for the same as I paid room only mentioned in hotel and was told I could have breakfast for 17pp Not the great experience I was hoping for   Nice entrance close to station

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: I requested room at high level weeks before we checked in only to be given a room on 1st floor next to the train tracks I went to reception to complain and was moved to 3rd floor where we was given a room with just a door between us and next door I had to go to reception AGAIN to be moved to 7th floor which was finally suitable but the whole episode was very stressful

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The first night room was located right next to the train station It was rather noisy   The staff were very helpful n friendly expecially the concierge Sam n Som

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: We had a good price from Bookings com and this may have been why we had a room with an awful outlook Between the hotel and the station it was a wind tunnel   Right by a DLR station Concierge service was excellent they could not have been more helpful As we were visiting family we did not use any of the restaurants or bars There were a number of nice looking restaurants nearby but we did not get the opportunity to try them either

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: We opted for the with breakfast stay When breakfast was delivered to our room we could only order once However I think it should be made to order as many times within the morning   I was very happy and delighted with the customer service of the staff and breakfast was also immaculate I would definitely recommend this hotel without a second thought

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Outdated bathroom d cor and design does not match the standard of the lobby and bar area or the fact that it is supposed to be a 5 star hotel There were no bath robes to use in the room and non fluffy cheap feeling towels which again were not in keeping with the hotel rating In addition whilst waiting for my wife to improve upon perfection I wanted to watch TV and realised there was a pathetic lack of TV channels not in keeping with a modern digital TV age and clearly designed to try and get guests to pay to view which is a bit much when you pay to stay   The reasonably good wifi the excellent large sized and comfortable bed the style and design of the hotel lobby and ambience of the bar etc the efficient and friendly staff and the great location with convenient car park and good transport links via the DLR

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The heating in our room never really kicked in It said leave it for 20minutes before you will notice a temperature change But we had it on for nearly an hour and it didn t really heat up Saying that we were not actually cold We also couldn t find a TV guide on the TV You had to physically flick through the television channels to see what was on If there was a guide it was not at all obvious Finally and not really a big deal but there was no bedside cabinet on one side of the bed There was however a small occasional table I was able to move so I could have glass of water next to me and somewhere to put my phone glasses book etc   The breakfast was excellent You could take your time over it the staff were amenable and helpful Nothing was too much trouble Even catered for dietary needs such as soya milk for cereal and gluten free options I also particularly loved the size of the bed I could literally starfish and not bump into my partner at all The room was blissfully quiet at night This was a room that overlooked the atrium No view really but didn t matter as we were out a great deal The room was well equipped iron hard wire for internet plenty of mirrors and sockets Also the bathroom mirror was heated which meant it never steamed up Brilliant

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Method of payment staff member at reception took my card on arrival and took 168 when my room was supposed to cost 118 and did not explain why she had done this and was quite rude when questioned After contacting the hotel afterwards they explained that the difference is refunded afterwards which is a little strange but nevertheless was never explained to us   The hotel itself was very nice and luxurious our room was also very clean and spacious Vast majority of staff were lovely and very helpful

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Only one packet of biscuits between two guests Four pillows instead of six Our special request was not acknowledged This was a little disappointing No parking facilities   Staff friendly Fabulous views Room was lovely and spacious very clean Thank you

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The wifi in the bedroom didn t work When asked staff about this they were no help My daughter had to keep going down in to the lobby to use wifi with my mum whilst I went to the o2 Not good enough The room service food was very very poor and we couldn t really eat it We had the Marriott burgers and the buns were so hard that they were impossible to eat When complained no one took any notice Breakfast is not worth the money they charge for it and to top it off they tried to charge us 22 each for the breakfast when it was included in our room price  Thr hotel was clean and the beds were very comfy

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Didn t go for breakfast as very over priced Shower needed more pressure   Staff were friendly and checked us straight in as there was a room available despite us arriving really early Also helped us to print some information out free of charge Room lovely very comfortable and clean Bar lounge was relaxing and a good place to end a busy day Location was good

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Very friendly staff and excellent hotel my wife was celebrating a birthday which I asked for a special request in room the hotel supplied a lovely touch for her and a card thank you to all at the marriott

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Nothing   Hotel was spotless Cosy bar excellent and efficient staff Best hotel breakfast I have ever had and breakfast staff on the ball and very efficient Stayed here a few times now and love it

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: On arrival we were upgraded that has never happened to us before Got to stay in an executive apartment with floor to ceiling windows on a corner on the top floor absolutely fabulous

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Second visit and didn t disappoint Lovely room extremely comfy bed and had a wonderful nights sleep Breakfast was a fabulous selection of everything you could want all staff very attentive

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: nothing  The whole experience of staying at the hotel was excellent Food from the bar and breakfast was excellent The staff were all helpful and friendly nothing was a problem Thank you for a lovely stay

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: I didn t like the service at the restaurant for breakfast was not offered tea where has other guests was offered tea therefore we didn t eat there again we was then billed for the breakfast which I had to query   The location was perfect

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The staff were slow when checking in and out In my opinion they could have been a little more friendly They didn t explain to us on arrival that I had to request for a night maid to clean the room For a 4 star hotel it should be mandatory to have a clean room and towels for the evening I wasn t asked how my stay was at the hotel when checking out and I wasn t aware I had to pay by credit card and not cash on arrival They don t accept cash on arrival only when checking out Pointless to be honest   The room was nice and comfortable and clean

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Hotel room is a bit dated old TV only few channels no separate shower a lot of noise once you use the water Bed is not really comfy  Front office staff were great DLR station next to hotel Lobby bar is good Staff in general is good Decent gym

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: No words can express how this hotel made our wedding anniversary really exceptional and special It s one of the most memorable stay of my life The preparation is incomparable Special thanks to Guest Relation Rumane for the effort She deserves the best appreciation My wife and I is so grateful to the management Keep it up You are the best

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The chefs in the manhatton grill ate dinner but didn t bother staying for breakfast didn t want to chance it after seeing how they perform  Being given a suite after complaining about dirty room

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Is not so close to sightseeing but are are DLR And underground near to the hotel   The beds blanked and sheets are so comfortables Big room and good bathroom

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: It was a wonderful experience for our young grandson who we were treating to theaterto see the lion king This hotel was superb and we certainly will be back again They were so child friendly

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Breakfast is VERY expensive at nearly 25 Browns Brasserie next door is fantastic and just under 10 Also check in took ages with the amount of form filling this needs to be sped up   Location excellent staff very attentive

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The staff were nothing but lovely from the concierge at the reception desk to the waiters in the restaurant and executive lounge The hotel room was lovely the complimentary snacks in the lounge were delightful and the pancakes we had at breakfast were easily the nicest pancakes we have ever had

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The bed was lumpy and rather difficult to sleep on The armchair at the side of the bed was so worn and dirty on the arms that it was threadbare and had a hole in it We dare not sit in it due to the unpleasant odour eminating from it There are very few lights in the room making it rather difficult to work at the desk area which has no light The breakfast area was very chaotic with rather a trek to each for each area There appeared to only be plates available at one end of the dining room Some of the waiting staff were not so eager to be of assistance whilst eating but were very eager to try and remove a half finished cup of coffee The G T bar was quite nice but some of the gins were unavailable It is not fair to advertise gins if you do not stock them A fairly common gin like Silent Pool should be available The decor in the hotel is looking rather tired and there are lots of cracked tiles scraped door edges and rather dirty lifts This is not a 5 star hotel by any stretch of the imagination The hotel is definitely a 4 star and still needs some updating to remain at that   The reception staff were extremely friendly courteous and efficient The waiting staff were also very pleasant and courteous

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: We moved the stuff from the fridge to put are own stuff in it and it was motion censored so they then wanted to charge us for everything in the fridge They locked the fridge and we had to ask them to unlock it so we could take are own items out We had already asked them to remove all items and they still tried to charge us for the whole mini bar and they had already taken it all away we had to then wait in a long line for a refund Unfortunately we also had a very noisy room opposite the railway Having stayed in 4 5 star hotels I feel this was not anywhere close we will not be returning Very disappointed

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Could have had more selection in the executive lounge Breakfast was hectic but great selection and staff Very stingy with body lotion in rooms  Excellent breakfast selection Love the toiletries but stingy with body lotion

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The free internet was fairly fast kept dropping off and we were not in the room long enough to justify paying the extra cost to have a faster service This was a bit disappointing   We had booked a double room and when we arrived at checkin we got upgraded to a 1 bedroom apartment The room included a full kitchen with all the facilities you would expect in a modern kitchen In this part of the room there was a large living space with a three seater sofa and a few chairs There was a flat screen TV and a DVD player this would be useful if a family was staying with young children We had a corner room on the 10th floor with floor to ceiling windows overlooking the night lights of London and Canary Wharf stunning views Off the main room there was a bedroom and a separate bathroom with all the facilities The bedroom also feature floor to ceiling window again giving great views over London As a Marriott member we had steady check out and within an hour I had conformation of the cost of the room straight to my phone This was a good service

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: There wasn t a good choice of food for the 24hour food service More option on the menu I d say   The bed was really nice and the towels were good size

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: We didn t have breakfast but this was due to the price which was rather expensive   Amazingly comfortable bed Very attentive staff Welcoming and friendly hotel

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Put me in a room on first floor next to the DLR Told me trains would stop at 11pm but were still operating at 1am I booked 2 weeks ago needed early night as early start only room left was an unacceptable response Not stopping there again   Close to my office

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Although our room was comfortable it was not 5 star in my opinion there were no extras like slippers ect I also thought 12 50 for 4 small crackers with cheese was a little over priced   Excellent staff made our stay very enjoyable they made our children very happy with complimentary chocolates activity packs and hot chocolate

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: No complaints on this occasion   A welcoming doorman offered to carry my luggage to reception I was situated on the 3rd floor which was surprisingly quiet considering there was a corporate Christmas party about to start on the ground floor and I was anticipating revelry from other guests milling about I slept very comfortably and soundly notwithstanding a certain amount of alcohol in my own system by the end of the night

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Using the security card to get to your floor in the lift always required a deft touch It made for some friendly interaction with fellow guests but was also stressful as sometimes the card did not activate and the lift would have already gone past your floor   The breakfast selection was very good While the hotel is very centrally located my room was very quiet and I enjoyed two good nights of sleep Staff were always friendly and very helpful

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: When I checked in I was told that I was booked only for the following night and that the hotel was full I showed my confirmation with Booking com and after some investigation I was advised that Booking com hadnt pushed my booking through correctly and was given a room No apology was offered by the person checking me in The room was right next to the DRL station and I was unable to sleep so the following room I requested a change of room which was given to me   Good location for Canary Wharf and 02 arena

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The grill restaurant was very below standard For a place costing as much as it does i expect more food was terrible but the staff did deal with complaint well   Bed was very cumphy good location staff were attentive

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Location next to DLR Train line too noisy Breakfast room for hot food not a good layout egg service needs to be first and toaster area somewhere else  Staff very attentive

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Room service breakfast in room late and second morning 15 minute queue for breakfast and breakfast sub standard especially scrambled eggs no cutlery and no bread for toast  Comfy bed

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Went to check in at 3pm room not ready Had to wait for room to be cleaned Small bar area that was busy so we had to go out whilst room was being cleaned   Nice spacious room Good breakfast Clean and tidy Walking distance to Canary Wharf shops bars and restaurants etc

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: We had the worst dinning experience I have ever had in a top resteraunt Paid 160 for 2 and expect excellence   From the moment we checked in all the staff were excellent friendly and professional

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Did not like the attitude of staff especially security and conceirge both left quite an unpleasant feeling   The room was comfortable but quite standard for Marriott Breakfast ok nothing special and quite limited choice Location is fine 1 min from DLR stop easy to get to center of London

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The only let down was the breakfast on Arriveing at the dining room at 9am the breakfast was all over cooked stood standing 5 mins before somebody came a threw a load of over cooked greasy bacon in the tray had to asked for our tea twice sorry it was let down   Hotel and staff were excellent couldn t do enough for us

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Restaurant dinner was pricey for us Noticed not many guests used during our visit Could offer set price menu   Staff were excellent caring without being overbearing Changed our room which was a bit dark gave us nice bright room Service was excellent breakfast choices superb

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Would have liked a better view   Best nights sleep in ages staff extremely helpful Setting perfect just far enough away from all the hustle bustle of Canary wharf

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Nothing I can think of  Room was excellent and the ice machine much appreciated The gentleman on the door couldn t have been nicer or more helpful

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: I had booked 3 rooms for family friends Unfortunately the shower in my room was not working It took 2 calls and 35 minutes for someone to come and investigate He agreed it was broken and in fairness offered to repair it It was too late by this time and I had already had to strip wash and wash my hair in the sink The manager was very understanding however it did spoil what could have been a perfect stay   The Hotel Staff and Location were excellent Breakfast was great with a wide choice of options available Rooms were of ample proportions and very comfortable

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: long queue for breakfast   Customer service is excellent the view from our room was amazing Location is accessible to the shops and restaurants value for money Very much grateful for their complimentary birthday cake

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Veiw was a bit boring but wasn t a problem  Can t fault the place everyone was helpful kind and friendly Exelent location in a great area Thank you all

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Room noisy as next to underground Breakfast very expensive so did not eat there   Staff very attentive and helpful Bed comfy and was a fridge which not expecting

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The plug by the kettle didn t work had to search for another one to use it Then the milk sachets were off Replaced relatively quickly though  Very comfortable bed nice outlook

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Reception staff are generally unfriendly abrupt Rooms are rarely ready unless you arrive in the evening and there is always a problem with the room you requested at booking I have stayed here for weekends for the past 4 years always encounter the same issues with reception Also this year upon arrival there was no gas in the kitchen so there was no hot bar food all day only salads Last year no wifi available the whole weekend A hotel of this rating is supposed to eliminate all stress upon arrival instead it creates stress   Excellent breakfast lovely lounge area nice bedrooms Restaurant staff are so professional friendly The restaurant bar area are well managed are the best feature of this hotel

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Breakfast was quite expensive for what it was   Easy access to London city Chic location Stunning hotel views of the quay Amazing staff Personal touch

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Better directions to the location of the ice machine would have helped The breakfast was not good value There were no croissants or pain au chocolat The egg when heated under the grill became rubbery The cereal range was limited as was the fruit selection The pile of bacon was watery All very disappointing   Staff were great and very keen to help particularly the guy in the G T bar The ice machine was great for the champagne we brought with us

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The area quietens significantly in the evening maybe too much   Great staff Extremely friendly and helpful Comfy bed Easy access to DLR and tube Perfect for the O2 and Greenwich Really nice hotel Seemed to be very good value for money Breakfast good but standard large hotel set up

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: When talking with guests at reception who have personal issues please be descrete and not announce their issue to all in the room   Everything Literally

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: It was raining outside ha ha   Everything was excellent the staff were friendly attentive and nothing was to much trouble The room was spotless and I had no complaints whatsoever The food was excellent both in the restaurant and room service Reception was prompt and informative all with a smile

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Just found the cooked breakfast wasnt very hot And had to move tables half way through our breakfast as someone wanted the table we were sat at   The bed was so comfortable Was actually the best nights sleep ive had in ages Very friendly staff

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Duvet was thin bar prices were so ridiculously expensive 18 for 2 drinks   Staff couldn t do enough the hotel was spotless The breakfast was beautiful lots of choice Breakfast manager was so attentive and so good with his staff was lovely to see The bed was super comfy duvet could of been thicker it was on the flimsy side Would recommend and will definitely return

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The staff were fine but not overly helpful   The room was great nice and quiet and the bed was superb So comfortable And internet wasn t extra Always a good thing that

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: We had no plug in our basin in room 153 The jacket potatoe dish in the bar was good but it would have been even better if the potato was cooked a little more   All Staff were very pleasant and helpful The room and bed very comfortable The food was good

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Would be nice to get some smoothies with the breakfast Also when we came back late at night to our rooms we had someone ask to see our hotel keys first to prove we were staying there Made us feel like we were trying to sneak into a room that wasn t ours Is this routine   The breakfast was good as there was variety

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Breakfast was a little pricy but there s a good choice of restaurants nearby as alternatives   Friendly and helpful staff clean good sized room with nice view of Canary wharf docks really lovely comfy king sized bed Despite the modern exterior the hotel is very cosy and relaxing inside

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Mini bar and room service prices expensive No window openers Aircon not brilliant and no fresh air so felt stuffy Wifi was included as i booked a special deal but would of been extra This should be included in all rooms Room service drinks expensive 3 50 for a can of coke Pillows too fluffy not comfortable or supportive No swimming pool   Large tv Mini bar Towels Water and toileteries Staff lovely Very helpful

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Restaurant evening meal was very poor It was supposed to be a hot meal but was served on cold plates and the food was only just warm and the side order of mushrooms were actually cold Not good enough for a five star venue with five star prices

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: We were treated with great respect and made to feel like valued guests Breakfast was first rate and the staff were very kind to our 3 year old daughter

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Amazing service the comfiest beds The hotel staff really looked after us and even looked after our bags before we checked in for the day following check out so we could explore London some more before leaving

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Cost of drinks  Fantastic hotel but very expensive bar and breakfast obviously designed for business customers where value for money is less of issue Fantastic facilities and service

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: For a 5 Hotel the bed and pillows were very uncomfortable and the room felt it was lacking things other 4 hotels have such as bathrobes and slippers Also a 5 hotel should offer better quality coffee and tea in the rooms Kenco is very basic   The staff were really friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: the rooms are looking really tired fraying arm chairs scuffs on walls No USB ports in this day and age Great hotel and location but in dire need of a refurb feels very tired   Staff and location great

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: service in the restaurant during the dinner was quite slow though it was not busy Food was very good so we did not mind the delay   next door to WIQ DLR Very comfortable beds Very good place to stay in Canary Wharf

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Very slow to check in and extremely busy at breakfast with many of the cooked breakfast dishes empty of food for quite a long time  Beds super comfy duvets and pillows gorgeous

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Having booked this hotel because it boasts striking views of London s Docklands in an unparalleled location our 1st floor room looked out directly over the road and concrete walkway outside The decor was dated the toiletries were tiny hardly enough for one person let alone two The curtains were ink stained and the lampshade was cracked All in all a very disappointing stay   Room was OK nice and quiet and bed was comfy Room was clean Staff were welcoming and polite on arrival

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Everything  Trying to find words to put together on how much i loved my stay and experience at this amazing hotel So extemely helpful staff Room was imaculate and i did not want to leave I can not wait to go back

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Had to use expensive taxi to get to hotel Used Tube to get in and out of central London   Hotel was beautiful The staff was great very friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: There wasn t anything I could find wrong with the hotel or staff  I travelled with a large group of friends to watch the Boxing at O2 Arena The hotel staff were excellent and the hotel was immaculate and superb value for money I would definitely stay again and recommend to others

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Service in the bar in the late evening was awful We waited for ages to be served and eventually had to go to the bar to order drinks which seemed to upset bar staff as we were told they would come and serve us They were very busy but this is a 5 star hotel   Lovely comfortable beds and a large bedroom

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: 5 minute wait for table at breakfast in the morning this continued throughout the service between 10am 11am Not enough tables for size of hotel only real negative of stay Bar was busy and manager was straightening up the labels on the bottles rather than serving which I thought was amusing   Welcoming staff on arrival speed of check in Clean rooms great comfortable bed s

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: We were glad we did not have breakfast included as long queue when we left about 9 30  We booked for one night and enjoyed the hotel reception staff were very friendly and helpful room was clean and comfortable Would definitely stay again

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Club lounge closing at 9 30 15 min queue for breakfast Buffet breakfast hot and fresh however felt rushed and I ate on my own as husband queued in another queue for his breakfast thought the club lounge would have been opened in the morning for even express breakfast Really let the experience down  Staff were great hotel lovley Club lounge great

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: There was a notice outside the restaurant informing guests due to high occupancy breakfast would be extended from 1130 to 1230 and peak time from 0930 It would have beneficial to know this beforehand as it was there was at least a half hour wait and with flight to catch my son and I went without a breakfast that was included in the price   The room

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The bar was very very noisy and therefore we were not too keen on staying in for a drink The bar menu is limited   The staff were so helpful and courteous and we were upgraded on arrival The bedroom was large and the bed was the most comfortable we have ever slept on We were celebrating my husbands birthday and the hotel came with room service with a pile of Brownies which were to die for Breakfast was equally excellent

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Cant fault our stay   Very friendly and helpful staff we were visiting as part of my husbands birthday celebrations and the surprise platter in the room on arrival was lovely

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: I booked the room well in advance and yet the bathroom was aimed for disabled visitors a very small bath and a shower that was not very tall   The staff were very helpful and the bed was extremely comfortable A nice added touch was the heated mirror in the bathroom

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Whilst appreciating that the hotel seemed very busy the Full Breakfast was cold Warm plates may of helped Room 7th floor executive was very clean bed comfortable but overall needs to be updated Starting to look old fashioned   Staff were excellent Room 7th floor executive was very clean bed comfortable Exclusive access to the executive lounge was a bonus worth mentioning Great location for the O2

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: view from room just another side of the hotel with a nice view of the air conditioning bleak Queue for breakfast and quality no better than Holiday Inn and queue for toast and eggs gave up in the end one toaster for 100 people Room even upgraded to executive was very mediocre not 5 only 2 tea bags and one pkt biscuits between 2   Location and very friendly staff

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Bed was not very comfortable as the extra large double bed was just two twin beds put together Caused a problem with quality of sleeping   Loved the location and the staff were excellent The facilities within the hotel were great and was happy with the cleanliness of the room

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The keycard stopped working twice and the fire alarm went off twice in the early hours of the morning  Breakfast was fantastic and the room was very comfortable

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Wonderful selection at breakfast Comfortable room Bed was amazing Nice views over the Dock and right beside Canary Wharf on Jubilee Line and the West India Quay DLR

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The iced tea  We needed a place for our bags as we were competing in a night marathon and wanted a shower before we went home this was the ideal location and price

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: 2 alarms going off at 12 midnight and at 3am Some of us could not get to sleep again Did cause a problem when we went out we were too tired   Most things

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: We didn t like the breakfast The scrambled egg wasn t fresh and the rest of the hot food didn t look that inviting I certainly wouldn t have paid 22 for this   We stayed overnight for my husband s birthday as part of a surprise present The staff were very friendly and we even got some cake as a surprise

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Preordered a cot Not present in the room when we arrived in the evening so we had to wait for about 40 min extra before we could put our little son to bed Furniture and carpets stained and a little grubby Curtains would not close properly

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Transport in London can be a bit difficult so probably not the best location for touring the city from Hotel has access to both DLR next to station and the tube 8 min walk we would recommend the water taxi as an alternative to consider if going to center   Very good location for Canary Wharf business area meetings although a bit away from city center Excellent staff very good breakfast however it can feel slightly repetitive and very comfy bed

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Breakfast buffet very slow topping up lack of items available at any one time long queues at check out due to early check ins   Lovely bar good waiter in bar excellent check in Great view of Canary Wharf DLR from room really added to feeling of being right in the heart of the city

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The train runs right by the hotel and woke us up as quite loud but the hotel clearly has taken as many steps as possible to solve this   The bed was fantastic and the room very spacious for London It was easy access to the tube and lots of nice bars and restaurants nearby Incredible value for money

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: air conditioning didn t seem to be cold enough and TV screen kept freezing during viewing  Location staff and overall service great value for money as we got a fantastic deal for 2 nights

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: For a 5 star rooms where average 3 star self serve breakfast which took 30 minutes to get seated and anther 30 minutes at the breakfast bar   Room with a view

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: No parking onsite Overnight parking 14 Rooms also need updating requested early room booking in but had to wait while the room was being prepared we counted at least eight other people being booked in and given room keys would we stay there again only at a push better hotels around the area  Location was the main factor We had a wedding approx 250 meters away

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The reception staff were attentive and polite Our room was upgraded at no extra cost due to us celebrating our 10th wedding anniversary When we returned from our afternoon walk a complementary bottle of wine accompanied with strawberries was waiting in our room We also found all the staff at breakfast the following morning polite and helpful

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Struggling to think of anything   We always stay at this hotel when we visit London as the staff are excellent nothing is too much trouble The DLR is just outside it s A 10 minutes walk to the underground station at Canary Wharf

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Nothing it was all good  Staff and room were great it was our anniversary and my wife s birthday and the room location and complimentary birthday brownies were brilliant

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Room slippers bathroom slippers no toothepaste provided  Excellent service from staff and the hotel itself is beautiful and excellent view and location

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: THE HOT BREAKFAST COULD BE BETTER BY THIS I MEAN THE FOOD WAS NOT HOT ENOUGH AND THE BACON WAS NOT PRESENTED OR COOKED PROPERLY OTHER THAN THAT ALL WAS FINE   THE OVERALL STAY WAS LOVELY THE STAFF WERE FRIENDLY AND ON BOOKING INTO OUR ROOM WE WERE UPGRADED TO A LARGER ROOM AND A BETTER VIEW OVERALL I WOULD RECOMMEND THIS HOTEL

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: More spaces for the evening meal we couldn t get a table   We stopped there to do the London Prudential Ride 100 They thought of everything Cycle storage early start breakfast and special evening meal

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Sound proofing our room was adjacent to the DLR track which is very noisy and starts early in the morning Chose alternate rooms if possible   Location in the heart of Canary Wharf with spoilt for choice of restaurants within easy walking distance Transport links are amazing DLR Tube buses and River Clipper

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: We stayed here the night before the Prudential Ride London The hotel had really geared up for this event with dedicated bike storage a mechanic on hand a fantastic buffet breakfast starting at 4 00 a m and offering shower facilities post ride Genuinely friendly helpful staff in all departments

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: We stayed here as we needed to be in London as my husband was in the Ride London This hotel provides breakfast from 4am for the riders and secure bike parking inside with racking As an extra lovely touch all riders get a goodie bag on check in all in all a most excellent service

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: My details were wrong on database offered biscuits cheese and wine but never materialised Very poor gym facilities ladies sauna not working very dirty room felt like I was treated as though no one wanted me there Will not return   Bed very comfortable TV good Generally very comfortable

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The cooker that was doing hot meals in the breakfast was excelent but he should have someone helping him because it was too much people just for one person I have stayed in Marriott Hotel in Lisbon and this didn t happen   Staff very friendly and supportive Very good location and confort Breakfast was also very good

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Noise of nearby station my room was very close to the tracks and literally vibrated as well as nosy trains didn t stop til gone midnight and started again at 5 30am So had disturbed sleep not sure if there are any quieter rooms My neighbours were not bothered by the noise so it will not be a problem for everyone but I need a quiet room   Bed was very comfortable staff super My only issue was the noise of the adjacent railway Staff gave me some ear plugs but hotel fully occupied so could not change my room sadly

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The facilities of the room felt a little cheap as in below average quality Personally I would not book around this area for a leisure trip around London or even for a longer business trip because it s quite remote   For a short business trip around Canary Wharf it s in a very good location and also next to a DLR station that can take you around central London with ease

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: No complaints   Bed was very comfortable and the staff very helpful and attentive I ll definitely be considering this hotel next time I m in London

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The bed was extremely comfortable and the bedroom was amazing We had an enormous television which was like being at a cinema The cook which made the omelettes was very friendly He made you an omelette of your choice and it was delicious He also made some small pancakes with sauce and some cherries wonderful

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: We ordered a king sized bed and when we arrived due to it being busy our room had 2 single beds When we raised this with the hotel we were told there were no other rooms available so the beds would be pushed together This was done but was very noticeable which made for a bit of a disappointing sleep   The breakfast was lovely

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Found the hotel difficult to locate initially however in fairness this could be as much to do with an unfamiliarity with the area   Staff were excellent particularly the concierge who quickly and professionally resolved an issue we faced

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: I always choose the Marriotts West India Quay when I m staying in London The service is consistently good and I would highly recommend this hotel to anyone

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: This was a perfect one night stay in Canary Wharf Located right next to West India Quay DLR and restaurants location is perfect Lovely hotel bar with great cocktails Room and bathroom very clean Bed very comfortable and sheets duvet crisp white All staff were very personable helpful and friendly from rushing ahead of you to open the doors to genuine interest and conversation about our stay Couldn t fault this hotel special thanks to Vera who took customer care to the next level

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Gym very basic Breakfast waiting staff non communicative smiley and the maitre d cleared our table whilst we were choosing pastries Door key stopped working on more than one occasion   Comfy bed and nice size room Breakfast chef cooking eggs was fantastically friendly and accommodating

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Shame no pool as we were under the impression it had from booking com  Helpful staff location executive lounge option at check in food was excellent

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The view was of the train track which isn t that exciting and we could hear it too which was a disappointment because we couldn t hear it last time   Clean and comfortable room enormous comfortable bed heavy dark curtains to keep out the light free nibbles wine gums popcorn and fruit infused ice water in the lobby and free wifi Great location superior breakfast spread friendly staff

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Poor breakfast for such an upmarket want to be hotel no fresh bread available and cold meat selection like in a poor army kitchen fruit salat no berries only cheap fruits Very disappointing for such a hotel Filter coffee

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Very slow service at breakfast having to remind member of staff who forgot to bring tea Having to ask for menu s and how breakfast works Given a choice would prefer a stand alone shower to a shower in the bath although rest of room made up for this  Very friendly and helpful staff at reception and in the bar Receiving an upgrade to a nice room overlooking the dock with a comfortable bed

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Very friendly and helpful from the off Lovely hotel very clean brilliant staff Couldn t ask for better Will use every time we are in London from now on After a long day out found they had even gone to the trouble of putting milk and cookies in the room for our son s bedtime

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The staff were excellent and nothing was too much trouble the hotel could not be better situated for transport links and parking the room was excellent with air con nice bathroom nice bedding comfortable beds etc the breakfast was unsurpassed with full English fruit and cereals omelettes and pancakes made to order and taste outside the hotel is a rage of restaurants and bars to cater for all tastes I would strongly recommend this hotel and its staff

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Wish we could have stayed longer   The staff really cared about us and asked about why we had come to stay and congratulated us on our 30th anniversary Cannot express enough how kind they were We had rose petals on the bed and strawberries chocolate and cream and a bottle of wine How thoughtful and the staff made our stay so so special

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
