Full_Review: Noisy room with the DLR next to the window and air conditioning that was louder than a jet engine  The hotel did their best to provide specific services for those of us entered into the RideLondon cycle event with an 0400 breakfast

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The evening menu portions were tiny The food was delicious but I could have eaten three portions given the exercise taking place the next day The executive lounge desserts were lovely however it seems the volume of food provided was really limited given the number of people using the facility  Staying for the evening prior to the Prudential Bike ride We heard the GM of the hotel is a cyclist at was particularly noticeable that ALOT of thought had gone into making the stay for riders well managed The storage and safety of guests bikes was first class Having a bike maintenance facility on site was way beyond expectation and amazing service The collection of bikes in the early morning was incredibly efficient and smooth running The welcome pack for riders was a lovely touch Opening the breakfast facilities from 4am so riders were able to eat was fantastic The rider specific evening menu was a good idea Providing guidance maps of how to get from the hotel to the ride start was great we followed the route which was a little sketchy along the canal with road bike tyres but again over and above service Use of the executive lounge was worth paying the extra for Canap s and desserts were lovely just a shame we were not drinking alcohol during our stay to enjoy a wine with the beautiful sunset Our stay was extremely enjoyable and smooth running exactly what you need before a big ride thank you

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: When I booked I was unaware that there would be any special attention due to the Ride London If we had known we could have relaxed in advance knowing that it was all taken care of   The hotel was completely set up to welcome riders in the Ride London event which was great

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The lifts were somewhat erratic with a number of people going up and down a lot as their swipe cards didn t work The road in front of the main entrance to the hotel was quite scruffy and not at all appealing especially the large concrete road blocks The buffet breakfast is not what you would expect from a 5 hotel I didn t partake in the cyclist s early breakfast and went for the normal time serving The selection wasn t great and the serving spoons etc were not kept clean and the food was lukewarm at best The selection of fruit was also very limited I ve stayed at Premier Inn Hotels a number of times on business and their breakfast selection is wider and also better quality   The staff were all excellent and the provision of the cycle storage for the Prudential Ride London event was first class The laying on of breakfast from 4am was a great gesture as was the gift for the riders The view over the dock was and Canary Wharf was lovely Great access to the Dockland Light Railway

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: We stayed for two nights for the Prudential 100 bike ride and had our bicycles with us Previous hotels in which we have stayed have allowed our bicycles into our hotel room bearing I mind bicycles are worth several thousand pounds but we were refused they arranged for a porter to carry our bikes to a secure room but in the process the porter managed to bounce it off several things steps wall with the potential of damaging it Although our room was supposedly cleaned after our first night half empty coffee cups were not removed and replaced with clean cups On calling housekeeping they did not send someone within a reasonable timeframe so we went to bed only to be aroused by someone knocking on our door which we assume was housekeeping as it was very late we didn t open the door we were also very sleepy having been woken up only to be woken by the telephone ringing on a couple of occasions As this was shortly afterwards we assume this was housekeeping we couldn t work out how to answer the phone in the dark as it was more than lifting the handset The hotel took my track pump in for safekeeping whilst we were participating in the ride and then couldn t find it when we were ready to leave No one was particularly worried about trying to sort out our issues again in a timely manner the porter eventually found it after approx 20 minutes having confessed that he didn t look properly in his cubby hole in the first place That combined with 35 00 for two gins and one tonic was the end of a bad stay

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: I have never felt more appreciated by a hotel in my life Everyone looks after you from the receptionists and concierge to the house keeping staff Even the maintenance man helped to check over our bikes before our big ride out of the goodness of his heart Incredibly kind people thank you

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The staff were awesome the hotel catered for us as cyclists they had check in right stored bikes bags and even allowed access to the Gym for showers afterwards a real brilliant effort they even had a mechanic in the bike store unbelievable and proof that a hotel can provide brilliant service when someone thinks about things

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: To obtain a quieter room I was offered s disabled room the quality of the furniture and furhishings weren t to standard holes and chipped  Restaurant steak was excellent as was the breakfest service

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Bed was very comfortable Check in process very easy and staff super helpful Great location for eating and drinking shopping and access to London transport

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Apart from coming back in to our room and the bed not even made They transfer us to another room which was much bigger and nicer   Everthing excellent as usual

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: We have been triated so bad by the one manager his name is Sayed his origin from Bangladesh he is not suppost to work for hotel industry If I could report him to the top management of Marriott to remove him from the hotel I will do   Only the area is not bad

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Being very picky but a little wear and tear on upholstery   The bed was fabulously comfortable room view was nice staff were all lovely and the breakfast was of a high standard with lots of choice

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The room with low sink in bathroom I guess because I booked through Booking com I got what I paid for Reduced price equal not so good room and poor view   Staff very helpful

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The fact it was had to pay for additional services like a bottle of wine to come to the room on special occasion  Amazing Movies paid for need to be of better quality

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Our room was at the back of the building and I had difficulties sleeping due to the Docklands railway nearby but my daughter had no problems at all However the customer services manager has made a note so that we wont be put in those rooms when we return and she was genuinely concerned I hadn t raised the issue the first night but I thought I would get used to it   the staff are lovely and cleanliness excellent The rooms are well appointed Breakfast is very well cooked and a good variety of foods on offer the chef makes lovely pancakes omelettes etc to order If you want to stay in a modern area close to the city without the hustle and bustle this is for you you can explore easily via the underground Check out the museum nearby and the restaurants a trendy place to be

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Food rather cold on both mornings bagel rock hard I am just questioning final bill as I was charged 100 more for Sunday night than Saturday never happened before in fact quite the reverse   Mostly good

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The only negative comment I have was was that the tables with lamps and flowers located along the room corridors on level 6 were dusty   The bed was very comfy and the pillows were the softest I have experienced All staff we spoke to at all levels were very polite and very helpful The breakfast was excellent lots of choice good quality food chef was really helpful and friendly nothing was too much trouble The location was great the train station DLR was perfectly located next to the hotel and no noise was noted from our room I would definitely recommend to a friend

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: None  So near to the DLR to get too places nice location to walk around Dockland s Staff where very helpful and perlite Room where nice and big and very clean

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Some rooms don t have a nice view Make sure you ask for the docklands view when you book   Everything was fabulous The room the service the location Breakfast amazing with great choice Very friendly staff When asked to change the room because of the view they did for free Will definitely go again

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The biggest issue was the cold breakfast paid for hot buffet and it was all cold The tv signal was terrible just wanted to relax as I just got back from Saudi Arabia before travelling back to my house in Peterborough   The bed was amazing pillows were perfect

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: One room was not ready by 15 00 the check in time which was unacceptable having made the booking over 4 months previously We had to wait an additional 20 minutes for the room   The rooms were clean and a good size The breakfast was excellent The staff were polite and offered a good level of customer service

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Prices of food and drink high DLR out of service so expensive to get out and about  The rooms were lovely and spacious Staff very friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Superb service at excellent price weekends always good value Huge comfy bed The reception staff were particularly attentive and helpful Breakfast terrific

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The hash browns were not cooked still freezing cold in the middle notified a member of staff and this was resolved   A nice little treat in the room as it was for a birthday weekend Was a lovely touch

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: There was a school prom on the Friday night so quite a lot of noise and also engineering works all weekend outside so we didn t get much sleep Rooms need updating   Large room and comfy bed The staff were also very warm and welcoming

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: They were very helpful I had requested a late check out and added breakfast through booking com and had confirmation emails from you to say that you had contacted the hotel to arrange this but the hotel knew nothing about it but delt with our needs as best as they could I m very happy with the hotel but very unhappy with booking com

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Only four pillows not six as advertised friendly staff checking in not so checking out   Bed was so comfortable lovely views due to front of house staff

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: 1 Did not permit me having my Rewards Points despite paying a higher price than if I had booked via Marriott 2 Taking a 50 deposit as well as and on top of the high room fee I paid   Location Helpful reception staff

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Friendliness of the Concierge Desk team and door men whose willingness to make everything seem as though it was no trouble at all made me feel most welcome

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: I was expecting far more from the room for the 5 star rating of the hotel it could have easily been a decent 3 star The room was looking tired and basic not what I was expecting at all Also the little things such as cleaners forgot to replace bottle of water from previous guests and our towels didn t get changed Only little things but for the price I paid And star rating I was expecting luxury but it really wasn t up to standard  Location and bathroom

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Breakfast too expensive view we had very poor as only saw back of building roof lower ground Would of been better if we had a view of the Canary Wharf   Hotel was very clean and staff very polite and friendly

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The deluxe king bed was very comfortable breakfast excellent and the hotel staff were very helpful and friendly Great location too Would definitely stay again

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Turndown service consisted of drawing the curtains and placing the in room breakfast menu on the bed despite seeing the bed unmade and on another occasion towels requiring changing

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: breakfast was ok good mix of English and continental food however dinner wasn t up to the standard I have ordered a medium rare filet steak the steak came burned all over literally was black and crispy On top of that the lettuce in the salad was probably cut ages before serving as the edges of it were already brown the room was as well a bit old fashion  Convenient location easy access to a public transport very nice and helpful stuff

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Pictures on the website didn t match what we were given Rooms not sound proof as described on the website Site didn t mention 100 pounds deposit

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Nothing  Excellent staff We visited for our anniversary and the extra details the staff had in place were incredible A anniversary card and rose petals on the bed made us feel very welcome Thank you to all the staff

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Staff very friendly and helpful made you feel special Great bed extra kingsize and very comfortable Friendly atmosphere in the bar on Saturday night

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: We were overlooking the DLR but the soundproofing was excellent and you would never have known The staff were very friendly and allowed us to check in 2 hours early Great location lots of nice places to eat nearby less busy than the city and easy yo get into town

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: We couldn t fault anything   The bed was really comfortable and extremely roomy cleanliness of the room and bathroom was to a very high standard and felt very comfortable staying there We were also impressed with the lengthy opening hours of the G T bar We would love to stay again

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The baby cot that we got in our room did not have a straight bottom for the baby to sleep in so he slept with us on the main bed There was another issue also the cot did not have any baby linen it actually came totally empty no sheet no pillow no blanket duvet After our request to the reception we received a blanket and the next day the cleaning lady put a sheet in it   Very helpful staff clean room and in the centre of Canary Wharf Very good breakfast lots of choices everything was very fresh Great location when visiting London perfect if you need to go to Greenwich for walking If you do upgrade your room to an executive one don t forget that the executive lounge has the most perfect view of West India Quay and is a very nice quiet corner to relax

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Bathroom hadn t been cleaned properly as the soap complete with pubic hair and razor was left in the shower throughout our two night stay   Great location

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: It did take a little while to get checked in however they was helpful and they offered refreshments while we waited  The rooms are a good size for an over night stay and the beds are very comfy had a good nights sleep

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Excellent location really nice food at a reasonable price Staff really friendly even though they were very busy Really nice atmosphere in the lobby Thank you for lovely stay

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Nothing  Arrived an hour early was prepared to wait in bar but no they upgraded me to a suite and made are whole weekend massive beautiful room and taxi serivce was top quality thank u so much

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Very rowdy and noisy guests Full of men mostly drunk and not great atmosphere We booked a high end hotel hoping we wouldn t have to mix with such type We didn t even go down to the bar because it was extremely intimidating   Beautiful hotel great location

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Still waiting for the refund of my deposit which wasn t included on the email confirmation Door man had an attitude when opening the door reception staff were not friendly facilities were average Overpriced and not worth the money   View of the area was good

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: the rooms need an upgrade as the d cor wasn t what I would consider 5 star  the staff were fantastic the breakfast superb the bar was great but a bit pricey

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: I asked for a king bed and they gave me two single beds joined together It was very uncomfortable and I was annoyed I paid king size money but didn t get king size quality  The location and staff were excellent

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: no real improvements from what I ve experienced  great breakfast very convenient rooms great location close to DLR 1m walk in 10min in city center West India Quay is a lovely and most vibrant part of Canary Wharf

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Only little niggles room service door hanger not replaced on two days Had to ring for butter with breakfast one morning   Room was fabulous Fantastic views

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: We liked everything we didn t have a thing to complain about Staff was friendly and we ll definitely be back   The beds were so comfy we wanted to take it home with us the food was amazing We loved everything we ll definitely be back

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The staff could of been nore personable Weve stayed in hotel at a lower cost with breakfast and there cooked breakfast was of a better quality for example had a choice of streaky bacon smoked and unsmoked Also I prefer crispy bacon The eggs made to order were flavourless and watery And scrambled egg was like watery mash potato Due to location can be very costly to stay in the area They should make it clearler that thy make pancakes and other breakfasts to order as we were not aware of this until after  The hotel was rooms were exceptionally clean and a great size Bed was very comfortable could of slept there forever The staff were very helpful We had breakfast included and they include pretty much anything made to order e g pancakes although we were not aware of this Great location as restraunts and bars everywere Location feels like your in spain more than london

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Comfort from start to finish Beautiful freshly cooked omelette for breakfast with smoked salmon Birthday brownies and bottle of wine as complimentary to celebrate my 50th birthday Perfect

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: View on the roof was not great Carpet made the room look old fashioned but I personally never like carpet The room was very basic for the price  Pillows were very comfy and lounge bar with 24 hours good very nice

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Can t think of anything negative to say   Lovely location very quiet The bed was really comfortable with crisp sheets and great pillows Had a really good sleep Staff were very friendly and helpful Breakfast was great too

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Nothing Everything was perfect   We got a fantastic rate 111 pounds for a deluxe room including breakfast The staff are so friendly and helpful The breakfast was gorgeous the room was big and comfortable the bathroom was spotless and very roomy I checked the price and it should have been over 300 for what we got Fantastic The DLR West India Quay is the nearest tube stop

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The room was a bit drab I would never have rated it a 5 star hotel   Great price and very comfy beds The location was really handy as right next to West India Quay DLR station

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The rooms were outdated Furniture looked worn colours were mismatched This made the room feel dirty although it wasn t   Location was right next to restaurants bars etc which was ideal for us

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: There were hairs in the bath other then that it was clean   Really great buffet breakfast helpful friendly staff and large comfortable room This will be our new hotel for us when we are in London

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The comfy chair in our room was threadbare with a hole in the arm there was also a hole in the bath enamel there weren t proper hair towels The bar was hugely expensive one cocktail and one gin and tonic cost cost 28 which took 15 mins to arrive The chess set displayed was also missing 50 of the pieces which was disappointing For a 5 star hotel I was not entirely satisfied and quite frankly I have had better Travelodges   The staff and the bed

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: I live in London so seldom stay in London hotels I know they are expensive but I had at least expected them to be good This is supposed to be a 5 star hotel I do not know why It has no swimming pool the bathroom was smaller than my bathroom at home and had a plastic shower curtain This is my 35th review on booking com Not at ANY of the other hotels have I encountered a shower curtain They also charge 15 per day for WiFi in the room If we all complained they would stop doing that it is outrageous Plus they take a 50 deposit on arrival which they then don t pay back for 5 days I am fortunate that I won t have to stay in a London hotel again and can instead stay in much better value much nicer hotels in Paris Milan Brussels Berlin Geneva or any other location where tourists are not ripped off to this extent I suggest you do too if you can   Reasonable view over the canal Right next to DLR station

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Free Wifi didn t work in my room 50 charge in case you had extras is a bit cheeky   Great location great breakfast great shower comfy bed what more would you want

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Everything was perfect  The staff were extremely friendly and helpful fantasic service which you rarely see nowadays Would definitely stay here again The service and staff were amazing Thank you

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Prices on some things were disproportionately expensive for what you were getting such as the breakfasts and certain drinks at the bar  Everything was very nice

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The cost of food and drinks in the additional bar slightly over priced and slow service from bar staff Could be better   Clean spacious room with a very comfortable bed Overall a welcoming reception from staff throughout our stay Thank you

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Steak was undercooked the scrambled egg was runny n obviously not cook and my bacon had three big green spots on it Not impressed at all by the standard of the food

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Unfortunately there was miscommunication between reception staff and breakfast staff all guests were told breakfast was til 11am however when we went down for breakfast at just after 10am the kitchen staff were cleaning away stuff no croissants etc They realised the error when other guest arrived after 10am expecting to see a full continental buffet Missed the continental pastries but the cooked breakfast certainly made up for it   Great comforts lovely surprise in the room for my partners 30th birthday chocs and wine staff very friendly and overly helpful

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Check out was very unorganised best to use the auto check out facility   Room was amazing spacious big bed and plenty of natural light Bar and food very good and reasonably priced

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Bigger room for breakfast needed Maybe a local map for strolls and jogging  Great location with walking distance to shopping and good and to DLR for transport Very nice helpful staff and good service Clean Very convenient to get to ExCel convention hall

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Nothing   We had a wonderfully memorable stay It was my partner s birthday and we both did not quite know what to expect We had a lovely room overlooking the Quay Petals on the bed and two kinds of chocolate in the room The staff were friendly and helpful they were always ready to add that personal touch All of which made our stay special We would like to than them all from the reception restaurant cleaner and other staff who were always cheerful and ready to lend a hand point the way or open a door We loved the breakfast and thanked the staff and they were glad to be acknowledged The hotel is a great location it s by a West India Quay DLR station and there s a nearby footbridge leading towards Canary Wharf The surrounding area is pleasant to walk around with several restaurants pubs etc Would we go again Yes when it s my birthday

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Furniture decor and TV s in the suite were getting rather tired Were charged for drinks in the hotel bar when we d not used it Had to get them removed from the bill   Large living sleeping area and bathroom suite Executive lounge with complimentary food and drink it has great views out over the docks Adjacent restaurants and also shops in Canada Water Breakfast was superb

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Only serve Stella on tap behind the bar   Great bed Great location right next to the DLR station bars close by good access to the Olympic park Good breakfast

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Not keen on the location only chose the hotel because of an event at the excel centre and we hadn t staid in this area before  Staff were extremely friendly and helpful Quite easy to get into central london

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Nothing not to like all very good   Very friendly helpful staff Nice quite room and good choice at breakfast Good location for getting around London Car park just across the road not to dear Exellent for Canery Wharf

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Shouldn t have taken the upgrade the view overlooking the inside of the building wasn t nice to wake up to   Staff were very helpful shower was brilliant Offer of a free upgrade

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Could have had some extra towels and water tea etc as there was three of us however we asked and they did accommodate   Very clean room and bathroom easy access to hotel from underground comfy beds beautiful scenery outside of the India quay Highly recommend Loved it

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Our room 204 was average nothing special The windows were dirty so you were not inclined to look out at the water views Room was basic functional nothing 5 about it but spotlessly clean and had all mod cons I guess I was expecting a little more of the Marriott 5 sparkle but our room didn t have it   Breakfast if included is unbelieveable value for money what a spread Fantastic Its expensive if you have to pay directly but if you can get full buffet as part of a deal grab it Great location on DLR and close to Underground 4 mins walk so great location for transport and not noisey at all

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Nothing it was all really good   Fantastic value for money at the deal I got 93 and in a really good location for visiting the O2 or for business in Docklands A short walk to Canary Wharf for the fast Jubilee line into central London or the O2 I didn t have breakfast here or use the hotel facilities much but the room was very nice nice big bed with crisp sheets and plenty of soft pillows

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The location is really nice if you re not visiting the city centre otherwise I would suggest a hotel less far from the centre   Very friendly staff rooms breakfast

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Having breakfast was a bit busy Eating area was small for the size of the hotel   The hotel is in an excellent position for O2 and the East end of London with dlr next to hotel

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Very expensive food and drink   The big bed and the room was lovely and spacious Fantastic view looking over the water Was just what I expected a 5 star hotel to be like

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: I requested a room on a low floor due to fear of lifts which was confirmed would be OK however my room was on 8th floor and I had to use the service stairs

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The bar drinks were very expensive with service added even though we had to wait to be served   We were upgraded to a suite which was amazing the staff were so friendly and helpful and the rooms were spotless A very nice breakfast even did gluten free French toast with berries and maple syrup All in all excellent

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Service not enough staff on duty for the size of the hotel buffet breakfast with empty dishes Had to search for bowls and cutlery   Great location polite and hard working staff

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Welcomed with a complimentary chocolate and a glass of water while waiting to check in The staff were extremely friendly from the door man who welcomed us outside to the reception staff and the chef who made us delicious pancakes for breakfast Would definitely recommend this hotel

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The bed was very soft but that is all personal preference   Location is great for going to the O2 Close to restaurants and bars Well kept rooms Breakfast was excellent lots of choice

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: No windows in bedroom slight fusty smell views are not good from floors 1 4   Friendly staff Especially Vlad the porter on the front door Comfy room

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The room mattress was far too soft Not always good for guests with back joint problems   Staff were professional throughout Special mention to Emran in charge in the restaurant who managed a very busy Bank holiday Sunday morning breakfast time with a cool head consistent politeness and good planning to keep us all in good spirits and well attended to

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Huge queue for breakfast however to compensate for our wait for a group table we were offered additional menu at no extra cost   Friendly staff they couldn t do enough Asked for a room with view which was accommodated

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Usual high London bar prices probably to be expected but very slow bar service took 20 minutes to bring us 2 simple drinks as a result we removed service charge Room adjacent to DLR route so regular noise from this but luckily we sleep well so not a major issue for us A room overlooking the Quay would be quieter which we had on previous visit   Bed very comfortable Easy access to DLR and Excel Cost of breakfast extortionate so did not have this

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: N A  I don t normal travel alone and I was made to feel very welcome Perfect location beautiful room and facilities the best hotel breakfast I ve had in a long time Great restaurant I also got an amazing deal through booking com and paid less for this 5 than some Premier Inn s nothing against them however

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Room service changing prices on drinks each time they were ordered Also we asked if tap water was free the staff said yes yet they added a price to the bill for the water   Nice buffet breakfast and the most comfortable double bed

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Expensive breakfast so went elsewhere  Easy to get to fro from the West End on tube DLR Comfy rooms friendly staff nice bar for a late night drink Overall an excellent hotel for a good weekend price

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Everything was great The hotel is located in a business area and once you have access to a big shopping mall you can easily get to London s landmarks by subway in about 30 minutes

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: If you are put in a room overlooking the railway it is noisy despite the double glazing Also could hear people in the next room   The beds were comfortable and the room was a good size

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: There was nothing that I didn t like about my stay Everything was excellent   The room was clean and very comfortable The breakfast was delicious and the staff very helpful

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: There were two small rips in the sheet on the bed Not what you would expect from a 5 hotel A 10 minute queue for breakfast   Located close to the DLR and other facilities in the Docklands Staff are very attentive

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Excellent experience I don t usually write reviews but I thought I had to with this one As it was my partners birthday I requested a little something not thinking I would be garunteed anything and we got upgraded rooms and a box of chocolates kindly delivered to our door Staff were exceptional and had an all round wonderful experience

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: No free wifi in room just in lobby stayed previous night in a small hotel same price was free there Had to que ages for breakfast as was busy and then kept running out of dishes felt rushed   Clean and comfortable spacious room with all amenities staff polite Lovely English breakfast

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: When I booked the room I requested a quiet area floor so they gave us a room with an interconnecting door and we could hear the group of girls in there at 4am and next to the DLR track which woke us up at 7am Then as my husband came out of the bathroom a panel fell from the ceiling Luckily it didn t hit him but it was metal and had sharp edges it could have injured someone if they d been underneath it The other issue was breakfast Because the hotel was full the queue was so long they even extended breakfast time to midday but that didn t help as everyone wanted to dine at the same time Also some of the food wasn t being replenished quick enough to cope with demand   The room was quite comfortable and clean and the breakfast was pretty tasty The reception staff were very friendly and acted quickly on the ceiling incident

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Good location in Canary Wharf close to the river shops bars and restaurants Also close to the DLR and has a car park across the road with reasonable rates for London parking

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Our room on deal wasn t as new as we expected from Marriott But the deal was so good so I don t have right to complain   Location is great I love this part of London Docklands Just few stops from everything and quite on weekends Breakfast was great Staff is always friendly

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Would have been great to have a swimming pool   The staff were extremely helpful in all departments The hotel seemed very quiet despite being full Breakfast and bar meals plentiful

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Expensive breakfast 25 or is that normal for London   Very geared up for the London Marathon and great location to get to the start Staff very good Rooms large quiet and comfy Great bar

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: just wish you had your own car park never feel comfortable leaving it on a carpark where we cant see it  we went to see my daughter run the marathon and we wanted a late checkout because of this and the manager was very good in letting us have it we would definately recommend this Marriot to our friends who travel to London quite alot the breakfast was lovely and the staff very polite

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Bar meal wasn t good but you were very quick to compensate Drafty windows in bar Drinking chocolate in rooms would have been nice so would another pack of biscuits   Your staff were truly excellent

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Nothing  We stayed with our daughter who was running the London Marathon the next day The hotel staff had gone out of their way to provide a real welcome to the athletes including a goody bag on arrival special high carb menus and bananas and water to take to the race

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: We stayed here the night before running the London Marathon and the staff could not have been more accomodating A runners goody bag on arrival which had been well thought out a special offer runners breakfast and helpful kind staff wishing all us nervous runners good luck None of it was essential bit hugely appreciated

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: We only had one nights stay   The Customer Service was exceptional from Housekeeping to Front of House The beds are extremely comfortable and the cleanliness of the rooms remarkable We ate dinner in the Manhatten Grill and all agreed that the restaurant was good value for money Breakfast had a wide variety to choose from It was quite impressive In all it was a fabulous choice for my Father s 70th Birthday

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Breakfast was set up in the bar area food on the bar and low tables to eat on Not sure if we missed the proper breakfast set up elsewhere   Quiet comfy room Lovely view Easy access to O2 and tube

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Side view was ok but would have preferred a front view out of window the hotel was quite far out from where we needed to be but we chose it for value shame the other marriotts aren t as good value  I always sleep well in a Marriott bed very good value for money breakfast tasted good

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: There was no extra quilt blanket I was freezing at night Paid cash in the bar they did not return the change assuming it was a tip I don t think that is polite  The toiletries were nice room was nice and comfortable Reception staff were lovely and warned us of the DLR stoppage and helped arrange a taxi

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The bed was huge and the staff were extremely attentive Can t find any faults at all as the location was perfect for us and the cleanliness of the hotel was immaculate

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Had a room on the first floor above a function room holding a wedding reception Bass from the music was shaking the room Why didn t they put the wedding guests in these rooms Receptionist speedily helped us out though and got us moved to a quieter room Also disappointed with gin bar Loud music and football on the TV s in the evenings was not what we expected Thought it would be more laid back and quiet like it was in the afternoons   Good location Really helpful friendly staff good sized comfy room

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: There were some but inexpensive lack of attention to detail issues in housekeeping for room I do not drink tea earl grey or breakfast tea no alternative was left hotchocolate or green tea 1 pack of biscuits for 2 person lack of translucent windows in our room opaque windows   Staff extremely polite helpful a c welcoming Room and hotel very clean Breakfast choice and service good

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The breakfast was good rather than great I hate having to make my own toast my breakfast got cold as I had to put the bread in several times   The gin bar was amazing with very knowledgeable recommendations

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The only negative of the hotel was the fact that we could not get the shower to run warm enough Water in the basin was hot enough but the mixer on the shower only just reached a usable temperature Limited us to a 90 second shower before it became uncomfortable   The facilities were well presented and clean with well kept rooms

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Breakfast food was not at all nice My wife had scrambled eggs and found them inedible I opted for the full English and the bacon was horrible We both ended up switching to continental Facilities were basic Would rate it as a good 3 star hotel based on other marriotts we have stayed in Staff were very nice though and helpful   Proximity to the O2 which was the reason for our trip

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Everything plus we got upgraded buzzing bar location is fab close to access the O2 Walking distance to the shops great facilities and yet very quiet at night

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The mezzanine room they gave me was a little run down it could do with some updating Don t expect great views to come with rooms at the lower floors   The location is great it look me about 20 25 mins to get to St Pancras by tube The staff are all pleasant and very helpful

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: N a  The staff were really helpful and nothing was too much for them the location was excellent close to shopping mall restaurants and a short walk from canary whalf tube station The hotel was secure as you need to use your room key in the lift so no one could randomly walk in and gain access

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Would ve liked it if gluten free was more prominent in the restaurant for breakfast found a scant few items hidden in a corner   Beds comfy rooms spacious check in efficient Liked the space in fridge for your own items very handy

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Everything was perfect We felt very special Lovely comfy pillows Room was so quiet with quay view Spoilt for choice at breakfast and all lovely quality

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Wifi was poor in the room but not a big problem for our stay as we were out most of the time   Comfortable and clean with very friendly attentive staff

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Nothing all good   Checking in and out was straight forward I would like to say that the doorman was very helpful providing assistance with where to park and also informing us and dealing with getting a reduction on our parking cost Thanks

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Nothing this is a first class hotel  Staff at every level were clearly enjoying their work and this created a warm and welcoming atmosphere The hotel is modern the rooms are quite spacious and clean Proximity to Docklands Light Railway made access very easy The B B rate for our weekend was exceptional value for money don t know how often it will be available but when it is we ll be back

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The room s outlook over the railway tracks wheelie bins and building site was really poor and the DLR woke us up very early The staff were so efficient they cleared our breakfast away before we returned with the hot food Which sadly wasn t that hot The only good thing at breakfast was that they cooked eggs to order The coffee was way too strong   The bed was comfortable and the bathroom clean although the step was disconcerting They forewarned me about the room location when I arrived but they had nothing else to offer

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Room was a bit stuffy no windiws opened an air con didnt do much pricesof minibbar was so exspensive i was scared to even touch it 4 POUND odd for a minuture vodka no thanks an 2 pound odd for a normal size snickers an a DEPOSIT as u get to reception that took a week to return to me sorry im not a theif makes u feel like ur untrustworthy  Beds were so comfy and staff were very pleasant lovely surroundings dock an mall jus seconds away tube station just above

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Nothing to dislike   The greeting as we arrived the offer of chocolate truffle while waiting to check in comfy bed pillows cleanliness nothing not to like fantastic experience

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: I felt the decor of the rooms were a little outdated in comparison to the communal areas of the hotel The mustardy yellowy tones of the rooms felt a little old fashioned   We held our mums 60th birthday here in the mezzanine of the Manhatten Bar Grill The staff that served us that evening were absolutely fabulous Robert Klopper and Rob The shower was lovely which is unusual in big hotels like that in my experience The food for our dinner was absolutely gorgeous and all compliments to the chef The bar area was lovely too Also wonderful views of the river from my room

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: It was amazing It was our anniversary and the hotel decorated the room for us with rose petals on the bed balloons and prosecco The next morning we had breakfast in bed I will definately come back Thank you for a lovely stay

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Dined at the Manhatten Grill one evening and the service was rather slow to start but food was fab   Lovely hotel located in a super place with easy access to central London Courteous friendly staff and service with a smile

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: I felt the reception staff could have been more flexible over payment methods however perhaps they were just following managerial protocol   The views over the Quay 24 7 in room services gymnasium The Manhattan Grill Comfortable bedding Decor The well stocked in room refrigerator I liked being offered a loan of a hotel umbrella

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Could not find any faults   We were made to feel very special All staff spoke to us and were friendly My request for a view for my husbands birthday was met and a lovely unexpected gift was left in room for him Dinner in restaurant was delicious Service in bar was excellent

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Very friendly and helpful staff Nice little Easter touch of complimentary Easter sweets and drink from staff in the Reception area whilst waiting Lovely comfy beds with a hight standard of cleanliness Great overnight stay with family

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The razor socket was broken there was black mould around the bath support and one of the lamp shades was damaged   The room was a good size it was quiet

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The only thing I would mention was that we felt the breakfast was a bit pricey   We usually try stay at this hotel as we particularly like the location very near to the O2 The beds are also extra comfy All the staff are very welcoming super efficient

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Decor was a little dated Water pressure was not good so the shower was a disappointment There are better hotels in the area for similar prices or cheaper  Clean and comfortable

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: As above any problem was solved quickly   Had a slight problem with our room not being ready and we were offered a disabled room Then another with the air conditioning stuck on That said when we went back to reception to say this was not suitable we were given an upgrade to a lovely room on the sixth floor with great views Sara in reception was lovely and a credit to the company Breakfast was awesome and the chocolate bunny by the bed for Easter was a nice touch

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: As a young family we had to came back to the hotel room early and were quite disappointed as we wanted to experience a couple of London s restaurants but had to put the children to bed so chose to stay in and order a variety of things from a couple of nearby restaurants we called down to room service to ask if they could bring us up some cutlery and plates pretty simple but they failed to do so after saying they would I m glad we didn t wait for them because I would have been annoyed if our food had turned cold as well Apart from that the staff were very friendly and accommodating to our little ones giving my two year old lots of attention and treating her to a little cup of fruit punch it was very sweet   Was happy with the hotel it was a great location and the staff in person were lovely

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Dirty windows ruined the view slightly  Good buffet breakfast and especially good omelette Good location for a visit to the O2 and with Cabot mall being just over the quay it makes for a good stroll around

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Not a thing  First time visiting this part of London as attending a event at the O2 arena Cannot fault the location and comfort of the hotel Have already recommended it to friends and family

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Poor cleaning of room bin not emptied and poor cleaning of bathroom Charge of 100 00 deposit like a previous customer said makes you feel like a thief and for what water that in a supermarket costs 90p and in the hotel 2 50 A snickers bar costing 3 00 why an earth would we have them at such extortionist prices the hotel need to get real The view from the window looking at the DRL underground trains go by   The bed very big and comfortable Staff on the reception area were very helpful Lovely breakfast

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Very expensive food and drink breakfast 22 pounds each no thanks went to Wetherspoon 4 79 each   Great location for shops and bars restaurants and the 02 one stop on the underground

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The bed sheets were dirty with old stains on them The hotel was difficult to find through a maze of a shopping centre as the bridge was closed   The staff were friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: First of all i prefer to leave a deposit of cash instead on my card that should be optional for customers second the beds was not comfortable at all did not get a good night sleep   they made sure a sofa bed was already in room

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The heating in our room would not work it was very hot and by the time we figured that no matter what we did to the dial it made no difference we only had one day left When we reported it they offered to move us as they knew there was a problem but for one day it was not worth it Maybe an upgrade when we next stay would be nice   We were late for breakfast on our last day I asked at the breakfast station for a waffle I was informed it would be 3 minutes The waitress told me to sit down and she would bring it when it was ready I was expecting 2 quarter waffles and some syrup instead I had the waffles some fresh fruit strawberries raspberries etc the syrup and a large portion of clotted cream Even though we were the last ones there they went to the trouble of giving me a really lovely breakfast with no indications that they wanted us to eat up quickly A lovely end to our stay

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: No bath robes and having to get several trains into london  The hotel was very nice and staff very help full Several eating and drinking places close by and a great shopping mall on the door step The Big Easy serve good sea food and there is a nice garden inside

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Not enough teabags or milk It would have been nice to have had a loo brush to clean the loo after use Staff excellent except in the bar The bar staff ignored us and it took along time to get served we nearly gave up Bar prices were very steep too DLR trains were very noisy even on the 4th floor So slee was disturbed another time I would bring earplugs and put the radio on to mask the rumbling   Lovely comfy beds Super breakfasts and excellent staff in the reception and breakfast room Great choice of food very enjoyable time each day

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: room was stiffling and had no windows air con was noisy but utterly ineffectual loveey experience spoiled by room being much too hot   the welcome the receptionist the overall wow factor breakfast was to die for and the waiting staff were superb

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The staff were overly attentive in the reception area and yet in the restaurant at breakfast there never seemed to be enough staff and the ones who were there seemed overworked very stressed they seemed to be doing their best in difficult circumstances  Location easy to find

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Room was Alittle cold but didn t make a comment at the time so obviously wasn t that bad Location good but no obvious where it is when u come off of west India quay dlr  Staff were lovely and friendly Let us check in earlier than planned

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: It would have been nice to have a riverside room We got a limited view from ours but we were able to check in early so thanks very much for that   We chose Mariott in special memory of a dearly beloved family member Reception at front desk was supurb Food was fantastic Thoroughly enjoyed the grills at Manhattan Orange juice at breakfast was a bit watered down too much though We felt at home in our room bed was very very comfortable and having free alcohol drinks in the club lounge was a lovely surprise and an added bonus

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Room aircon not working and Windows did not open So stuffy No plug for sink   Lovely linen and comfy bed Staff extremely pleasant Very easy to travel to

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Staff were superb Location superb perfectly situated for O2 Canary Wharf and a superb Tapas Bar 100 yards away I will definitely stay again Staff very welcoming on arrival

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: rooms didn t have very good views so bit disappointment for my kids and also expensive parking in the area  good breakfast very friendly staff from doormen staff to reception staff to restaurant staff all staff very friendly and helpful and very good service thank you

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: From check in to check out and a night in the bar inbetween the staff were really friendly efficient and really helpful Location is great for the O2 City Airport and the great shopping and eating around Canary Wharf If you want to escape the tourist trappings of central London this is a perfect alternative

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The reception was like the Hilton the room was like Travelodge 3 50 for a bowl of crisps plus a service charge Breakfast was ordinary and not value for money   The location

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: old furniture very bad wi fi I had to beg the personnel for slippers and bathrobe this is unacceptable for a 5 hotel very bad TV channels selection very basic hygiene products in the bathroom extremely expensive for the offered quality of the services   Nothing I will never stay at this hotel ever I may avoid Marriott locations in all places I will travel

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: new table mats in breakfast room looked like splattered with paint towels in the room a bit worn asked for extra butter finished toast and still no butter  view bed comfy

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: we all had a disturbed night with the mono rail squeaking breaks   brought my elderly parents for the weekend perfect for them with access to city and plenty of eating places nearby they loved it thank you breakfast was great and the staff around the hotel were so helpful especially with my parents will definately be back

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: We were on the 8th floor overlooking West India Quay train station which was a little noisy   Lovely hotel and staff very attentive Had emailed hotel to let them know it was my 6 year old sons birthday they left cake a birthday message which was a nice touch Restaurants bars within walking distance Nice to get ferry into city centre for change from tubes Great value for money

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Photographs of the suites show ipod docks and numerous pillows We stay often and I have never seen a dock We had two pillows on a superking bed We had to request more which did turn up by the time we returned to the room   We upgraded to a suite The view was fab and the beds were comfy We ordered breakfast in the room as it can be seriously busy in the restaurant in the mornings the breakfast which was delivered was amazing and too much for us to eat The location is great with bars and places to eat around and also close to the tube and DLR Staff are always very helpful and friendly Parking very close by is a bonus

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: There were a couple of very minor points I could raise but in all honesty to find fault in any way would be picky in the extreme   I m not really used to staying in such a wonderful luxury hotel and it certainly didn t disappoint From the friendly staff to the quality and cleanliness of the room to the extensive breakfast it was excellent Thank you

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: asked for higher room but had first floor corner with train line looking straight in my room Breakfast wasn t included  Great facilities especially the entrance reception bar and restaurant

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: So impressed with the size of the room we were allocated a corner room which was lovely The veiw was also excellent had a veiw of the water at no extra cost

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: no parking there is a close car park but we came in my hubby s work van and we couldnt find anywhere to park that we could fit in so we had to walk miles with our heavy bags   staff were amazing rooms were clean and view was amazing

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: I think the rooms are a little pricey for a room only basis but I guess it is London   The bar all the gins were amazing The rooms were big clean and all you could ask for Close to lots of lovely restaurants and rail links We were here for an event at the o2 and it was really close which was fantastic

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Very attentive staff we had some room issues which they resolved quickly and went out of their way to ensure we were happy when we checked out Breakfast pricey but it s London after all and to be fair it was very good

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Room upgraded great however Previous guests rubbish in bin message on card elite members card and alpro soya carton of milk   Great location Room upgraded from standard to a room with a view over the water Brilliant receptionists and door staff really helpful

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Could really benefit from a pool and although hotel great we were on the 1st floor and view not great even though I booked some time in advance and asked for higher level room  Location Check out time and biggest bed

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Fab breakfast lovely hotel staff were amazing inviting and friendly with a very professional service the best staff service I have recieved the rooms were perfect for family of 4 with 2 double beds and the executive lounge was a nice treat kids loved the stay

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The check in clerk was very abrupt and did not fully explain that he was taking 100 per room for 3 rooms as a security deposit which was something I had no prior knowledge of which could have affected me if I did not have this available on my card Also we requested high rooms but were told on our booking we could only have low rooms We did feel slightly like 2nd class guests as we had not booked direct   The staff were excellent and overall the hotel was fine would have liked rooms close together as we requested but as the hotel was full this was not possible

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: I do not have any negative things to add   I only had a short stay however the bed and linen were very comfortable The room was clean and adequately furnished Service in the restaurant was friendly and quick together with the food being good I enjoyed my stay

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The breakfast was burnt and it was served to me burnt an there was missing other stuff that was Ment to accompany my breakfast and yet it was served to me without that being explained Not only that my burger was over cooked and hard and burnt Aswell   The bed was fine clean room

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: No fault of the hotel but the footbridge was closed for essential maintenance making tube access a little more tricky than normal here  Second stay here and it was once again excellent Rooms very clean and comfortable Very busy doing other things so didn t really see much of the hotel but staff were very friendly and efficient

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Maybe the pillows were a little to soft but its personal preference   Everything The location easy link to the city and to Canary Wharf The room and room facilities were excellent The staff were the most efficient and friendly of any hotel that we have ever stayed in

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Nothing  Excellent position 15 mins into central London on tube beds extremely comfortable and staff excellent would stay there again Loved it

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Executive floor lift is a little flaky   Second time at hotel and my recollection was well founded Great weekend hotel and superb location And the breakfast alone is worth the trip

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Would have liked free Wi Fi without joining their membership scheme Room took a while to warm up   Staff in the bar were extremely helpful with getting dinner to me quickly

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The breakfast was slightly disappointing as many things were not available   Everything We were delighted with our room with a waterfront view Also pleasantly surprised to receive a complementary bottle of wine and chocolate cake with fresh fruit D It made our stay extra special well done Marriott

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: I could not find any thing to criticise they run this hotel like clockwork 24 hours a day even free WiFi   From Book in to check out this break was excellent staff could not do enough very attentive service service service Room was massive bed so comfortable slept like a baby Must mention the breakfast was superb I could not fault any thing Dinner both nights superb thank you Marriott you will see me again

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: There are infrastructure problems Mold in the bathroom The rooms are cold There was a plumbing problem in the toilet in both rooms we had Breakfast is OK On Sunday there were mini bagels and they were hard as stone We thought they are crackers but the next day the brought fresh once and they were fresh and soft They charge for WiFi The coffee they serve is awful The tea was great   The desk manager did his best to improve our experience and succeed Generally speaking all staff members we encountered were just great So the service is the best attribute of this hotel We are going to come back to this hotel mostly because they are doing their best to be better and we trust them that they will

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: We were given a disabled room as an option either that or a room that overlooked the train line Took the disabled room option and it was okay However I thought it would be a nicer room with the amount paid for it The room was large although we couldn t open the windows which made the room a little stuffy The air con wasn t great and the charges for the mini bar were huge As there were two guests two bottles of water would have been better than one as that was quickly drank due to it being stuffy   The staff were lovely very friendly Good location for the O2 Fab welcome with a rose being offered on arrival along with homemade chocolates and fruit punch Nice touch Staff couldn t do enough when it came to directions and if they could do anything

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Having to leave   Nothing to fault Breakfast was amazing haven t seen that much choice in ages Staff very friendly and attentive lovely big room with massive bed very comfy mattress and super soft pillows we had a water view from our room which we paid for but was nice to see outside

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Bed was amazing room was perfect staff were very helpful even the hall porter There s a touch of class and it feels very high end in a great location but without the price tag Overall we got an absolute bargain will definitely be looking at staying there again We stay in hotels quite frequently and nothing s matched London Marriott West India Quay so far Very Happy customers

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: I couldn t find fault or see any room for improvement   Very attentive staff coupled with fantastic food and unrivalled comfort was the cornerstone of a fantastic weekend break

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Nothing   The staff were so welcoming and nothing was too much trouble They even left chocolates in the room as we d mentioned it was a birthday celebration trip We felt well looked after

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The room we had 214 was directly next to the railway with the train headlights lighting up the room and noises going on until early morning With passengers at eye level viewing directly into the toom when in the station from 10 metres away It made for a dark and morbid hotel room Sadly we were given this room even though the hitel was not at full capasity   The location is great

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Always a check in queue The bedrooms are dated not very contemporary need modernising No separate shower not really 5 standards  Great location for tube nice restaurant bar with outside area friendly staff

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: N A  Lovely king size bed comfy with soft white bedding Fantastic view of the River Large room Staff friendly attentive without being irritating Really enjoyed our stay Victoria checked us in and she was lovely and accommodating to our wishes Good choice at breakfast

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The Quality of the bathroom Shower over the bath The food in the restaurant Extremely poor quality Very overpriced   Central location Staff The Gin bar Beds

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Only enough milk and coffee for one drink a day   The room was very quiet The towels and bedding were in very good condition Room very comfortable Easy access to tube restaurants and shops

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: It is immediately adjacent to a DLR station and less than 10 minutes from Canary Wharf tube station Breakfast was excellent and staff are very friendly For a weekend stay at least it was good value Decor is to a high standard

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Some people kept on knocking my room door and running away But I would say it s not the fault of the hotel but the just some of the guests that were staying there a the time  The breakfast was amazing as well as the room The staff has the best of manners as well

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Tv dint have the children s channel after 5pm not enough channels kids movie channels Missed having bathrobes and slippers Dint have a good view as we were facing the station as well and had to keep the curtains closed during our stay which was a shame   Excellent staff extremely helpful comfortable room and breakfast excellent Hopefully a room with better view next time

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Great location Fantastic Staff all very helpful and very friendly great bar and restaurant Added bonus we met Mark Noble before the west ham man city game

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Everything was perfect  The Guest relations manager Fanny Hanisch was an absolute delight to be in contact with She really ensured that everything was perfect for me and my girlfriend upon arrival Before arrival she was always on hand to answer any questions I had and she most definitely went above and beyond for us I can t stress enough how great she was

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Nothing just would have liked to stay longer   Whole stay was fabulous from the start at reception offering chocolates while we were waiting to the bar staff the room was superb an overall excellent experience

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The breakfast service was chaotic at times A large queue formed at the door for tables at both 9am later did not appear to be enough tables for the size of the hotel   Location very good easily reachable by tube river taxi The bedding pillows were excellent luxurious

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Booked this hotel for Christmas Eve trip to the theatre etc Hotel staff were welcoming and nothing was too much for them right next to the tube station and close to Canary Wharf which made a lovely Christmas morning walk seeing historic parts of London in a leisurely pace Once we checked out they seemed in no hurry for us to leave and our meal in the G and t bar was exceptional NCP parking is a three minute walk from the hotel would I use this hotel again Oh yes

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: No access via stairs Only a lift Expected But very expensive for drinks 20 70 for a single vodka and a beer Location of the hotel wasn t fantastic Not much to do locally Either needed to use DLR or use a taxi  Staff were amazing Food was fabulous Breakfast was on time as we requested and could feed 6 people Room service was brilliant and fairly priced The hotel in general was lovely Close to the DLR Very quite location

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: No bad experience Just found it difficult to locate the hotel initially Secondly i had to pay for the movie i watched I wasn t informed about this tho However it was a wonderful experience with Marriot  I liked everything

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: It s not in the most convenient place although if you travel on trains underground then you can literally fall out of bed onto a train that connects as most of them do   Staff were amazing nothing was too much trouble Really good room with views of the water Loved it

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: No free wifi at all in room only in lobby Rather miserable in this day and age Allocated 1st floor room so no view apparently no others with a king size bed as requested available   Location and proximity to DLR

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The Manhattan Grill Poor choice and expensive Salmon was 16 Yes one fillet 16 No veg or anything else just a fillet on an otherwise bare white plate If you eat the salmon from the room service menu at least you get some potato on the side and pay less The rest of the menu was essentially burgers and ribs and little else really The restaurant used to be OK but from now on we ll go out to eat Breakfast can be found locally for a lot less too   Clean really comfy bed good location for the DLR and helpful and friendly staff Had a waterside room so a better view than those at the front of the hotel Nice little touches when they knew it was a special occasion too

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Nothing I didn t like about the hotel   Staff were helpful informative and friendly rooms were clean well presented with great amenities Breakfast was excellent and plenty of it Buffet style could also have a glass of champagne for a small charge I used the hotel for ease of access to the Excel arena it was perfect Underground station and DLR where close by also Lots of food and drink restaurants and bars near by Overall fantastic I d recommend this hotel to anyone

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Airless room with sealed windows Very limited eating facilities I ordered a salad at the bar which turned out to be six bits of beetroot and a small chunk of cheese for 10 plus service Service should be at the discretion of the customer not compulsory One small bottle of complimentary mineral water in the room between two people Sauna purported to be 24 hours but wasn t on when I arrived at 4pm No staff in sight Managed to find a porter who helped me to turn the sauna on and then came out to a luke warm shower

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The card key sometimes I could not get it to work in lift room door View from room was not brilliant   We liked the friendliness of the staff being treated like VIP s Royalty Amazing breakfast Definatly use The Marriott again

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Outside the gates of charming old London moving from the old to the new is the delightfully trendy high rise London Marriott Hotel West India Quay centrally situated in the modern business district of Canary Wharf Stylish social bars and coffee shops are in abundance in the area conveniently located close to the tube station and all other forms of transport This is the new London albeit with old money and sustenance it is fresh hip sophisticated and so the hub of London s youthful intellect The pleasing friendliness of the hotel staff all quick to explain quick to assist the splendid and generous breakfasts and defined taste in food generosity in size and luxury of room furnishings outstanding facilities as well as the stunning views of the Thames totally makes this hotel a winner It is indeed affordable luxury at its best London can easily become addictive for me a certainty to return to London and so effortlessly to the Marriott

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: I felt it inappropriate to have a female guest having breakfast in gym shorts and top she was overheard stating she had showered but was still in the clothes she exercised in had she returned to her room she surely would have dressed more suitable fr a dining room  hotel staff very helpful informative and courteous Bedroom and public areas spotlessly clean Good variety of food at breakfast

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Booked a double room on arrival was given a twin double room additional space was much appreciated Pleasant surprise was seeing Newcastle United in the foyer next morning

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The restaurant at breakfast time was badly organised with inexperienced staff Dirty open plan kitchen which is not what you would expect from a five star hotel Restaurant staff arguing in front of customers which is not very professional   The hotel is overall very good and what you expect at every Marriott hotel

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Only criticism the steak knives in the Manhatten restaurant were huge and blunt they looked the part but didn t really do the job   lovely hotel Staff were amazing Evening meal in the Manhatten Grill fantastic Stayed for my partner s birthday and had a bottle of wine and chocolate cake waiting in the room on arrival nice touch Would recommend this hotel Plus if you re a gin lover the G and T bar is a must
