Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: My only disappointment was the room it didn t match up with the service and the rest of the hotel It was very dated and needed redecorating massively Final touches for me are important things like a large choice of teas in the room hot chocolate biscuits and enough sugar provided for more than one drink none of which was the case in our room   The welcome we got was lovely Very friendly informative staff and chocolate offered upon check in Location was good too close to some really lovely shops and restaurants The bed was really comfy

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Appeared to be alot of younger staff members who were perhaps not as confident as they could have been when interacting with guests  Considering the location and proximity to road rail links extremely comfortable and quiet room Although very busy at breakfast time seated and served very efficiently

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: time we waited for breakfast was too long almost one hour of being sat down we had our food and that was after complaining for a 40 min wait but the head waiter was very good and give it complementary  good all round hotel to stay

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Just the interruption in sleep even though we had a nice view of the river we was also woken kept up by the Canary Wharf station   Staff were very attentive when we said that we were leaving too early for breakfast asked for a wake up call chap at the desk said he would sort a breakfast box for us We heard a whining noise from out in the hall which went on for a while and it was quite late Rung the desk and someone was up within a minute but the noise had stopped Always the way

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Citytrip with 4 nights stay in the hotel Great location to go with the tube to the center 10 15min Excellent english breakfast and helpful personnel

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Upon arrival the hotel had no reservation for us To say this is a Marriott hotel I have stayed in nicer 3 s however when emailing to give my thoughts I was made aware that the hotel was currently being refurbished The response given was that they would like to welcome us back soon I don t think so Definitely not a 5 hotel though   The staff were polite friendly and very helpful Although no reservation could be found the staff sorted us a room straight away exactly like the one we had reserved and also when asked about the location things to do etc they were very knowledgeable and helpful printing off leaflets and maps for us Location has easy access to the rail network to get wherever we needed in London

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The breakfast was very poor and the tables were squashed in together to such an extent that it was very uncomfortable Hotel dealt well with our complaint about this and refunded us 60   Great room Spotlessly clean Lovely view of the quay Great location

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Hotel staff put us in a substandard room overlooking a brick wall where the paint was peeling off the furniture We asked to change rooms where they put us in a better room OVER PRICED

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: N A  Excellent short break after our honeymoon Both teachers who needed a short break and the hotel could not have done enough for us Warm welcoming and made our trip so easy for us to enjoy

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Nothing bad   It was our anniversary and the upgraded us free to charge to one of their largest suites Fantastic stay champagne on arrival I really didn t expect it and I would definitely recommend them

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The staff were happy to help with anything On arrival I explained that the trip was for my boyfriend s 21st birthday and asked if anything could be done to make our stay more special We were upgraded without question and the fact the staff happily went the extra mile was brilliant The hotel was beautiful clean and in a great location we would love to return soon

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: We had a room with an adjoining door Not a problem for us but the neighbour wasn t happy with our crying baby Might be better to give families with infants rooms that are a little more soundproof for the comfort of other guests  Amazing location and great as a base Breakfast till 12

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Even though we couldn t really hear the trains the hotel is overlooking the DLR meaning views where a little spoiled but not a big deal  Excellent comfy bed pillows where to die for Room service was speedy and tasty

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The staff upon a arrival were really friendly and helpful The room was was lovely would have preferred a river view but was only staying for the one night Breakfast was 10 10 the staff lovely and helpful wishing everyone a Merry Christmas will definitely stay here again

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: I didn t want to use my CC or DC and I knew that I have to make a 50 GBP deposit as guarantee I wanted to pay in cash as I had GBP already changed from euros They said that they are making an exception thing that it make me feel good but not when they asked to double the deposit from 50GBP for entire stay to double and for both nights which mean 200GBP This thing I didn t like it more as I was planning some shopping and Christmas gifts I found a silly rule that if you are looking in the fridge to see what is there and move one of the items you must pay them even if you are not consuming them Otherwise the stuff was very nice friendly and tried to help and do what they could do Hope this is helpfull to somebody   The hotel room was very nice same the location and the window view DLR station is just 1 min from the hotel Underground max 10 mins Breakfast very good quality Friendly stuff

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Nothing unbelievable customer service here   Exceptional hotel and service stayed there last December and couldn t fault it Absolutely love this place and location is brilliant for my needs

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The hotel needs a complete revamp this is not a five star hotel We booked an executive room the furniture was old and the chair dirty on the arms Staff were unfriendly and robots we have stayed in many five star hotels and this is not one  breakfast and executive lounge

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: lovely breakfast only bad point served on cold plates  the hotel staff could not be more help full night manager upgraded us with a better room and breakfast for not a lot extra as we travelled early morning very impressed

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: No free wifi in rooms   Very friendly and helpful reception staff Staff quickly brought us bath robes and slippers to use at the sauna when requested It was nice being able to use the sauna 24x7 Location great for Canary Wharf and very close to the DLR

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Poor bathroom equipment There was only one bar of soap and one shampoo for 2 people We were palmed off with a room at reception on arrival which did not meet my expectation of a superior room I was informed we might find it slightly noisy from DLR trains passing but it should not be a problem and we were not given or offered another room despite the hotel being half empty however it was noisy and suffered vibrations at every train passing on the 2nd day there was no soap or shampoo in our bathroom at 10 p m and we had to use our own emergency On departure we were not given any compensation   Friendly if a bit rigid staff and amenities

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Even though we booked on booking com we still paid the best part of 200 for the one night The room was adequate but we were given a room right at the side of the DLR station so close in fact you could see every detail of the travellers in the carts and hear the carts coming and going non stop We went down for some lunch in the bar we ordered 2 Club sandwiches with chips a pint and a lemonade We given the bill before the food arrived it was 37 Expecting the food to be great quality considering it was only a sandwich and the amount we had been charged for it was a huge disappointment It was a slice and I mean a slice of turkey with salad stacked like a club sandwich but most definitely not full like you d expect a club sandwich to be After being out for the night we went back to the bar for some drinks it was absolutely packed The bar had barely any staff on not enough to accommodate the amount of guests in the bar the boxing had been on so as you can imagine with hotel being so good for getting to the O2 it was full Some of the staff I m guessing managers just stood around not helping what so ever rather telling the other members of staff rushed off there feet what to do Eventually it got to much and we went up to the room and ordered room service we ordered the fish chips which wasn t to bad but definitely not worth the 15 each and having to pay 9 for the luxury of eating it on the bed 6 for room service and 3 for the tray it was delivered on Im not one to write on things like this but with being disappointed with the quality I was given for the amount paid I had to say something We have recently been to Newcastle for a show as well and stayed in a Crowne Plaza for less than half the price as this and that was absolutely amazing the nicest and fanciest hotel I have stayed in   The location of the hotel is great for transport It s right at the side of the DLR station and a 10minute walk away from the underground which is one stop away from the O2 arena The breakfast which was a help yourself buffet was lovely

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The fact we got upgraded because our room wasn t ready and we needed to get ready and go out ASAP was lovely I literally couldn t fault anything apart from there wasn t a toilet brush in the room But the hotel was amazing if I was going to the O2 again I would not hesitate to stay here again staying at another hotel would never cross my mind And what can I say about the breakfast so much option so tasty and I would return just to have breakfast Thank you for an amazing stay really made our weekend

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: None  Very welcoming and helpful Ideal location in Canary Wharf right next to the shopping centre bars and restaurants only one stop from the 02 arena on the underground which was ideal for us as we went for the Boxing also Breakfast the following morning was very good

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Expensive breakfast so we didn t have any at the hotel and added service charge for drinks  Close to the O2 nice area lovely rooms very comfortable staff friendly

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Noisy heating system n toilet blocked in room Very poor expensive breakfast served in room   Convenient location for getting into London n close to City airport

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Dated room interior breakfast below 5 quality especially frozen bread and pastry Outrageous Wi Fi prices   Staff very helpful made the stay very enjoyable

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Would have been expensive had I paid full price Especially with breakfast excluded  Beautiful views and great choice of bars and restaurants on the doorstep

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Put in disabled room after having booked in advance for quiet room Disabled facilities made it difficult to shower Plugholes filthy   Very friendly and helpful staff Very comfortable bed

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Could do with more shampoo one for each of us face cloths were a bit old looking but clean   Staff were really welcoming Great location for us really nice touches like hot chocolate and chocolate snowmen on arrival

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The location is fab Approx 25 mins to central London by tube including walk to and from hotel short walk to pier for the clipper and only 1 tube stop to O2 Everything you need on the doorstep shops bars entertainment etc Hotel is lovely We had a great room so quiet and open views Staff were utterly professional and helped us out with a problem without question Very clean and comfy We had a great weekend in London

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The staff were super friendly and polite Everyone smiled and nothing was too much trouble The beds were so comfortable with the softest pillows ever

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Breakfast 27 50 each is very expensive   We ve stayed at this hotel a few times and have always been impressed with the rooms and service great location for Canary Wharf shops and restaurants and a car park right next to hotel

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The staff were really attentive welcoming us or saying goodbye when we came and went also the door men there to carry suitcases was very nice Very comfy bed and good and powerful shower We found the lift a little confusing but had it sussed by the end of our short visit

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Bit pricey we stayed across the road for the same price for three nights last year and it was just as good Also didn t like the way the hotel was portrayed on the website with a photograph taken on the quayside the hotel is around the back and doesn t look particularly attractive on the outside but looks wonderful inside   Room was spacious clean staff were helpful professional Location was excellent the room was soundproof so we didn t hear the Train which is very close Lots of places to eat nearby too

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: We were asked if we wish to upgrade to executive and the price was fair so we did the executive suite from 5 30 9 30 pm was drink and food if you wanted it also included breakfast Well worth the extra 60 odd quid

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Breakfast second trip to hot food wasn t that great food was down to the last scraps and not all that good Spent first 5 minutes another couple and some other guy to figure out how to use the lift  The view was beautiful The bed was really nice and comfortable It all looked really chic yet stylishly modern

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: We had dinner in the Manhattan Grill which I felt was a little over priced The steak was a little average and the starters were too expensive The ambiance is lovely in the restaurant though   Great reception staff we were able to check in early and the luggage was taken to the room very quickly It is one of the quietest hotels I ve stayed in with no noisy neighbours and is a great location for Canary Wharf shopping as well as travelling to the centre Oxford Street which takes just 15 minutes on the Jubilee line This is also a fantastic location for the O2 which is just one stop away to North Greenwich

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: TV remote control wasn t working in the morning however after reporting it I am sure it would hae been rectified by the attentive Staff   Peaceful clean room in a great location Excellent value will stay again when within budget

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: We arrived at 09 30 and were able to be allocated a room which was very helpful Staff in the business centre were helpful when printing tickets Free Wi Fi at the weekend was good

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Towels are quite old in the bathroom no dressing gowns provided   Location is excellent rooms are very comfortable Staff very helpful do everything they can to please Excellent restaurant

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The expensive steak was overlooked and served barely warm v poor value dinner Wi Fi was down for most of our visit  The helpfulness of staff and the comfort of the pillows Breakfast menu fantastic and delightful staff

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Excellent situation and very professional staff who made us feel very welcome and couldn t do enough for us A great experience which we hope to repeat

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: I thought the breakfast was very poor the quality of the food very low and would expect better from a cafe Also the hair in my partners mushrooms was not pleasant at all Overall a let down with breakfast and left with no breakfast and hungry   The staff were excellent and attentive

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Check in took a ridiculous amount of time I have never experienced such a long drawn out process They couldn t cope at breakfast They had an offer for breakfast but the queue for tables was ridiculous I made my booking for end of October earlier in the year for 2 double rooms At check in I was told had 1 double and 1 twin bedded room When I queried saying I had requested 2 double rooms I was told that it was just a request and couldn t be guaranteed I said that surely bookings are first come first served and my booking was made much earlier in the year and surely not all the double rooms would have been reserved at that time I was told it didn t work like that I wonder then how does it work I don t think I would stay here again in a hurry If I book a double that is what I expect and do not expect to wait for 30 minutes for a table for 4 people at breakfast and the check in process That really does need to be reviewed   The hotel was very comfortable and clean with good facilities and a good location I have given the hotel a good rating as I have answered the questions honestly but wouldn t rush back to stay again The reasons for this are in the what I didn t like section

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: I couldn t find any faults we had a perfect stay   The room was luxurious and spacious with a fantastic view of Canary Wharf The service was better than excellent they made us feel very welcome Breakfast was very good too

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Housekeeping entered the room on three seperate occassions without knocking the door once at 4 30pm in the afternoon The restaurant service was very poor and we were infact charged twice for the bill  The hotel was clean and initially staff were friendly and welcoming

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Room not ready drinks very expensive and staff not very helpful on reception upon check in   The room was fantastic good view or the river Really comfortable bed and pillows etc think I might pop onto the shop Marriott website

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The restaurant was a total nightmare I waited 45 minutes for my food The waiter kept telling me it was coming and my pudding didnt even materialise   Lovely Hotel very comfy and modern The staff were very friendly

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: We were greeted with chocolates and a drink on our arrival The staff could not do enough to help Recommend this hotel if making a trip to London or a concert at the O2 Excellent shopping malls at Canary Wharf Plenty of good bars and restaurants nearby

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Room Service for breakfast was a bit disappointing but they did take it off the bill so all in all our stay was fabulous   Free upgrade without requesting it Very helpful and friendly staff Great location

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The hotel was obviously not full however as soon as they realised we had booked via booking at a 1 3 of the original price which was still not cheap only the rooms facing the railways were suddenly the only available rooms unless we paid a heavy supplement Disappointed that we were treated differently because of the way we booked   Breakfast was excellent and room clean and comfortable despite the train station outside our window

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: had dinner in hotel restaurant that was very expansive and portions were small also breakfast per person is too expansive  professional very polite and helpful staff clean and comfortable good location

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Lovely hotel We had the worst room possible for views as it overlooked the main air conditioning unit and DLR railway line even though I had requested a river view  I couldn t fault the hotel cleanliness or staff

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: I didn t think the room standard was a five star hotel We did have a leaky toilet in our room Big bed but wasn t that comfortable   It was clean and tidy excellent and friendly receptionist staff at checkin and check out And free wifi in all rooms Bar area is nice and cosy

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: If you are unlucky to be on the right side of the hotel you are going to get an early wake up call as there is a train station outside your window A real shame as the rest of the hotel ie very good   Easy access to the O2 and easy tube ride into the centre of London

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: When using room card for lift Recommend to remove card then press number I left card in and several trips up and down to different floor levels   The comfortable spacious room Heard very very little noise from the dlr Looked over the river Immaculate room

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Linited in room dining menu Lighting was too dim in room A few things did not work eg power sockets Face towels were grey and old not fluffy and white  Close to tube station and O2 arena Close to restaurants and shops Accommodating with early check in request Comfortable bed Friendly and polite staff

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The sink pipe leaked on the bathroom floor when we cleaned our teeth in the morning A bathroom light was faulty and constantly flickered on and off and the iron thermostat gauge was broken and this meant the iron remained too hot and melted through my chiffon blouse   Of the three members of staff I spoke to two were very helpful and they brought a complimentary birthday cake for my partner

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Breakfast was overpriced and drinks in the bar However bars and eateries around and street food good  Location was spacious and airy away from city confusion Good view of water

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Restaurants was humurous We booked a table and went at 7 15 They sat us at a table for two by the window nice we thought til we realised the air conditioning was above us so we asked to move The table next to us also moved Thereafter every person who came in was escorted to the same drafty tables and all asked to be moved Also the couple next to us left without paying when waitress went to get their billed a bottle of wine disappeared Caused a laugh but honestly the food didn t warrant the cost Afternoon lunch served in the bar was very good value and the chips were fabulous   Location Bedroom Afternoon tea

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The Marriott west india Quay advertises free Wifi The wifi that is for free is poor there are many hotels that offer free wifi that works I hope you will improve this false claim   The friendly efficient staff

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Was a little too close to the DLR noise wise but as it calmed down during the night it worked out fine in the end  Easy to get to and in a lovely location The staff were all friendly and very accommodating

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: hand face towles were a bit grey need fresh white ones we stayed two days and only had two breakfast tea bags not replaced whole stay tried earl grey but didnt like Need more tea bags   location

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: We come to stay in London every few months for a weekend break It has to be the best hotel we ve stayed in and staff were excellent Big thank you 5

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: There should have been a magnifying mirror in the bathroom The reading lamp above the bed could have been better situated for reading   Staff efficiency and comfort

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Me and my girlfriend stayed recently for a concert at the 02 We were greeted by two friendly members of staff at reception The hotel was very nice from the outside and inside and in a very nice location We were upgraded as soon as we arrived to an executive room and given complimentary food items also we ordered room service which arrived within 15 minutes at 3am fantastic hotel with a fantastic service 5 Star service and location

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Hotel restaurant is good but very pricey There is much better value elsewhere in the area   Location in an area full of restaurants and bars good transport links very good staff service

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: If you are flying from Heathrow there is roughly 1 15 minutes commute with the tube   It was excellent value for money and very quite since the weekend activity is low at Canary wharf

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Have stayed at West India Quay many times but not in the last 3 years Thoroughly enjoyed our stay not like on previous visits when the chiller was not working and nobody took responsibility to sort out the problem

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The room though very comfortable was no bigger and glamorous than a purple Lenny bed The TV was very standard too   Very friendly and helpful staff We arrived early and were able to check in at no extra cost and was given a choice of rooms depending on sound from the local DLR There was no cot setup in the room however it was swiftly delivered and resolved in 15 minutes

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The breakfast was too expensive and much better value a stones throw away at Browns  The staff were excellent The bed was so comfortable The location and view over wharf were ideal for our visit

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Great location for attending a concert at the O2 arena Also just a quick hop on the tube and you are in central London Lovely hotel and the staff could not do enough for us to ensure we had a great stay Will definitely stay again

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Not super luxury no pool and no fitness equipment No coffee machine in room TV Chanels are limited Breakfast choices is limited   Very friendly personnel as expected Good position to DLR and Jubeliee line beds are comfortable and services are good

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: My Expectation is that staff know what they are doing Many of the staff are not properly trained presentation is poor and they are unable to say sorry if things go wrong managers in particular blaming junior members of the team Generally slow service needs to be right and pickup the pace   Great location clean

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Didn t opt for the breakfast At 25 per head I consider this an exorbitant price for breakfast particularly given the price you pay per night in the hotel A delicious breakfast is available from surrounding restaurants for around 8 per head   The hotel is visually impressive the lobby area and rooms are presentable and well equipped with a very pleasant bar and restaurant area The location is a double edged sword fantastic to access both Docklands and Jubilee line trains within a few minutes walk however this does mean some less than attractive scenery from some rooms tube lines and concrete The other sides of the hotel however lead to a beautiful area well equipped with eateries and bars lining the river the delightful Cabot Place shopping centre and the square replete with fountains and seating Overall delightfully placed for seeing a side of London most tourists never see

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Breakfast was average and overpriced and drinks were very expensive 9 for an archers and lemonade plus service charge Asked for high floor overlooking water but was given a view of the DLR on the first floor   Room was nice comfortable bed clean everywhere Nice location ideally placed for the O2

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Far away from centre london I have ordered rooms with twin beds but they forget that and it was too late after that to do something   Very friendly staff warn welcome very good offer given Level Confort of the hotel

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Professional and helpful staff Fantastic building and room Great value for money They also made a complimentary birthday dessert for my girlfriend with happy birthday written in chocolate sauce which was a lovely surprise 5 stars

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Couldnrt get Wifi to work But Girl at reception girl was great at helping and very friendy   Liked the handiness for Canary Wharf and DLR Out of the Bizz but near enough

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: We ordered room service and I m sorry to say it was shocking The bill was 55 for haddock and chips burger and chips a double vodka and a cheesecake My complaint is the food It was barely warm the chips were anaemic looking and the fish was foul It tasted raw Wish I had returned it and asked for my money back Definitely not good value for money   Friendly courteous staff Room was excellent with twin double beds I took my 21 year old daughter Luxurious bed linen on an extremely comfortable bed Picturesque location Canary Wharf is extremely clean No litter nothing

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Nothing   The service Location tidy clean and the all blacks were there what a bonus Sam the concierge was great Knew it was sons wedding and sent complimentary wine to say congratulations wow how kind and all staff friendly awesome To be recommended We plan to stay in Marriott in Shanghai looking forever to it

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Very pricy at 140 per night but it certainly wasn t travelodge   The staff were very welcoming and friendly Upgraded me for the weekend to the executive floors Room was nice and clean Comfortable kingsize bed Fully functional air con Even had a member of staff pop round in the evening with complimentary chocolate We re very efficient with room service also Received discounted breakfast price on check in Great location and walkable to the tube and many restaurants along the river

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Extremely comfortable spacious room on 5th floor looking out over the water Superking size bed and plenty of pillows gave us a good night s sleep Easy access to DLR and decent pubs restaurants Parked opposite hotel at Vinci carpark 16 per day at weekend

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The lifts are very poor got stuck twice In the end used the back stairs which wasn t very pleasant   Convenient excellent helpful staff comfortable room

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: No where to relax Bar area was geared towards younger people and music was too loud Need to have a second quieter relaxation lounge not just a party zone For the price need to live and let live across all guest types  Facilities good except shower was not easy access in a disabled room Sides were too high

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Bit pricey when it came to certain things I ordered a Pepsi and it came to 4 50 which is extremely over priced   Staff were lovely and helpful Made us feel very welcome always smiling couldn t fault them

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: none really  They were very accommodating despite we landing up past midnight They ran out of some of the all night food so very graciously they waived the entire room service order which was an excellent and thoughtful gesture

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Problems with allocated room Faulty key mechanism and poor condition of the room Requested a room change and only option I had was to pay for an upgrade at 50 00 per night   Location

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: We were convinced to pay an extra 40 per room per night to upgrade at check in I m glad we did because we got free wi fi breakfast and a great room I think it is appalling that any hotel charges for wi fi in this age It is a basic necessity not a luxury and when you are paying top end room prices anyway it should come as standard not via an upgrade Upon receipt of my invoice under the door on the day of departure I realised we had been charged 40 per person per night not per room for the upgrade as agreed and we had also been charged for wi fi use even though the business centre had reconfirmed to us that we would not be charged This was all rectified without question at check out but caused an unnecessary unpleasant experience   Rooms are great beds always really comfortable Gin Bar is a lovely environment Gym is well equipped and always empty at the weekend in the morning lovely to have the place to myself

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Staff were extremely welcoming polite and helpful I was riding in the Prudential 100 on Sunday 2nd August so was not around on the Sunday morning to check out with my wife I was therefore most impressed that one member of staff took the time to carry our bag s to our car in the car park over the road great service We were also greeted with a welcome drink prior to checking in at reception Arrangements for bike storage were also excellent and very secure

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Had the DLR trains running right past our window Made for quite an unpleasant couple of evenings  Got a great deal so good value compared to other hotels in the area

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Gym is very basic Could not locate sauna Pity there is no swimming pool   Everything Staff were fantastic Breakfast superb Loved the Gin Bar especially those guys running it

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: They automatically charged the room to the credit card used for booking I hate this Booking com even provides a drop down tab to inform the hotel how you would like to pay which is obviously ignored by them The card used for the booking wasn t even in my name why would they assume that it is OK to charge it This a woefully antiquated custom and I d really expect more form a 5 star The decor is a bit ugly I ve stayed in numerous four and three star hotels with better interiors so I m not really sure where this extra star comes from because someone says Hello when you enter the main doors   Couldn t be cleaner

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: An Incidental Charge of 50 per night was added to our account and then released when checking out This extra 100 would then be returned 3 5 days after our departure something I find totally unacceptable   Good location for sightseeing in London

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The pillows used by Marriott Hotels now are too soft and are more of a cushion shape Aesthetically this may be more pleasing but is s bind when using them   Very helpful and pleasant Staff

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Dining options limited but there is a great choice outside of the hotel   Bed and room were excellent as was the shower Very well situated for Canary W and beside DLR station About 10 mins walk to Jubilee Line station

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: We were stopped outside the hotel at 11pm at night to show our hotel cards I believe 4 females should have been allowed inside to lobby to comply with this request very off putting to and RUDE We were all dressed respectable and looked honest and decent so I have no idea why they conduct this behaviour  Comfort and cleanliness

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The breakfast is too expensive  Great location for canary wharf station if going to the O2 arena the hotel is itself is immaculate and the staff are very helpful and friendly We will definately be staying here again

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: I had 3 reservations due to a few travels during this trip I was expecting the Marriott to notice that or at least add a note since I told them the first time I checked in Unfortunately they didn t every time I checked in my room was on a lower floor and less of a view   Location Convenience of breakfast included free wi fi for Marriott rewards members Front desk personnel very attentive and professional Great rates this time 50 off

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Excellent location for leisure and business alike Canary Wharf area eateries of every sort on your doorstep DLR tube and river service all to hand O2 which we came for just a short boat ride away avoiding the tube crush at end of show

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Having to pay for wifi in the room A top hotel should have free wifi every where  Staying in Canary Wharf excellent steak meal in the grill Good rail communications to other areas

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Stayed here numerous times but this one was the worst Normally great hotel but took forever for bags to arrive in the room and even called reception and then had to go down and ask as well No hot water in the afternoon for a shower   Location

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The staff were all very friendly and welcoming the hotel is in a beautiful quiet and trendy area with plenty of restaurants and right near the Thames The bed was extremely comfy I had the best nights sleep there

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: No paid wifi Pay per view movies very expensive 5 99 to watch Grease Really Might be an incentive if a number of the older releases were free to view   I was upgraded to an executive suite with view of water Sumptuous kingsize bed beautiful bedding Bathroom sparkling and toiletries luxurious Staff top rate can t do enough for you Great tea and coffee facilities mini bar and 24 hour room service including hot food meals Gorgeous lounge Optional full breakfast 15 but incredible selection of food as much as you wanted Hot and cold buffet style but you can request items such as omelettes I had a smoked salmon delightful View of restaurant again looking over water Top rate

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Sink plug did not work the ironing board marked my girlfriends top and the sausages at breakfast Apart from that everything else was fine   A very comfortable bed

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: WIFI connectivity in room did not really work and communication about whether it was included or not in price was unclear Breakfast is very elaborate but display is messy and with lots of children filling their plates it got more messy   Location is excellent for anyone who needs to be in Canary Warf Staff is VERY friendly and professional

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: The scrambled eggs not good   I was staying over the weekend of the Ride London Surrey 100 for the third year That must say something about how much I rate this hotel its staff and its facilities They are so geared up to meet the needs of keen cyclists many of whom have stupid o clock start times and so need an early breakfast Not many hotels will get staff in for 0430 and not charge anything extra either The whole experience makes for a hugely relaxing time apart from the ride

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: We stayed for the Ride London and we were very pleased with the attention to detail the hotel provided for the cyclists Security of the bikes and all the extras you provided Great weekend

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Took my bike for Ride London 100 and they set up a storage facility mechanic tools available hot towels water etc for all guests with bikes Brilliant service all round highly recommended

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Paying for Wifi and cost of breakfast is high especially if a family even with discount at 15 each   Staff staff and staff were absolutely fabulous We stayed for Ride London 100 and having a secure bike store was a great feature

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Stayed at the hotel in order to take part in Prudential London Surrey 100 Perfect location and facilities for this event Staff could not have been more helpful and being able to store our bikes securely and have the help of the mechanic Stuart was fantastic Many thanks hope to be staying with you again for the event next year

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Helpful staff going the extra mile to make us feel welcome The little extra touches at every opertunity Fantastic position Large room spotlessly clean and not noisey

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Couldn t fault this hotel  We stayed here for he weekend to complete the prudential London Surrey 100 ride The hotel was fantastic and had thought of everything Made the whole experience fantastic

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Our dinner took an hour to arrive we were given complimentary prosecco and our starters weren t charged The corn fed chicken on the menu turned out to be half a chicken Far too much for one person to eat and most of it went to waste   The hotel was really well prepared for all the Ride London participants who were staying there The ballroom made a brilliant safe place for the bikes to be stored Special menus for the cyclists including early breakfast

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: I booked a table for two in the restaurant for 7 00pm on arrival i requested confirmation i was told the booking was now 8 00pm to accommodate others I insisted that it return to 7 00pm as i wanted to ensure my meal was digested before retiring for a 4 30am wake up call On arrival at the restaurant we were give a more than acceptable table with the restaurant only 20 full That is where the good story ends At 7 45 we had to chase the first course a small salad and a bowl of soup it arrived 5 minutes later Main course was simply two bowls of pasta off their specifically for cyclists menu At 8 15 after both table to each side of us had been given and finished their main courses off the main menu steaks and speciality dishes I had to chase staff again a few minutes later we were told it would be a couple of minutes it wasn t at 8 30 I went to the open kitchen and asked when our main course would be served in a few minutes I was told approx 5 minutes later the two bowls of pasta arrived unfortunately incorrectly I was served a meat dish which i don t eat I then took it back to the kitchen and in no uncertain terms advised them that i had now waited over and hour and a half to received a simple pasta dish which was not one selected apologies were for the hundredth time were given and i was promised immediate attention sure enough my pasta meal of ricotta and spinach pasta arrived in a perhaps 1 minute surprise surprise it was a bowl of pasta smothered in cream with a odd touch of green in it simply disgusting in both appearance and taste it was left my whole experience lasted 2 hours i didn t get what I had planned and as it was the last piece of the jigsaw before hopefully a good nights sleep and a hundred mile ride the following day   The location for the Prudential London Surrey 100 cycle was and is excellent the effort the hotel put in to accommodate hundreds of cyclists was above and beyond

Hotel_Name: London Marriott Hotel West India Quay
Full_Review: Staff were exceptionally helpful welcoming and accommodating The special arrangements for the Ride London cycling event were exceptional Thank you

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: Really didn t like experience at all Extremely overpriced  I arrived at reception and there wasn t anyone to greet me for at least 10 mins they offered to upgrade our room but it s didn t seem to be anything spectular We ordered room service the food wasn t really anything too exciting at all The chips were cold I didn t enjoy burger at all We ordered breakfast next day and I ate mine barely but my partner refused after looking at mine Very well travelled and first time at Hilton Safe to say it might be my last

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: The room was old in previous stay room was better I suspect that the upper floors have been refurbished while the lower ones weren t   Ideal location walking distance to almost any tourist destination

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: The only negative was the first room I received was right up against the building so the view was blocked but the next night they gave me a wonderful upgrade and I would definitely stay there again   I loved the way they took care of me when I had a problem and went above and beyond to fix the issue and make sure I was happy thanks to the staff and management

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: Disappointed with the service the cleanliness and the facility Not a Hilton Property They made me pay 4 for requesting empty plate at the room Bed skirt was dirty and bed sheets and house keeping were not properly done I paid someone 10 to get me an additional baggage deck who never showed up I had to pay for drinking water as there is no complementary bottles Not Hilton Standard In the bathroom shower cap was never replaced In regards to the facility bathroom is way too small   I liked the location

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: The room was not like how it was described I had to change the room and the bathrooms in both rooms were reall bad I was promised that a manger would come and see me Stayed there 4 days and no one bothered to show Ordred 2 bananas and they charged be GBP 7 3 c mon is that fair Again will never go there and also do not intend on using booking Com as the way room was described it was not like that

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: The room which was prepaid had to be ready and clean for me at 12 00 I checked in at 16 30 still they were cleaning it Returned at 18 30 still were looking for my room as it was not ready At last they gave me a room with a great view but totally dirty Awful floors dirty toilettes and asked for an adaptor and requested a credit card The towels in the bathroom should have been cleaned and replaced whereas the toiletries were the lowest quality No Crabtree Evelyn The entrance of the hotel was so dirty you could hardly see it Room service awful the concierge was not even responding in the phone Asked for sbody to come pick up my luggage at the check out and even after 20 no one showed up I used to stay in this hotel in the past no comparison to how it was A true disappointment

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: Some simple errors made st check in and on checkout Attention to detail would have helped but they did work hard to resolve the small issues   Good and good value for this part of town The room was again good and clean

Full_Review: Perfect location for shopping etc good size rooms with tea coffee iron board facilities in room Very nice toiletries and a fabulous gym

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: It was my birthday treat and my husband had asked for some champagne to be in the room on arrival as a surprise This didn t happen and they blamed the fact that we booked via booking com as the request made at time of booking doesn t get passed to the hotel The member of staff was very matter of fact about this with no apology at all We paid extra for a room with views of London this we did get however the windows were filthy   The bar on the top floor is really good with excellent cocktails and the staff are very friendly and efficient

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: Nothing in mind but maybe they take a bet long time to clean the room   I liked the stander and the quality of the room and the location of the hotel was just perfect The breakfast was nice too i would stay there every time i go to London for sure

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: The room we original had was poor The curtains did not cover the window and the blind did not keep the light out The room needed updating and looked shabby in places I had to wait four hours after three phone calls to housekeeping to get a rollaway bed delivered to the room for my son   The breakfast is fantastic the view is great from upper level floors Location is amazing

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: Always had to queue for breakfast however staff were always friendly and smiling when obviously under pressure   First impressions very good warm and friendly welcome by receptionist All staff courteous and a credit to the hotel

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: The lobby is not great few sofas in front of the lefts The hotel rates are exaggerated The hotel recently refurbished but still furniture is outdated The sign in front of the lefts asking people to be quite was not appropriate some might see it even as disrespectful   Location of the hotel is great and it has amazing views of Hyde Park might be the best feature of the hotel make sure to ask for Park view Also the city views are good and you can see London Eye The Shard and many other landmarks Very close to many attractions in London and perfectly situated for shopping as its near Oxford street Knightbridge and Harrods Some of London best restaurants are within walking destance from the hotel Concierge services are excellent

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: My only Small issue wit the Hilton on PL is that it does not have a coffee lounge There is a small one in the executive lounge for about 12 people The Intercontinental has a great area on the ground floor where you can have short meetings and be served tea coffee etc so i go there for my meetings   I stay at this hotel every month and its like having a London home The staff are the best bit Juao on the Door Richard Tiago Boris in Windows all a credit to the Hilton

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane

Full_Review: honestly it dosnt worth to say it is 5 star hotel as i travel a lot and always stay in 5 star hotels and comparing to others this property absolutely dosnt worth 4 stars the housekeeping cleaners start from early morning closing doors and opening doors aggressively that make noise at the corridor without caring that some people are still sleeping secondly they knock the door once or twice and they enter the room without permission in addition 3 nights i am calling the room service late night and they never pickup and i end with the reception answering me and i ordered through them moreover at the day of check out at 9 30 am we have received a call from the reception saying that your check out today yes i know that my check out is today but why do they call me early morning so i woke up thirsty and tried to open the fridge and it was locked because i am checking out today but still it is 9 30 am we have till noon i called the housekeeping to get me some water because they didn t put the night before bottles when they cleaned the room and the housekeeping answered me with full confident we don t have water we distribute after 6 00 pm is this a service we get in a 5 star hotel finally at 11 00am the girl from reception called me to say that you are checking out today and i am trying to withdraw from the card but it dosnt authorize i dont know who authorized her to take from my card and the bill was full of mistakes when i went down and reviewed my bill this is absolutely not normal for a 5 star hotel and i dont understand why is the price for rooms are so high and the service is too bad it is not insulting to your staff but really this property should train their staff up to the standards of 5 star hotels staff should serve the guests   i have upgraded to a room that has balcony and the room was fair in size

Full_Review: Cleanliness Seriously for the 5 star hotel in central London carpet was stained cushions on the window seat were dirty some old grapes were lying on the floor bathroom walk in shower water was overflowing we chose this hotel for it great location but seriously expected more for the price and from Hilton brand  amazing location brilliant view from the hotel room all our request were met and the room was ready early absolutely loved the 28 th floor bar Galvin at Windows

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: This what I really didn t like that at first they gave us a very small room then I had to change it Secondly there was a noise coming from I don t know where but I think from outside non stop noise like zzzzzzzzzzzz I really don t know how to explain it but it was too annoying and whenever we open the window we had to close it and open the AC instead Thirdly I have a membership in Hilton and am eligible to get water every day but honestly I had to call them every day to ask for the water Actually am comparing everything with the hotels in my country we have real 5 stars hotels like when u pay the same amount we paid in Hilton we get s bigger room new furniture cleaner and much better services And I hope things could change in London s hotels as they are 5 stars and the level of everything must be really 5 stars  I was with my mom this time and when we reached the hotel after a long flight I asked them to see the room before paying the full amount to ensure that we will get a good room but they refused they said that we have to pay fully When we went to the room the room seemed to be very small and narrow and I my aim in this vacation is to let my mom feels comfortable and enjoying everything and the room was really too small so I had to go down again and I asked them to show me a better room as before I booked a room with the same category but it was much bigger than this So they showed me another room with the same category but it was better than that room The thing is that in this room the cabinets was near the toilets and not like the previous room when the cabinets were near the bed and there was no space for us to move So from the beginning they had to give us a good room as they saw me with my mom and at least they had to think about doing their best to let her feel comfortable in the room

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: I feel the rooms are a little bit over priced for what they are I also found that the pay to view movies were very over priced   Really nice hotel great place to stay great views of Hyde Park Green Park and London Staff really friendly and went the extra mile and the service at the restaurant on the 28th floor was fantastic

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: Very poorly managed hotel Carpet was dirty in the lobby with stains very visible at all places My toilet seat was broken and flush didnt work properly Shower didnt have much pressure in it The bed was wobbly and even my 1yr old son can push it to move With this big 5star hotel you would at least expect a free Wifi but NO Podium restaurant was awful Flies around our food all the time Uncomfortable chair to sit on while eating food The staff is untrained and the waitress kept spilling water over the table whenever she served water   Just the view and to be honest NOTHING ELSE Absolutely NOTHING ELSE

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: Dirty aspects to room Not vacuumed under chair when moved Stains on net curtains Coffee stains down fridge Unclean windows Mattress was awfull Shower head in need of replacement Not being in your real restaurant for breakfast Bed sheets for tablecloths  The bar on the 28 th floor Breakfast choice for veggie vegan not to bad The lifts Lobby area

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: Checked in told would have breakfast in executive lounge when we went the card didn t work no one answered the bell Then when we had to wait at reception to sort the cards once we finally got in no one to seat us no seats and no full breakfast We then just checked out RUBBISH service Also said parking would let us out I had to beep loads to get someone to let us out even though I was told someone would be there waiting for us don t get me started on the dreadful rude concierge we hadn t planned to stay and so didn t have a phone charger Having kids we wanted to make sure at least one phone had some charge until the morning They said they would call back then nothing waited up for their call nothing when they finally picked up a rude man answered and told me they didn t have any and he was about to call me back he then said he would check again why check again if you already claim you have Then just stayed there breathing down the phone and was really rude when I asked why he bothered doing that for effect DREADFUL service they only get money for the location I wouldn t pay ever again for Hilton so much for diamond membership AVOID plenty of other nicer hotels for the money   Nice clean room that s about it

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: I find it ridiculous that a 5 star hotel doesn t even offer complimentary internet There is so much competition out there that little things count Although we are only talking about 12 per day the irritation and feeling of being ripped off is enough that I will not stay there again I travel to London at least once a month and always stay in that area   Location

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: Everything was okay except the hotel didn t refund my deposit back I have contacted them too many times but still they didn t give me anything And I can t go to London more often to only get my deposit back you should be shamed to ditch me like that

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: Maybe more people serving tea and coffee but really not an issue   Staff were great Particularly Valentina on reception I see you ve booked a queen bed have you got a loyalty card yes We can do better than that would you like a king bed and we can offer you free wifi Thank you very much our room was lovely Great choice for breakfast which was all freshly cooked and replenished regularly A very comfortable stay indeed

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: The bathroom was not clean and the water did not go away quickly We had to ask for towels as only the big ones were replaced   Location and breakfast plus late check out

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: The bathroom was not as clean as it could have been considering the reputation of the hotel On entering the hotel the staff were not as personable as other Hilton hotels They pointed where the lift was with no offer of help with bags etc Very quick and eager to get me gone from the desk For a 5 Hilton in Mayfair I was surprised   The rooms were reasonable polite room service staff quick service with food excellent bar with friendly bar staff beautiful building

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: Upon arrival the hotel couldn t find any details about my booking One of the staff after 20 m Asked are sure you booked in this hotel French man Executive lounge breakfast so poor   Looking cation

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: Pillows were so soft and due to a birthday we were given an upgrade that included the delivery of a chocolate and fruit platter to our room Lovely little touch

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: The First room on the 8th floor had broken window there was a massive gradient of temperature between the window and the AC fan in the ceiling They called an engineer at 2am who said the building is 60years old I could also hear the traffic from outside I was moved to another room on the 10th floor The king size bed was actually assembled from two single beds The balcony at the bar on the top floor was not accessible for some weird H S policy When I complained the stuff was so generous to take 5 off from the minibar I would not recommend this hotel It s overrated   Location

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: I didn t find reception concierge particularly friendly or polite the hotel seems quite outdated and the interiors were worn off pictures there were cigarette joints by the window the tea spoons weren t properly washed the pictures are for the upgraded executive room   the breakfast was very good room was clean and comfortable room service was quite good and fast

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: Maybe better toiletries in the bathrooms e g toothpaste razors   The breakfast buffet was brilliant the staff were lovely and the high tech lift was a plus

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: Charged my CC by mistake took them too long to credit back the money to my card but this seem a usual bad practice of many hotels   Location and view is great There is a nice roof top restaurant caf

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: The room we were checked into was small and cramped The view was overlooking horrible dirty buildings When I spoke to reception they were not very helpful and took a while to find us another room which was on the smoking floor and we do not smoke This has been the first time I booked through booking com so not sure if I will book again as obviously they are not I offered good rooms   Usually rooms are quite spacious but not on this occasion

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: The bedroom wasn t as clean as I expected Mirror was misty floor in bathroom wasn t clean and overall cleaness wasn t up to hilton standard  The breakfast was very nice lots of variety

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: There was an issue in the window the cold come inside a room and also the smile of the room is bad because it s close of kitchen  I like the size of room

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: OVERRATED OVERPRICED I V STAYED AT BETTER 3 HOTELS THE FIRST ROOM I WAS GIVEN HAD A HUGE BROWN STAIN ON THE CARPET THE CHAIR WAS WORN RIPPED AND THE DESK DRAW WAS BROKEN ALMOST FALLING OFF YOU DONT EXPEXT THAT WITH A NAME LIKE HILTON NOT THE FRENDLIEST STAFF ON RECEPTION NOT RUDE A LITTLE UP THEMSELVES   EXCELLENT CLEANING STAFF IN THE SECOND ROOM I WAS GIVEN I UPGRADED AT A COST OF 95 00 PN EXTRA GOOD LOCATION FOR HYDE PARK GREAT VIEW 20TH FLOOR

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: Went to use the gents on the first floor the first two toilets I went to where in a very unpleasant state and the people in the room next to us or opposite kept us awake with their child s and their own noise level

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: The rooms are clean but dated the bed was about as comfortable as sleeping on the floor the only light in the room was by way of a small window in the corner and a couple of floor lamps Couldn t have been further from the bright rooms featuring lots of light I thought I had booked   Location was great and the staff were polite

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: I booked for a deluxe double Queen room but we a were initially located in a probably single room which was very small As I am staying to this hotel for the last 12 years I know very well how the room I booked should look like I asked for an immediate change which they did but because it was not ready we had to wait for 1and a half hour Then we waited for our luggage and have taken too long so I asked what happened and I realized that the did not know where they were located At the end and I was really feeling awkward how this could happen in a five star hotel they were found The manager on dutie asked me how they could compensate I did not ask for anything and he offered us a drink which we did not get it not because of them but because we did not find the time   Excellent location amazing view divine breakfast

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: Too much money for not a lot car park is alful Very nanrow small spaces to park your car Very nanrow driving down to car park as you have a cerb each side of you as we felt the wheels of our new 66 plate get scapped 3 times A lady that was leaving car park did the same but worse to her car she couldn t get out of her space and in the end I had to help her move her car As she was moving off she hit the side and wheel of her 16plate merc Not a happy time as you can imagine Don t think I would stay there again due to this  Free wifi

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: It was a little noisy The first night was a lot of banging doors which woke me up and the next morning there was some work going on outside the hotel which also awoke me   The hotel was very central and location was great The room was very comfortable and we were upgraded when we arrived which was great

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: My room was attached to another room by a door and I could hear my neighbours through it   Great location excellent breakfast friendly staff beautiful views over Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: The worst Manager ever seen his name is Benny V he wasn t very helpful and cooperative as he should do in his position it made me feeling like there is a kind of racism by how he is acting when I complained to my friends they said don t go to him better I like the Hilton hotels specially Park lane one but with this guy am not happy to stay there   Everything from facility point of view

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: The house keeping They have a problem in any Hilton I go to They can t finish the work properly Like they clean the toilet and they don t put floor towels nor a shower towels So I need to ask for it   N A

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: The Breakfast was not 5 star standard for example no menu on the table and when we went to the self serve breakfast bar our table had been reset and our tea and coffee had been removed plus the food at the Breakfast bar was not very hot   The hotel in general was a good experience

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: With just 4 lifts it was chaos when a large group checked in It took 10 minutes to get into the lift from the lobby From the floors the waiting time was longer and the only option was to ride the elevator all the way up and then come down With a computer deciding which lift will stop on your floor your patience gets tested   Location Rooms with great views

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: You had to pay for wifi Only free if you booked through hotel website Felt penalised as used booking com This was despite having an upgraded for money room with lounge access Yeah free wifi there but I like to work in my room Hotel felt tired  Location

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: The service is not what you expect from a famous 5 star hotel as the staff were in general looking bored of manu customers they recieve per day Tge shooking part was the room cleanliss where i found lots of dirts and bottels caps and toys just after pushing yhe bid little bit I asked for a king size and i got twin attached bids which they took one hour to reareange it Moreover tge comfort of the matress is so bad even 2 hostals may offer better matresses Wi fi was not strong enough i bearly catch a signal at tge bed corner   The hotel offer rooms at higher floors and big windows allowing for getting some nice view over the city

Hotel_Name: London Hilton on Park Lane
Full_Review: I booked it and it said breakfast included when I got their staff said no I had 2 cockroaches in my bathroom I ve stayed here loads of times never had nothink like it  I liked the bar downstairs
